name: Hung
subject: I know this is a little longer than usual
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
Hi Peter,
It's Hung Cao, and I want to level with you.
Sending emails like this isn't something I enjoy. And you know what? I'm willing to bet you're just as tired of receiving them from every single politician in Washington. Trust me, my inbox is overflowing, and I'm as fed up with them as you are.
So here's the deal: I won't beg you for money or resort to flashy tactics. Instead, I'm going to lay it all out on the table and be completely upfront with you.
When it all comes down to it, people from every corner of our nation will scrutinize the amount of money we've raised during this crucial first month since I announced my campaign. We have an opportunity to make a resounding impact, and we need to seize the moment.
As I mentioned before, I don't like sending these emails and texts, but can you guess what I do love doing?
I LOVE having the chance to prove all the doubters wrong--the ones who laugh at me for having hope in America, who question our ability to triumph over an incumbent Democrat, and those who doubt I can turn this blue state into a red one.
To them, I say: Bring it on.
I've always told you that I don't shy away from a fight, and I mean it.
If you're someone who shares that spirit and refuses to back down, join me in the trenches of this new mission, and let's show the world what we're truly capable of.
I won't pretend it'll be easy, but by joining forces, we'll send a resounding message that true change starts from the ground up. We'll prove that ordinary people united by a common purpose can defy the odds and create a future where our voices are heard.
So, Peter, if you're as determined as I am, let's rise above the noise. Let's show them what we're made of.
[**https://secure.winred.com/hung-cao-for-virginia/deadline-almost-here**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=5f679c707b674c7aaa8bae30aadfd928&_e=LFcFWZ64AoeGy3hjoutvWqpBQVcIpycajNWm1392OgS94CYgy8-cYlIFnVquaOcRAUQGo4d7_6EKHAcr1AvKeeJjwurlJnJHr-p-ehXIyIB8zmoez4GqhV5QlEAqffbNp9w57CK5cZD9-lvMNeyRHEQgguELvAg1Vf1tZf2h2PwDH58qBu1tNxdkyOtaQSB4DMbhit0KMF2t8L3syRTwxcXhDkqlB1JMQN92L0wOqXaD65sMsJHOzbvB0g0wRDQ2pBqf4maHMalmycJqkRHErUUcHuZyyIbzrUTXqBqH6WDVCCGFVYBx42x_vlEcUYP0tjt0kIKrO40lyDeYmdgsYu880XVOdjeuWtIatr4UTcI%3D)
Thank you for standing shoulder-to-shoulder with me in the battle to save this great Nation. Together, we'll prove that passion, grit, and grassroots support can turn the tide in our state and our country.
-Hung

Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
---
If you would like to be removed from this list, [please notify us here](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_s=5f679c707b674c7aaa8bae30aadfd928&_t=wPCHVMz8p8urNUUC021qDpVUA3tYkQ7ahWSXydeZmCaJBJBg9TOiD1MSr-NB8JN6qBrHG6NvzvVfeGq_T-Nxn_hJHAD8Q5o-jy1iDBURZrQ%3D).

Peter,
Doing this work has been the honor of my life, but it doesn’t come without its challenges. I’ve been a top target of the far right for decades, with endless sums of money to spend on attack ads against me.
When right-wing special interests are working nonstop to restrict our right to vote, end our right to choose, make us less safe, and take advantage of us, it’s my job as the People’s Lawyer to have your back.
But I can’t stress this enough: I can’t be successful without your support. It might not be the easiest way to fund a campaign, but I wouldn’t have it any other way. They might have the money, but we have the many.
So, Peter, before our end-of-month fundraising deadline at MIDNIGHT, can I count on you to help us close our $3,907 gap?
According to our records, you’re still eligible to take advantage of your PCR. That means you can make a contribution of up to $50 (or $100 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota!
[**If you can, please consider using your PCR before our MIDNIGHT deadline. name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: A personal link for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Team, After years as a trade unionist, where I fought on behalf of firefighters, grocery store workers, and meatpackers, I've seen firsthand the issues plaguing working folks in our community. It’s why I came to Washington to build on my fight and ensure every person has a seat at the table. From day one, I wanted a campaign powered by hardworking folks who’d chip in what they could, when they could, so we could build a movement we all believe in. Because this campaign is about folks like you, not super PACs and powerful mega-donors. But building a grassroots movement makes us especially vulnerable to outside spending and attacks, and National Republicans have already turned their attention to seats like mine as they look to expand their House majority. I know what this grassroots team is capable of, and I know if we dig deep and work together to fight for our shared values, we can overcome anything thrown our way — **because we’ve done it before, and we’ll do it again.** So I’m personally asking one last time to add a contribution of any amount to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal, protect this seat, and take back the House majority. **Here is a personal link to give before our midnight deadline:** **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/njb-em-oct2023?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72571572/435708624/-2002594886?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20231031_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmQyMzZiOS00OTc4LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vQ5oxpLjLg0M2KCNiRxkKO8lwyHPWQ4BkoUU1-hv6j0=)** Every time you chip into this campaign, you power our efforts to build a brighter future for families across Central and Southern Illinois. | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8b755db15c534971931bead7dc2c5f2d&_e=L-5qq7fpwcFJ291q6t75J7YKGRIxaxJUykCsKvWjyF8Q6Xqn2rrii2rbn5KIHv3DiBTKlEjqoesm4e8wG9HXS14Qa12v-iR9DoqHMZzA59OnbaxpeAxOx6vZVJ3othBaskEM20SQlUHIw0x89feWd7l3yXDctGcSW8gY4msTwZtOtj_q-akhYcgUuWZnP6ks_E2x9FfBtBQpwBJYnsEY9ZwxP5NRnRGg8twnTH1PE1PHaJfuhIhV1fURf2NqjF4N-vksC4do6MMZjhzY48VlX8-9aMgV01EadsWmKMAcRO-K4y2kt46FFfR7mAE870LS2G1f3YOrfLMT4I7MbVLPLbs5TeMNR-2yd_AKVhp5ktOaRONiVTL0Enk3ESPZcyqHKixhaPrTmXQTA69f4PKfJA%3D%3D)

Friend,

Governor Glenn Youngkin here.

We are in the final stretch of what I believe is the most important election happening in America.

Early voting is underway right now and Election Day is right around the corner on November 7.

Joe Biden, the DNC, and extreme dark money political groups have made Virginia's election their top priority. They've poured more than $8 million into Virginia in the closing weeks of this election.

[That's why I need committed donors like you from across the country to get off the sidelines and get in the game in Virginia.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8b755db15c534971931bead7dc2c5f2d&_e=L-5qq7fpwcFJ291q6t75J7YKGRIxaxJUykCsKvWjyF8Q6Xqn2rrii2rbn5KIHv3DiBTKlEjqoesm4e8wG9HXS14Qa12v-iR9DoqHMZzA59OnbaxpeAxOx6vZVJ3othBaskEM20SQlUHIw0x89feWd7l3yXDctGcSW8gY4msTwZtOtj_q-akhYcgUuWZnP6ks_E2x9FfBtBQpwBJYnsEY9R-5OzyBGb7TuRaOSRLrPRRhVPKZqAtNpITzZ0s7j90PzuulKjgFvRo2Sm_7A2B8oOJ7itUgGIAbUkNMZr0av462VulG1jSP5Hi6GqjODf30BIp_wA_q3kNSof5ilEzzr59DFbN1cra8YY0JD_dVbcBiI_IWWI2uXLhHetF9TpgH)

| [ **GET IN THE GAME** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=8b755db15c534971931bead7dc2c5f2d&_e=L-5qq7fpwcFJ291q6t75J7YKGRIxaxJUykCsKvWjyF8Q6Xqn2rrii2rbn5KIHv3DiBTKlEjqoesm4e8wG9HXS14Qa12v-iR9DoqHMZzA59OnbaxpeAxOx6vZVJ3othBaskEM20SQlUHIw0x89feWd7l3yXDctGcSW8gY4msTwZtOtj_q-akhYcgUuWZnP6ks_E2x9FfBtBQpwBJYnsEY9R-5OzyBGb7TuRaOSRLrPRSdoewSzUFYJP-1YLjdwwlkGBnQ4AFugFWh0eZOi6JhutPZDtPyYzYBgDkV6vRwLvhi_Nt_xgzB9gtJwE4_tZx_Ch8bQv3br7MF0XRYEfLjOLAZ6elyr9UNAZlYvNpRhf-kcz4r5WGUsOSxm8uW_gac)
---

We've proved that commonsense conservative leadership works in Virginia. We're lowering the cost of living, growing jobs, empowering parents in their children's lives, and supporting law enforcement heroes.

And if we hold our majority in the House and flip the Senate in November, we will be able to advance solutions that make Virginia our country's leader on the issues that matter most.

But I need your help to win.

This election will be decided by a handful of competitive seats, and the outcome of this election will determine whether Virginia remains a bright light in a country mired in the policy failures of the Biden Administration.

**I need you in the game** , so we have the resources we need to compete against Joe Biden, the DNC, and the extreme dark money political groups who want to take Virginia backwards. _**The left has poured $8 million into Virginia in the final stretch of this election, and we know that more is on the way.**_

We're lowering the cost of living, growing jobs, empowering parents in their children's lives, and supporting law enforcement heroes. And if we hold our majority in the House and flip the Senate in November, we will be able to advance solutions that make Virginia our country's leader on the issues that matter most. body:

| | Hi there,

When I talk to my friends, family, and community members, no matter what our political beliefs or what walk of life we come from, we all seem to agree on one thing: **Congress is not working.**

Our government is facing a shutdown for the second time in two months. We were without a Speaker of the House for nearly three weeks. They finally elected someone, but he’s a far-right extremist. And Scott Perry is right in the middle of all of that chaos, refusing to support the simple bipartisan solutions that will make our Commonwealth stronger.

Put briefly, that’s exactly why I’m running for Congress. Because after years of telling the stories of Central Pennsylvanians on television, I’m ready to tell the stories of Pennsylvanians in the halls of the Capitol. And because **Pennsylvanians deserve a leader who works to end the chaos, not a leader who’s instigating it.**

If you’re with me, will you consider making a donation before my midnight deadline tonight? **It’s really important that I finish my first month in this race strong, and every donation helps:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/js-em-oct23](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72571704/435709290/281783690?source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_103123_OCTEOM7noteA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWY1NzllZDgtNDk3OC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OMgCmO11IDrUqoMpgTdJNCNKu_9LyMo77VCnUA_GFDs=)**

Your support means the world to me,

Janelle
---

Lemoyne, PA 17043
United States

Friend, it's Emily from Team Gillibrand. **I just took a look at our ActBlue, and we're still $2,684 short of our $50,000 end-of-month goal in just 4 hours. Can you help us make up the gap with a $10 gift now? Here's a personalized donation link for you: [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_fr_defend-senate-2023/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72572210/435712749/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=10&refcode=jtk4541-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTg3ZGI0Yy00YTc4LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qA7OovEG3wI6YZV4AZBVF_Tz7BnGRBzjANgrJprsDrU=)**
When Kirsten decided to set a $50,000 goal for this month, we all knew that it would take an unprecedented outpouring of grassroots support to hit it. **But this is an unprecedented moment:**
1) With the presidency and control of Congress on the ballot, running a winning campaign will be **more expensive than _ever_ before.**

2) New York Republicans just had their best election cycle in decades. They're going to be **calling on their biggest megadonors to defeat Kirsten** and bankroll endless attack ads against her.

3) All of our fundraising numbers will become public after this deadline. **Mitch McConnell will be looking for any sign of weakness** — we must show him that Kirsten's seat is NOT up for grabs.
We need Kirsten's bold voice in the Senate — and our narrow Democratic majority could be riding on what happens in New York. **[_That's why I'm asking you to chip in just $10 to help us make up this gap in the final hours before tonight's deadline._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72572211/435712754/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=10&refcode=jtk4541-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTg3ZGI0Yy00YTc4LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qA7OovEG3wI6YZV4AZBVF_Tz7BnGRBzjANgrJprsDrU=)**

**Please, friend, will you rush $10 now to defend our Senate majority and ensure Kirsten can keep on fighting for progress in the Senate? Here's that personal donation link that I made for you:[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_fr_defend-senate-2023/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72572212/435712756/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=10&refcode=jtk4541-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTg3ZGI0Yy00YTc4LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qA7OovEG3wI6YZV4AZBVF_Tz7BnGRBzjANgrJprsDrU=)**
We just need around 250 people to step up before midnight to hit this goal — and I'm really counting on you to be one of them, friend.
Thanks so much,

Emily Graham
|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72572213/435712757/1575385346?refcode=jtk4541-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTg3ZGI0Yy00YTc4LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qA7OovEG3wI6YZV4AZBVF_Tz7BnGRBzjANgrJprsDrU=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. Here's a personalized donation link for you: = When Kirsten decided to set a $50,000 goal for this month, we all knew that it would take an unprecedented outpouring of grassroots support to hit it. But this is an unprecedented moment: 1) With the presidency and control of Congress on the ballot, running a winning campaign will be more expensive than ever before. 2) New York Republicans just had their best election cycle in decades. They're going to be calling on their biggest megadonors to defeat Kirsten and bankroll endless attack ads against her. 3) All of our fundraising numbers will become public after this deadline. Mitch McConnell will be looking for any sign of weakness — we must show him that Kirsten's seat is NOT up for grabs. We need Kirsten's bold voice in the Senate — and our narrow Democratic majority could be riding on what happens in New York. = Please, friend, will you rush $10 now to defend our Senate majority and ensure Kirsten can keep on fighting for progress in the Senate? Here's that personal donation link that I made for you:= We just need around 250 people to step up before midnight to hit this goal — and I'm really counting on you to be one of them, friend. Thanks so much, Emily Graham | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Team Cori
subject: Republicans choosing tricks over treats 🎃
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
| |

Peter, This Halloween, one of the spookiest things we’re facing is the right-wing effort to drain our campaign of its resources. **Our opponents — right-wing dark money groups and the corporate Democratic establishment — have made it clear that our campaign is one of their top targets in Congress this cycle.** Why? Because three years ago, we beat back the corporate Democratic machine to show the people of St. Louis we don’t have to settle for scraps. We showed them that we can have a Representative that’s a megaphone for our voices. We can overcome their cynical strategies of coordinated harassment. What we can’t do alone is beat back the millions of dollars they promise to spend against our movement. **** [**Can you chip in $5, $20 or whatever you can to help us defend against our opponents, new and old?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zrl7hAwtfC3RQ56zUloyYjvm79LbFX3LIzU5_Al8wgRTIgoBd3epaNBUZ0MbLIbXemUR96gi_PuLAkK1PGlpimkTFYSXHlXMlFfaa5W_HyYW1S_BKy8hK9BGqZTHbFaOmA5BU-gEYqtz6uXMlYanYdCGG-QPMNF7RPbWMe-k_OQfGpdSTmeUe2Zs0lgxwK-0NNxNWjCxt1CjMIMv3ljngCnDw7Or7mSfLEuPkjxW1csP4tD4Y3SRyyTV8WxdbXpx3Z2ysATdL_e-mgooU9mkgRykad1zDJ3WRpVQaj-lV58g/40x/sX5mHlNMQgGekKmu9T1Ewg/h0/pF1JTPoo08mP59fY1TtkI-c8qCuHD4cwlt9b5EuIxwQ) **[DONATE >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zrl7hAwtfC3RQ56zUloyYjvm79LbFX3LIzU5_Al8wgRTIgoBd3epaNBUZ0MbLIbXdT-6Oao_MZgf9MGuyKXZ91gwbI-6yQ08DaPg2kCYI6smUVX80ise_Vu8_T0Suk2C1dXBoIYHgZlSmHQJk1o620OOcnx_UiwAjYKSQlveUMS8BuQvyxQon0B1IwNR7YOYgYP7TrzEFo9Ny1C1JTNK5NvzuquqDXbbe0M1gmCxXWlHZ279Kjf7G5X1pbGjJerVYgeslKYXVu-TtuBOgrdXH0I-VLtDRB2zN-zXum5dcjuQ/40x/sX5mHlNMQgGekKmu9T1Ewg/h1/6LztaypbipuXa4JVWb4lgr9Ff5KKgMDce8GmRwPHmZg) ** The political attacks on our campaign are a clear example of how right-wing extremist groups will stop at nothing to malign our movement unapologetically working in service of our communities. **While right-wing, corporate PACs look to spend millions against us, Cori is continuing to fight for St. Louis.** While they are courting donations from big pharma, big oil, and every other big monied interest there is, Cori is holding those big monied interests accountable for their rampant corruption and greed. Instead of being haunted by yet another tactic out of the GOP playbook, we are laser-focused on continuing to deliver for the people of St. Louis and across the country. That exact integrity and vision for a better future is what these right-wing dark money groups desperately want to stop. **They know that no matter how much they spend, the people united will never be defeated.** Cori doesn't take any money from corporate PACs, because our movement for transformative change should be people-powered. And right now we’re up against a new challenger and an end-of-month deadline. To return to Congress and continue to be the bold leader our communities demanded, we have to demonstrate our power now. **** [**Can you donate before our end-of-month deadline at midnight so that we can show our opponents that the power of the people is always greater than the people in power?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zrl7hAwtfC3RQ56zUloyYjvm79LbFX3LIzU5_Al8wgRTIgoBd3epaNBUZ0MbLIbXdJSoIzwGXWFd51ALx_lmfDzqd5f6r4Ey0bnbaDzRUyk9fiuuXqGo7izDnyI38pA3ZQ22LU5t8WfwgJIu5H43lYSYPk1HboxCXiesEFkbjZ0cggpS992fpHsdnB2y5DOcxhN2TKYJ7FdeGTQd6_ckudqG2xAkYlyiP0urv4-PUM0mxSN9w4ewsNxIZdFPt7-Cy4qb7xdHtJ9kfTaWF-Iea-Iqv5q7YlKpkbhC0-DomeXw/40x/sX5mHlNMQgGekKmu9T1Ewg/h2/mNItzVbvFksOEBn7nUny8BqK8Q7e7hMgKDcHfIK3_QU) **[DONATE >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zrl7hAwtfC3RQ56zUloyYjvm79LbFX3LIzU5_Al8wgRTIgoBd3epaNBUZ0MbLIbXdztAyIXfnkraHQdef_Y5FtiJUK2iopdU_6jdvC0Hih4No8yDU29X__JpGMe8Rb3-LW5Gnmyn8FKKfpv48C2FE-lsv4sUjyAD-lG8mso9kVAt0iMen2EV1lYi8zC9b0qy_3DRqrodv_QRoJup_gkp_pe_EZgwhPyStEcR47MMduQ-il5hLVZ9zZaCOpExnQ8l7x0xFHotp7DXqwD6Hw6y5iTtsyhKZ2Bh6a-J9h8YnhfA/40x/sX5mHlNMQgGekKmu9T1Ewg/h3/NOb3jdxGCS-vDbjnf7THwvAY1ASN-Fh6pLPntGpkcIs) ** Together, we will never back down from right-wing groups that seek to undermine our progressive movement for change. -Team Cori **[SUPPORT OUR MOVEMENT](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zrl7hAwtfC3RQ56zUloyYjJXdP3I3zRe-hYfEIzv7DiPNGMGzPuXH3X3vHGyYJBnbiMjBROJLNdwPxxAl21fBkwB3H1vluj1v_Zxg8eFLO9LlF387PXoXJ0h7yHer6B2ttNIbdDQE9j-k6SP-XScunIXgLacvP6i48pg-Yuv5xyjwAsVHFjSPZwWJnBZW21AZoRaXEQwubyddCFTc9zWzZ2IJxNTKWywChZ3K2WoNs2XSdeTUDyHrTbn3stbTGFo_P0rJ_VbiFAafTPYVyIzyQiN4YvDsgDRHqtRKLxftdqGvzqVQ0VhrR5WU1UclQtHTYLP_uMNopq9OhAc7Jj2a8/40x/sX5mHlNMQgGekKmu9T1Ewg/h4/-z9nI1ushXGhLzkupDBy9hZS2zQX47zFN-r_Jmiliks) **

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: They're trying to finish me off
body:
My career is at stake.
| | Friend, In 2022, Democrats poured out nearly $20 million for one reason: to take me out.
**Now they 're ramping up their efforts to defeat me in 2024 and DEFEAT me once and for all.**
You see, I recently introduced a censure resolution against known anti-semite Rashida Tlaib, and her crony friends in the Hamas Caucus didn't like that.
_**So they introduced a censure resolution against me in retaliation.**_
And they're using the momentum they've gained to fundraise against me.
But they like to lick the boots of dark money groups and deep-pocket lobbyists in D.C. to raise their money, while I count on you - THE PEOPLE.
They seem to have forgotten who holds the power in this country.
**[And with my crucial $30,000 end-of-month goal deadline approaching at midnight, I need you to show the Pro-Hamas Democrats that the support of YOU, THE AMERICAN PEOPLE, is far greater than kissing the feet of moguls like George Soros](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ce4fa0321c734bb09fdf8a9f62b692e3&_e=wAvG-_FIPMCVHGs35g9GBGOXS4Yyab1Y4U4_NudUTb3NGpgvIqkX3tmoXS87ejrj1yiBimjRbus1G4rPzIJM0JropsGlPv4N7oz_GKQUauTRGaDqAZ7ejk6EgK8q75e06PIGMshbbgh39qiWlnyhEmyPPM_PiQhvAt5Kx4vuRgQ7sTZd8WTPdDyCl-h92R2SBhlnq9UDqQHph8195jJN8jXJVo8goF9TdAywsd0cI3fMGhuZSCVl1Z6oZ6GUTbBlJhd-_ezNaLdMRdkKgnYY7ALsxxdoS0pzpfShOayoZh3dnUtSRiYN2_FPgLL5WMMcnUBmI_hT24Z4Ucm9T3Fe1kfM1D2j63yYNqt_GQgwsMDp393kuLl6DxHlUIzX1nb5).**

Even in grueling times like these, I have never been let down by my fellow patriots, and I know you won't let me down now.
_Talk Soon_ , Marjorie Taylor Greene

Even in grueling times like these, I have never been let down by my fellow patriots, and I know you won't let me down now. Talk Soon , Marjorie Taylor Greene | | %unsubscribeurl%This Email was Sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com If you would like to stop recieving our emails

Friend,
Earlier this month, while on a trip to meet with Chinese President Xi Jinping to grill him on fentanyl and their unfair trade practices, I received the devastating news of the Hamas-led terror attacks on Israel.
After wrapping up our meetings in China, we quickly changed course to Israel to meet with Prime Minister Bibi Netanyahu, his war cabinet, and the families of Israeli-American hostages being held by Hamas.
---
---
[](https://u34881959.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=Myp6d5sqCDL1-2F-2FdAOHe9PGoZr9pAaWrPznezd1-2FvdEn7YQ5SniiJc108vhmX-2BBPtOw8cCIx9W3fHSTVkxlSlVBYqrSed1qgY97h4E0TwdLWAaSrYVHBKpi4JDMNH-2FXKFsJPkByKdj-2FwtszsJ8GSiA9Ix-2Fbjfj-2BoXzyRfNUC799PgVXw3Gx9P8kTQEAm5QuCUKSfZOaQTjxkoRpmvkU6BOm8guIvoATmQ2Do4R0ySE2U-3DB_fP_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdkLMmWeLnwK0KfPGgXzXHvoIGcfoQrAuI0Zkzwvv9dkHghc1ZFPh4s2VPIB-2BUJPR1ce1MwXOgEsQtpD9Vs-2BDtc-2FYUEFmTZdF9oHBLp5XJbOV-2FW6OnjLNHSNeGGjTtPh65veTqHYMl9fTDEKq15sgny24Nz7MXapBK-2BJc9yBTXjPEPTmmjNvAoloowmWqtpH3v14QrKXWb97MhjNzpCmxzyNRQS1TEyPWe-2Fh95FHt-2FuNSnz0fwRMzMF-2BXfB4OObz0jyHTkHgdQQ-2FzYvGjc4sXasIGSLJ9LgwRAXx9v0DUPMtueb99i2xOGB0STL6H7xunDlLnyPVlA3c02aC-2BMlXuejz4KV-2FVBwVRDJwwrhkURX5ZVA9umBVqt1yyJei9lgRHAVlQj0HOL8ytm6-2FW-2BNw-2FuNuGoJfi9blDhK3kMIkU65b2Vi7ZQAgXdiBbKlx7wQKEGFmYeFw-2F1DPLAhcF5G541ZtcjbdlWIxbGuc9IdWKajbwg7III7UiRrATzLdItDSXu29ENYUghDHjGWmtiOYyDumMAhb4R6N1SS6OJsb5xwliRKN-2BlKbcOP-2FaKIpbkrVGLBEARYRlf7AHidCukYroXf0Vtv1kjpiPQO5WCuNcQ8vMo2jifXWn-2FoxelZEpz3uTY6rHQaieiHuB9034cpHvo6Fj20PsSLfDp24jqx5KBM1EH3XiM8I30HsGpsn84n3dNqeQabT02dPHt8cOfh2Hqi-2Ft7JG5TwzCvGorPbT2dngNLbEhE6ESkUSSgiRPRheawuJgeTpZLT0IW9MgZAcThe4R54Um345IiMTFE6lJAruwb64jI1WW3BJcBO0Wz4RBZq2sG-2BRYTgdy0xwx39nCKziQfA7aFcR8xGPj-2FHXzy5WMtXEQCdEz6kOATwUKgZ5B6Yg8X8-2B-2FzRghf7TpEQaVMkjKI2vDVP-2FVvtH98-2BcBTRvOgs-2FD3-2FSdc7L4nB2H9Grr4)

Throughout the day, as I met with Prime Minister Netanyahu and others to learn more about the tragic attacks and offer our unwavering support, I was struck by two painful truths:
1) When sirens rang-out, signaling that we needed to find the nearest bomb shelter, our Israeli counterparts were alert – but calm. It was clear that they had become accustomed to the trauma of war – to being under attack at a moment’s notice...
2) If the United States had lost as many Americans on 9/11 as Israel lost on October 7th – proportionate to our respective populations – we would have lost between 30-40,000 people...
**Let me be perfectly clear:****** attempts to sanitize or whitewash Hamas’ barbaric attacks on Israeli civilians are absolutely despicable.
Israel is now at war because they were attacked, and they have every right to defend themselves.
The shameful rise in anti-Semitism we’re now witnessing here at home, both on college campuses and in certain Radical Left circles, is a sad reflection on our country.
The U.S. has a duty to support Israel as they work to defend their homeland. Anything less would be unacceptable.
**It’s time to set the record straight. It’s time to make our position clear, and let the world know where we stand as Americans.**

We’ll try not to scare you too much, but the idea of Kari Lake in the Senate is truly a nightmare for our democracy. In a recent conversation on the app formerly known as Twitter — Kari called for a Senate leader who will “work with President Trump” and has floated the idea of electing a leader even more extreme than Mitch McConnell. subject: I want to get serious for a second.

body:
A Republican majority in Congress has been disastrous.

| Peter,

My campaign’s October deadline is coming up in just a few short hours. So far, my team tells me we’re still [50] donations short of our goal.

I won’t ask you to donate to my campaign just yet, but if you’re ready to do so, you can donate using this secure link: [_**voteforlinda.com/OctoberGoal**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72572704/435724547/-1667771349?refcode=BLU-SAN-20231031-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTFjOTNjYi00ZDc4LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_XfEEG3IPyaSjrVK-WwQx2jLIqmYGg15mH9Nbb3wdlw=)

A Republican majority in Congress has been disastrous. There are enough examples to point to in this month alone. McCarthy’s short tenure as Speaker was characterized by chaos and disorder, and the rest of his party has shown us it’s no different.

This chaos has serious consequences for the American people. In the 22 days Republicans spent without a speaker, they delayed the passage of critical spending bills and progress on crucial legislative solutions to our most pressing issues. And now, with Mike Johnson as the new Speaker of the House, the Republican party's attacks on reproductive rights, gun safety legislation, and LGBTQ+ rights are bound to intensify. Their majority cannot last.

As I work to lower costs for working families, I’m also working to ensure we have a Democratic House majority next year. Early investments in this campaign are important to make that happen. I hope I can count on your support with a $5 contribution ahead of tonight’s deadline >> [_**voteforlinda.com/OctoberGoal**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72572705/435724548/-1667771349?refcode=BLU-SAN-20231031-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTFjOTNjYi00ZDc4LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_XfEEG3IPyaSjrVK-WwQx2jLIqmYGg15mH9Nbb3wdlw=)

I’m ready to get back to work.

-Linda

subject: truly hate this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
I really hate sending emails like this. But I made the decision not to take contributions from corporate PACs, and we cannot afford to let Lauren Boebert out-spend us again. Especially not when we lost by just 546 votes last time.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72572806/435724999/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjFjOTNjYi00ZDc4LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-ikWHWO6T4D92CySKRmRj4VSgDQjL9zf1vJWrLR5hPU=&emci=272a6f5f-3e78-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=d61c93cb-4d78-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72572807/435725000/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjFjOTNjYi00ZDc4LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-ikWHWO6T4D92CySKRmRj4VSgDQjL9zf1vJWrLR5hPU=&emci=272a6f5f-3e78-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=d61c93cb-4d78-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
I really hate sending emails asking for money. But I made the decision not to take contributions from corporate PACs, and we cannot afford to let Lauren Boebert out-spend us again. Especially not when we lost by just 546 votes in 2022.
You see, these fundraising emails are the only way grassroots-funded campaigns like ours can compete with the Super PACs.
I know they can get annoying – especially if you’re hearing from a lot of campaigns. So if you need to unsubscribe, I understand. [**But if you can afford to give $5 to help me defeat Lauren Boebert, today would be a really good moment to chip in to my campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72572808/435725001/1610638071?refcode=em20231031pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=d61c93cb-4d78-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjFjOTNjYi00ZDc4LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-ikWHWO6T4D92CySKRmRj4VSgDQjL9zf1vJWrLR5hPU=)
We’re facing our most important end-of-month fundraising deadline yet at midnight tonight, and we’re still just $6,821 short of our $350,000 goal.
Lauren Boebert knows she is in trouble. That’s why her extreme Washington allies have already started attacking me.
All of the political pundits got this race wrong last time. Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight said we would lose by over 45,000 votes. But this time, they’re all saying we can win. This is a "toss-up" race.

Tonight at midnight marks the first end of month fundraising deadline since extremist Mike Johnson was elected Speaker. my only hope
| | |
---
Friend, it's Debbie Mucarsel-Powell. In a minute, I'm going to ask you to **[chip in to help me defeat Rick Scott](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72572998/435727740/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk228-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjgyNmZlN2MtNGU3OC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nFN2wLfK93meQKp9oVQGmCePmgu9vkM9X_HM8BmQsrY=) **— but first, let me explain why it's so important:
A recent poll showed me statistically _**tied**_ with Rick Scott, which means we can win this race, flip Florida blue, and help defend our Democratic Senate majority!
And last week, Rick Scott spent **$3 million** airing attack ads in Florida to spread misinformation and slander Democrats like me.
**Now, I'm still 14% short of my $150,000 end-of-month goal with only a few hours left ahead of my midnight deadline.** If I don't close this gap, I won't be able to respond to GOP attacks — and Rick Scott could pull ahead in the polls.
**So I'm turning to you, friend. This grassroots team is my only hope of reaching this goal before the end of the night.**

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell

name: Team Fight Like Hell PAC
subject: Tour the GOP House of Horrors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
Walk through the GOP House of Horrors. But don’t worry — we’ll be by your side... |
#
---
Team, Before you head to your costume party or go trick-or-treating, we want you to walk with us through the GOP House of Horrors. Don’t be scared! The team at Fight Like Hell PAC works hard every day to make sure the ghouls can’t get to you, and we’ll be by your side every step of the way. If you go through this door and to the right wing, you’ll encounter the first scary ghost. **Meet Donald Trump.** We’re sure you are _very_ familiar with him, but in case you’re not, he’s the ringleader of the MAGA circus. Whether it’s appointing the conservative Supreme Court justices who helped overturn _Roe v. Wade_ or his attempt to overturn the 2020 election, his plans for us make him our most dangerous ghoul! **If you walk further down the hallway, you’ll run into the new Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.** MAGA Mike just arrived at our House of Horrors, but he is equally as dangerous as anyone else you’ll meet today. Mike was one of the leaders of the effort to overturn the 2020 election results, and he’s in favor of ripping away your reproductive freedom by enacting a national abortion ban, and even wants to ban same-sex marriage. Scary stuff! **If you keep walking and open the door to the right, you’ll find the clown show known as the Michigan GOP led by MAGA Matt Hall. But don’t look long — you don’t want to scare yourself too much!** Thanks to Gretchen Whitmer and Michigan Democrats, Michigan Republicans’ plans to ban abortion and restrict voting rights have been thwarted. But we have to be careful — they are always planning their return. **If we don’t continue to Fight Like Hell against the ghouls from the GOP House of Horrors, their plans to pass total abortion bans, overturn elections, and rip away your benefits may come back to haunt us.** **[Will you rush a contribution to Fight Like Hell PAC so we can make sure that we have the resources we need to stop the MAGA ghouls from haunting the halls of power?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72573086/435727989/1443130511?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231031_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmJjYWY2OTctNGU3OC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ock-bEBbm_2LI_DDIA4YzvtZBXqGTbfp01FeDpUNXqg=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72573087/435727990/1443130511?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231031_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmJjYWY2OTctNGU3OC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ock-bEBbm_2LI_DDIA4YzvtZBXqGTbfp01FeDpUNXqg=)

clean_body: Walk through the GOP House of Horrors. But don’t worry — we’ll be by your side... | Team, Before you head to your costume party or go trick-or-treating, we want you to walk with us through the GOP House of Horrors. Don’t be scared! The team at Fight Like Hell PAC works hard every day to make sure the ghouls can’t get to you, and we’ll be by your side every step of the way. If you go through this door and to the right wing, you’ll encounter the first scary ghost. Meet Donald Trump. We’re sure you are very familiar with him, but in case you’re not, he’s the ringleader of the MAGA circus. Whether it’s appointing the conservative Supreme Court justices who helped overturn Roe v. Wade or his attempt to overturn the 2020 election, his plans for us make him our most dangerous ghoul! If you walk further down the hallway, you’ll run into the new Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson. MAGA Mike just arrived at our House of Horrors, but he is equally as dangerous as anyone else you’ll meet today. Mike was one of the leaders of the effort to overturn the 2020 election results, and he’s in favor of ripping away your reproductive freedom by enacting a national abortion ban, and even wants to ban same-sex marriage. Scary stuff! If you keep walking and open the door to the right, you’ll find the clown show known as the Michigan GOP led by MAGA Matt Hall. But don’t look long — you don’t want to scare yourself too much! Thanks to Gretchen Whitmer and Michigan Democrats, Michigan Republicans’ plans to ban abortion and restrict voting rights have been thwarted. But we have to be careful — they are always planning their return. If we don’t continue to Fight Like Hell against the ghouls from the GOP House of Horrors, their plans to pass total abortion bans, overturn elections, and rip away your benefits may come back to haunt us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for your support, and Happy Halloween! Team Fight Like Hell PAC Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

body:
Tina is going to do everything she can to turn out Democratic voters across the country — because with reproductive rights, voting rights, Social Security and Medicare, and so much more on the line, protecting our majority is crucial. |
#
Hi team — We’ll keep this brief — after all, it’s Halloween! Our October fundraising deadline is a few short hours away, and we’re just a little short of where we need to be. body:
| Let’s make one thing clear: **The GOP cannot be trusted to govern.** If the GOP’s good at one thing, _it’s embarrassing themselves._ Their inability to lead has brought us too close for comfort to a government shutdown. And while they’re squabbling amongst themselves, hardworking Americans are at risk of losing everything.

Let’s show Republicans that young people are sick and tired of their antics — and ready to vote them out.

| Hey — I just heard from my finance team & we are *so close* to our October goal!! It’s not an exaggeration to say that ALL our future success hinges on having the resources we need to execute a competitive campaign strategy. Hi Peter, thanks for opening this email. I know it’s late, but my team said we’re still facing a gap in our October fundraising budget so I wanted to reach out one last time. You know the stakes by now: Wisconsin will be one of the most competitive states this cycle, and megamillionaire Republican opponents could enter the race to defeat me any day now. The investments we make now will make all the difference come November 2024 in our fight to keep Wisconsin blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority. So I’m asking you one last time: Will you chip in any amount you can to help us reach this critical fundraising goal before midnight? | | Patriot,

---
Throughout October, the attacks against our movement _accelerated_ like never before.
---
The month began with me sitting in a courtroom, as Democrats attempted to invoke the “corporate death penalty” upon me and my family.

---
Then, a gag order was imposed upon me to restrict my First Amendment right to Free Speech in the middle of a presidential election.
---
Finally, the month is ending with a sham trial aimed at REMOVING my name from the ballot in 2024._
_
---
Tonight’s end-of-month fundraising deadline is not just a chance to ensure we have every dollar we need to win back the White House in 2024 and save our country from falling to the dark forces of tyranny.
---
It’s our chance to show Crooked Joe and the Democrats that their attempts to overrule the will of the American people completely and totally backfired.
---
**We need to post a monthly haul so massive that Crooked Joe will regret weaponizing the legal system to destroy our movement.**
---
_This is our way of sending a powerful (and peaceful!) message that the American people will NEVER SURRENDER our country to tyranny._
---
**So, I was checking to see who hasn’t donated yet before tonight’s end-of-month deadline – and as of the last time I checked the roster, I didn’t see your name.**
---
But please do __**NOT**__ get me wrong, Patriot...
---
... _I am certainly not trying to make you feel pressured into making a contribution._
---
If you can’t donate right now because of the sinister Crook in the White House who’d rather spend all day thinking about how he can JAIL his leading opponent than lift a single finger to help our _own_ citizens, then just hit the back button, and go about your day. _I mean it._
---
**I’m only reaching out, because I know that so many of our donors choose to wait until the final day of the month to help us reach our fundraising goal. In fact, it’s always our BIGGEST day of the month for that reason. People must see the clock ticking down to midnight and decide this is the moment to spring into action.**
---
_So, if that describes you, then now is your chance!_
---

It’s because of grassroots supporters like YOU that we’ve been able to consistently call out the Fake News media EVERY SINGLE TIME they try to spread misinformation or outright LIES about the important work President Trump is doing to SAVE AMERICA. Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we’re going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.

It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. If you'd like to change your subscription status [follow this link.](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_s=fad2171599cc4fd6b4d8ff2552c53a25&_t=dWJkGq5YL_vLT86tCtVhcEVpIrrHANXjDnN-npvdx-qoR-XMM5A591lA4pLZaIrgY4IXau1L0nxFlY6gNs7qNth7misLlsGc_rI0Ok_nNjo%3D)

[Privacy Policy](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=fad2171599cc4fd6b4d8ff2552c53a25&_e=naIK5BIU0imCxMI6UsYUtTFmWABiO4bKUgvvRICNk3X6h73F_stapWTmWwNGEpNQ5Gjsf9ia8nWduY4QaMQPNltFjFeA_5v0cPacwL6P2korXiYTVUF-xRThBsk7M_qQNWtNX4O1pnYlRgWkta1whKdRfPekCl9W56sfEk91YtShTONK-YTDsbINiuExOE0D9MjRc_w6ZEot0aWxxYDu09zF7OjkW2al8QXINdw3Dm9JBHivhbLZtzH7BUV_JMfrjqiRL7fvtCHOz55vkDFoC1TW4CRy55YxriJ-4OXB6eKKI0T4Q5MlUoKm7PrBMstntNWvWX9U3spEH0G9OPwKmB_rCP6iiGIwu90oS-wKiLI%3D)
clean_body: \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -| | | | | Patriot, Throughout October, the attacks against our movement accelerated like never before. The month began with me sitting in a courtroom, as Democrats attempted to invoke the “corporate death penalty” upon me and my family. Then, a gag order was imposed upon me to restrict my First Amendment right to Free Speech in the middle of a presidential election. Finally, the month is ending with a sham trial aimed at REMOVING my name from the ballot in 2024. Tonight’s end-of-month fundraising deadline is not just a chance to ensure we have every dollar we need to win back the White House in 2024 and save our country from falling to the dark forces of tyranny. It’s our chance to show Crooked Joe and the Democrats that their attempts to overrule the will of the American people completely and totally backfired. We need to post a monthly haul so massive that Crooked Joe will regret weaponizing the legal system to destroy our movement. This is our way of sending a powerful (and peaceful!) message that the American people will NEVER SURRENDER our country to tyranny. So, I was checking to see who hasn’t donated yet before tonight’s end-of-month deadline – and as of the last time I checked the roster, I didn’t see your name. But please do NOT get me wrong, Patriot... ... I am certainly not trying to make you feel pressured into making a contribution. If you can’t donate right now because of the sinister Crook in the White House who’d rather spend all day thinking about how he can JAIL his leading opponent than lift a single finger to help our own citizens, then just hit the back button, and go about your day. I mean it. I’m only reaching out, because I know that so many of our donors choose to wait until the final day of the month to help us reach our fundraising goal. In fact, it’s always our BIGGEST day of the month for that reason. People must see the clock ticking down to midnight and decide this is the moment to spring into action. So, if that describes you, then now is your chance! - | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

Peter– we’re just 3 hours out from our October end-of-month deadline, the first deadline of our final Quarter in 2024.
The fundraising numbers we report in the morning will tell the country just how successful we will be in 2024.
I hope I can count on you to step up in these final moments and carry us over the finish line.

Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. clean_body: | | | | We just have 3 hours left to set the tone | Peter– we’re just 3 hours out from our October end-of-month deadline, the first deadline of our final Quarter in 2024. The fundraising numbers we report in the morning will tell the country just how successful we will be in 2024. I hope I can count on you to step up in these final moments and carry us over the finish line. Use my personal link to support our goal: Mike Sent from Mike’s iPhone | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York! Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | \- =

clean_body: A proud Arizonan and lifelong Democrat, Conor O'Callaghan is running to represent Arizona's 1st Congressional District and unseat MAGA Republican David Schweikert. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hey, Peter. I’m about to head out to Halloween festivities with my three boys, but first I wanted to drop you a quick note. = | = The fact of the matter is that David Schweikert has to go. = Here are just a few examples of what’s on the line with Schweikert as your Congressman: ❌ Your job. He voted to shut down the government last month putting Arizona’s 32,510 federal employees at risk. ❌ Your vote. He tried to overturn the results of the 2020 election. ❌ Your bodily autonomy. He supports a total abortion ban and he voted to elect Mike Johnson as Speaker. ❌ Your Social Security. He blames the national debt on Social Security and Medicare and suggests seniors should delay their retirement. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Have a safe and happy Halloween, Conor | | | ---|---|--- = As a proud Arizonan and lifelong Democrat, Conor O'Callaghan is wholeheartedly committed to enshrining Roe v. Wade into law, safeguarding our communities against gun violence, addressing the urgent challenges posed by climate change and our water crisis, and ensuring our tax code is fair and equitable and works for small businesses and the middle class. subject: I just got back from taking my daughter trick-or-treating
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
My campaign is about creating and supporting communities where every Texan can thrive. | | I wanted to check one last time now that I'm home from taking my daughter trick-or-treating, Peter. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72573661/435739316/152918570?refcode=em23_231031_EOM7BT_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231031_EOM7BT_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=&refcode2=ad215f67-5278-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWQyMTVmNjctNTI3OC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0jcpBVUHZxfsWXj8sUIolBZ6pKdaGLpfLJqoDlUJw8I=) Going out into the streets with your family, meeting your neighbors, and exchanging the joy of the holiday. **Halloween has always stood out to me as a symbol of community.** And that's what I'm running to protect — our communities, our families, and the lives we live day by day.

Funding our school systems, fighting against climate change, passing common sense gun laws, and making healthcare more accessible — **my campaign is about creating and supporting communities where every Texan can thrive.** But to do this, I need your help.

**[We’re facing our end-of-month October fundraising deadline, and we’re not where we need to be to meet our $50,000 goal. With just a few hours to go, I hope you will consider chipping in $5, $10, or whatever you can afford>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72573664/435739319/152918570?refcode=em23_231031_EOM7BT_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231031_EOM7BT_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=&refcode2=ad215f67-5278-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWQyMTVmNjctNTI3OC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0jcpBVUHZxfsWXj8sUIolBZ6pKdaGLpfLJqoDlUJw8I=)**

Have a happy and safe Halloween!

\- Brian | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72573666/435739322/152918570?refcode=em23_231031_EOM7BT_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231031_EOM7BT_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=&refcode2=ad215f67-5278-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWQyMTVmNjctNTI3OC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0jcpBVUHZxfsWXj8sUIolBZ6pKdaGLpfLJqoDlUJw8I=)

clean_body: My campaign is about creating and supporting communities where every Texan can thrive. | | I wanted to check one last time now that I'm home from taking my daughter trick-or-treating, Peter. = Going out into the streets with your family, meeting your neighbors, and exchanging the joy of the holiday. Halloween has always stood out to me as a symbol of community. And that's what I'm running to protect — our communities, our families, and the lives we live day by day. Funding our school systems, fighting against climate change, passing common sense gun laws, and making healthcare more accessible — my campaign is about creating and supporting communities where every Texan can thrive. But to do this, I need your help. = Have a happy and safe Halloween! \- Brian | = | | Click to unsubscribe from our email list. name: Katie Porter
subject: Checking ActBlue between trick-or-treaters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
My family’s pumpkins are set out and Halloween candy is at the ready.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=32382%2E3422442%2EyQFO84)
Derek,
My family’s pumpkins are set out and Halloween candy is at the ready. But I’m still keeping a close eye on ActBlue, because we have $6,530 left to raise to hit our $30,000 end-of-October fundraising goal. [**Can you chip in right now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231031-2?refcode=EMAM23_2_TOT_20231031_V1_F&refcode2=32382_3422442_yQFO84&akid=32382%2E3422442%2EyQFO84)
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231031-2?refcode=EMAM23_2_TOT_20231031_V1_F&refcode2=32382_3422442_yQFO84&akid=32382%2E3422442%2EyQFO84)
Derek, I’m committed to running this race the right way—without a dime from federal lobbyists, corporate PACs, or Big Bank, Big Oil, or Big Pharma executives. That means these emails really are one of the main ways we fund our campaign. I’m so appreciative of whatever donation you can make.
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231031-2?refcode=EMAM23_2_TOT_20231031_V1_F&refcode2=32382_3422442_yQFO84&akid=32382%2E3422442%2EyQFO84)
Happy Halloween!
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAM23_2_TOT_20231031_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=32382_3422442_yQFO84&akid=32382%2E3422442%2EyQFO84)**

clean_body: My family’s pumpkins are set out and Halloween candy is at the ready. Derek, My family’s pumpkins are set out and Halloween candy is at the ready. But I’m still keeping a close eye on ActBlue, because we have $6,530 left to raise to hit our $30,000 end-of-October fundraising goal. Derek, I’m committed to running this race the right way—without a dime from federal lobbyists, corporate PACs, or Big Bank, Big Oil, or Big Pharma executives. That means these emails really are one of the main ways we fund our campaign. I’m so appreciative of whatever donation you can make. Happy Halloween! Katie Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

name: Josh
subject: Hey Peter, how are you?
body:
Hey Peter, it’s Josh.
Sorry to bug you on Halloween, but I need your help before the end-of-month deadline at midnight. We’re still falling $3,500 short of our goal.
**This is our first deadline since we learned my GOP opponent Kevin Lincoln raised more than any challenger I’ve faced while in office. And with a new Speaker of the House, this is our chance to prove that he and Republican Super PACs should keep their money out of this race. **
That’s why I’m counting on your support tonight. So, if you can send in $25 or whatever you can afford, I will be forever grateful. Here is the link: [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-Oct2023-FR-EOM**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72573920/435745268/1036386954?&refcode=E4778-20231031-EOM2-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODBhODMzMzUtNTU3OC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aLG_0Pe7-QNBRY5e4Y12obwKkLJEj0CzsBFlxr_dXB4=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Lee?=
subject: Here’s what I’m fighting for…
body:
Nevada will be one of the most important battleground states in the 2024 election cycle, and I am more than ready to be a part of the majority that... | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7d676768b42f/john-lee-mayor-who-rescued-north-las-vegas-announces-for-congress-12662120?e=91a702298f)
---
[](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=705872609d&e=91a702298f)
Friend,
Happy Nevada Day!
As I look back at the success of our state over the last 159 years, I feel a tremendous sense of gratitude for those who came before and established this beautiful place we call “Home”. Home will always mean Nevada!
Nevada’s statehood played a pivotal role in the re-election of President Abraham Lincoln in 1864. Nevada’s importance in national elections continues today. Nevada will once again be one of the most crucial battleground states in the 2024 election cycle.
I am more than ready to be a part of the majority that will get America back on track and keep the American Dream alive for generations to come. My experiences in business, job creation, and leading North Las Vegas as Mayor have prepared me for this race because my fights are your fights.
[](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=d04ec3120c&e=91a702298f)
| [FIGHT WITH JOHN FOR NEVADA AND AMERICA](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=284f938b22&e=91a702298f)
---
_I am fighting to get inflation under control and prices down for hardworking Nevada families._
_I am fighting for improvements in healthcare and medical innovation that allow for more choices and options._
_I am fighting for choice in education and increased standards in how schools across Nevada and America function._
_I am fighting to get gasoline and energy costs back down to what they once were.__And I am fighting to reduce out-of-control spending and reign in on big government in Washington._
If this is a platform that resonates with you, it would mean a lot to me if you could make the next step and financially support this campaign. [**If you feel compelled to donate, any and all amounts are deeply appreciated and very helpful.**](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=e410e4bf7b&e=91a702298f)
| [TAKE THE NEXT STEP: DONATE TO JOHN LEE FOR CONGRESS](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=aa29219f7a&e=91a702298f)
---

name: Zak
subject: Just a few more hours
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
Hey – in just a few hours, we are closing our books for October.

**We are short of our donor goal by about 100 donations.** [_So, for the last time this month, would you consider showing your support by chipping in a small donation?_](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2310-eom?amount=10?source=em231031-zm-90do&refcode2=555_8507_q2l7bA&akid=555%2E8507%2Eq2l7bA)

My campaign is fighting day and night to prove that New York needs a new generation of leadership; one built on a politics of hope instead of a politics of fear and lies.

If you want to move past George Santos and all the corrupt politicians who came before him, _**then now is the perfect time to act.**_

[_Please click here to send in your support and help us build our team as big as possible before our deadline at midnight tonight._](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2310-eom?amount=10?source=em231031-zm-90do&refcode2=555_8507_q2l7bA&akid=555%2E8507%2Eq2l7bA)

I cannot thank you enough for your help.

With gratitude,
Zak Malamed

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: Record-Breaking Illegal Immigration
body:
Peter,

The number of illegal crossings is hitting record highs, and 27,000 pounds of fentanyl were seized this year.

I'm working to impeach Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas and hold the administration accountable.

Your support will help me to push for immediate action on this crisis. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Record+Breaking+Illegal+Immigration+Email]

I just got back from door-knocking, Peter. My dog Jozi who loves to join me while I knock doors said to tell you hello!

I’m having great conversations at the doors, and it’s quickly turned into one of my favorite parts of the job. **But if I’m going to be able to keep buying more door-knocking literature, I need your support.**

I know I’ve reached out a lot over the past few days, but that’s because it really is critical that I meet this fundraising goal before EOD today. I promise you I won’t bother you again after this final pitch: I still need to raise $1,000 before midnight. **[Can you make a small donation of just $5 to help me reach that goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72574155/435748184/-377887102?amount=5&refcode=SBD_JR_EM_FR_103123_Doors_2_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWY4NGI5NzctNWE3OC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TjLx5fU4wC_om9Ye00pDNeOjyW6VCGsUQsg51Qj18Pc=)**

name: Last Chance (via DLCC.org)
subject: This is your last chance!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
This is the last time we’ll email you about our end-of-month deadline. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**This is the last email we’ll send you about our end-of-month deadline.** Thanks to the unwavering support of grassroots supporters like you over these last few days, we were able to close in on our fundraising gap, bringing us to 95% of our October fundraising goal. But here’s the thing:
* There are **TWO****HOURS** left before our end-of-month deadline.
* We still need to raise **$25,000** if we want to hit our goal.

body:
It’s crunch time. | I'll get straight to the point, Peter.

We've got one week left until Election Day, and October is coming to a close in a few hours. But here's the deal: we still need to raise at least $3,500 before midnight to give our campaign that final push it needs.

There’s no going back. If we don't meet our target tonight, our GOTV program will take a nosedive just when we need it the most. In a race this competitive, that could give Tate Reeves and his cronies the edge they need to claim victory.

This is an election of a lifetime, and I'm ready to rally every voter we can. But I need to know you’re with me right now.

Every dollar counts, so please don't let this opportunity slip away, Peter. Click here to donate before it's too late: [https://act.brandonpresley.com/refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72574309/435748804/-1047477319?refcode=ea.32c4058c-5e78-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.32c4058c-5e78-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzJjNDA1OGMtNWU3OC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5owBcOPZ0tvvG2bCevuzyFw06khD4Xi4WluBeot_A_Y=)

I can’t thank you enough.

\- Brandon Presley

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: My last note to you tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
I need anyone reading this to help us close out October strong.
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas.
I know my team and I have reached out a lot today about our October goal of raising 10,000 individual donations — **but now, we’re just a couple hours from our end-of-month deadline and only about a few dozen donations away from hitting our goal.**
I’m so grateful that I’ve always been able to count on supporters like you in times like these. But since most folks are probably busy tonight, I need anyone reading this to help us close the gap. So Peter:
**[Can you rush $10 or anything you can afford to our campaign before midnight tonight? Hitting this goal means we’ll have the resources to keep reaching voters with our message and standing up to the GOP insiders doing everything in their power to tear down our grassroots movement.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38821?refcode=em20231031-4099&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4099%2E614464%2ESQ5JQ9)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38822?refcode=em20231031-4099&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=4099%2E614464%2ESQ5JQ9) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38822?refcode=em20231031-4099&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=4099%2E614464%2ESQ5JQ9) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38822?refcode=em20231031-4099&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=4099%2E614464%2ESQ5JQ9) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38822?refcode=em20231031-4099&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=4099%2E614464%2ESQ5JQ9) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38822?refcode=em20231031-4099&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=4099%2E614464%2ESQ5JQ9) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38822?refcode=em20231031-4099&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=4099%2E614464%2ESQ5JQ9) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38821?refcode=em20231031-4099&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=4099%2E614464%2ESQ5JQ9)
---
When we stay on track with these monthly goals, our campaign has the ability to plan ahead for critical things like scaling up our campaign operation, opening field offices, hiring staff, putting ads on TV, and so much more.
**That’s why I’m counting on your support right now, Peter.** Whether you donate $10, $100, or even just $1 — your contribution is helping us build a winning grassroots campaign.
**[So please, can you help us close out October strong by rushing a donation of absolutely any amount before our midnight deadline? I don’t take a penny from corporate PACs or corrupt mega-donors, so I mean it when I say your support is the only way we’ll be able to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38821?refcode=em20231031-4099&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=4099%2E614464%2ESQ5JQ9)**
**[RUSH A DONATION NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38821?refcode=em20231031-4099&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=4099%2E614464%2ESQ5JQ9)**
Thanks for everything,
— Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20231031-4099-footer&t=11&refcode2=4099_614464_SQ5JQ9&akid=4099%2E614464%2ESQ5JQ9)**

But here’s some good news: A generous donor has stepped up and offered to double match all donations, turning every dollar you give into three, if we can raise $5k by midnight tonight. [] Don’t miss this chance. Chip in now to triple your impact and help us reach our goal. $25=$75 [] $50=$150 [] $250=$750 [] $500=$1500 [] Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office #momsforkatieporter DONATE [] [] [] [] Moms in Office 13351 Riverside Drive #265 Sherman Oaks, CA 91423 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE

subject: 🚀 Legacy PAC joins Team Elizabeth!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elizabeth for Nevada]( "Paid for by Elizabeth for Nevada")
body:
But can we count on you? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0212b5974607/legacy-pac-joins-team-elizabeth?e=54a81bd33c)
---
| | [ ](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=0e6c7b2d31&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| Dear Peter:
---
| | Exciting news! **Legacy PAC** , a renowned conservative PAC dedicated to nurturing and empowering the next generation of conservative leaders, has officially endorsed our campaign for Nevada's 3rd district!

Legacy PAC is committed to preserving the legacy of President Trump and promoting America First candidates. Their endorsement adds significant weight to our campaign, joining a stellar list of supporters including:

* [**Sheriff Richard Mack**](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=fa0c4c3ad3&e=54a81bd33c)
* [**Sheriff Joe Arpaio**](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=82742f37a7&e=54a81bd33c)
* [**Congressman Steve King**](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=5b85d768c4&e=54a81bd33c)
* [**Congressman Barry Goldwater Jr.**](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=55d8be4003&e=54a81bd33c)
* [**Congressman Paul Gosar**](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=2b7af5003e&e=54a81bd33c)
* [**Veterans for America First**](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=2876fd790c&e=54a81bd33c)

[See our full list of endorsements
HERE](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=593d1438fd&e=54a81bd33c)
Now Peter, [I have a heartfelt request. If our vision resonates with you, I encourage you to join Legacy PAC in officially supporting our campaign. ](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=de6872feb7&e=54a81bd33c)

[**Your endorsement**](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=8f26348857&e=54a81bd33c) will amplify our message and show that NV-03 is ready for genuine conservative leadership.
---
| [ENDORSE ELIZABETH](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=7ccfba6e8a&e=54a81bd33c "ENDORSE ELIZABETH")
---
| Your belief in our mission is the driving force behind our campaign.

For Freedom,
---
| [ ](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=8eb04c3819&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| **Elizabeth Helgelien**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, NV-3
[**ElizabethForNV.com**](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=a31391f18d&e=54a81bd33c)

**P.S**. I know you have been getting a lot of emails from me asking for money, but we need to keep the momentum going. The Establishment is scared after I raised more money than their handpicked candidate last quarter, but that means they will be working even harder to stop us. **[Any donation, even $17.76 could make the difference.](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=8a39bb1d6f&e=54a81bd33c)**

Peter – I know my team and I have been reaching out a lot this month. I promise this is the last email of the month so I hope you’ll read the whole thing.

The GOP’s dysfunction this month has been _one of the most politically irresponsible things_ I’ve seen my entire career in office. For weeks, House business was shuttered as the MAGA Party bickered about who to elect as House Speaker.

Then, when they finally elected a Speaker, they picked one of the most despicable far-right Members of their party. **Our new House Speaker Mike Johnson once wrote in favor of criminalizing homosexuality.**

Peter, as a gay man, it is so disheartening to see these views come to the forefront of US politics time and time again. Sometimes, it feels like we’ve made no progress at all.

But I know I can’t stop fighting._For the young gay kid still in the closet, for the woman scared to have an abortion, for the advocates fighting for a cleaner world_ – **we must keep fighting.**

**And I know I’m not alone, Peter.** Because everyday I see grassroots, everyday Americans fighting to push our country in the right direction: whether it’s chipping in a few bucks, voting, or speaking up against injustice.

So right now, I’m counting on this grassroots army.

[**Peter, can you chip in $3 to help me reach our critical October fundraising goal? clean_body: | = Peter – I know my team and I have been reaching out a lot this month. I promise this is the last email of the month so I hope you’ll read the whole thing. The GOP’s dysfunction this month has been one of the most politically irresponsible things I’ve seen my entire career in office. For weeks, House business was shuttered as the MAGA Party bickered about who to elect as House Speaker. Then, when they finally elected a Speaker, they picked one of the most despicable far-right Members of their party. Our new House Speaker Mike Johnson once wrote in favor of criminalizing homosexuality. Peter, as a gay man, it is so disheartening to see these views come to the forefront of US politics time and time again. Sometimes, it feels like we’ve made no progress at all. But I know I can’t stop fighting.For the young gay kid still in the closet, for the woman scared to have an abortion, for the advocates fighting for a cleaner world – we must keep fighting. And I know I’m not alone, Peter. Because everyday I see grassroots, everyday Americans fighting to push our country in the right direction: whether it’s chipping in a few bucks, voting, or speaking up against injustice. So right now, I’m counting on this grassroots army. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you for everything you do. Humbly, Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time.
