name: Team WisGOP
subject: 🎃 Spooky News: 4 More Years of Joe Biden?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-e-xmeid-didthutlhu-k/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xmeid-didthutlhu-r/)
### Friend,
### Happy Halloween! We're all prepared for a night of eerie costumes, jack-o'-lanterns, and haunted houses. But this year, there's something even spookier on the horizon - the possibility of four more years of Joe Biden in the White House!
### The past few years have been like a never-ending horror movie, from skyrocketing inflation to a border crisis that seems never-ending, it's been a parade of policies that send shivers down our spines.
### 👻 The Economy: Under Joe Biden, we've seen inflation rise to levels we haven't witnessed in decades. It's not ghosts haunting your wallet; it's his economic policies.
### 🎃 Immigration: The border crisis continues to haunt us, with illegal border crossings at alarming levels. Our national security is at stake, and it's a truly terrifying situation.
### 🧛♂️ Energy: Biden's energy policies have us dependent on foreign oil again, and it's sucking the life out of our energy independence. It's a scary proposition for our nation's security and economy.
### 😈 Foreign Relations: On the international stage, our allies are questioning our commitment, and our adversaries are emboldened. It's like a global thriller with no hero in sight.
[🎃 PITCH IN TO END THE NIGHTMARE 🎃](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xmeid-didthutlhu-y/)
### But there's hope on the horizon, just as the sun rises after a long night of frights. We can put an end to this spine-tingling nightmare by coming together and supporting Republican candidates who will fight for our conservative values, lower taxes, secure borders, and energy independence.
### [Will you join us in making sure that the scariest thing that happens this Halloween season is the realization that we allowed four more years of Joe Biden's policies to haunt our great nation?](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xmeid-didthutlhu-j/)
### Your support is the silver bullet we need to take down the monsters of runaway government spending, unchecked illegal immigration, and job-killing regulations. With your help, we can bring back the spirit of liberty and prosperity that has made America the land of opportunity for generations.
### Together, we can ensure that the scariest thing this Halloween is just a costume, not our nation's future.
### Wishing you a happy and safe Halloween!
### -Team WisGOP
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xmeid-didthutlhu-t/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xmeid-didthutlhu-i/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xmeid-didthutlhu-d/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xmeid-didthutlhu-h/) PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: censorship at its finest
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

Every year, every month, every week, and every day the outright censorship of pro-life voices gets worse.

I need to show you the kind of censorship I’m faced with right now – this time it’s a **_BILLBOARD COMPANY_!**

According to the billboard company we have tried to work with in the past, these pro-abortion billboards are allowed to be placed in Illinois – along one of the most traveled highways in America:

[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sjrdtld-duchtdja-y/)

Pro-Life Friend, the idea that God would somehow endorse abortion is an outrage!

So, let me show you what we wanted to put on our pro-life billboard in response:

[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sjrdtld-duchtdja-j/)

We tried to advertise this pro-life billboard and were told no – because _“These claims are misleading.”_

We even sent several statistics backing up our claim that _ABORTION HURTS_ women and their preborn babies...

But still a no.

_Somehow, our medical information and sources showing how abortion harms women wasn’t convincing enough, yet the abortion lobby convinced the billboard company that God likes abortions??_

It's become crystal clear that national billboard companies have joined with the Abortion Lobby’s pals in Big Tech to STOP pro-lifers from speaking the TRUTH about abortion!

**This is why _Students for Life's_ PRO-LIFE BILLBOARD TRUCK is crucial to spreading the pro-life message across the country, especially in a time when we’re being censored by pro-abortion forces like never before – and 2024 is right around the corner.**

I know I’ve asked you for a lot lately Pro-Life Friend, but we haven't raised the full $48,000 we need to finish our **PRO-LIFE BILLBOARD TRUCK** we’re having built.

With materials and labor, it’s going to cost right around $48,000. We’ve raised part of the funding for it, but not all!

**[That's why I hope you will help me send a message that pro-abortion politicians and their pals can't ignore by making a generous contribution to _Students for Life Action_ to help us outfit our PRO-LIFE BILLBOARD TRUCK](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sjrdtld-duchtdja-i/)!**

**With 2024 right around the corner – and Ohio’s and Virginia’s 2023 elections rapidly approaching – we need to finish the job FAST!**

[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sjrdtld-duchtdja-d/) Our **PRO-LIFE BILLBOARD TRUCK** is certain to catch the attention of the Abortion Lobby – not to mention the national media.

The simple fact is, if we cannot get our message out, we will lose.

That’s why the Abortion Lobby is going all-out to censor us.

**There’s no time to waste. Lives are at stake.**

**So, please agree to your most generous contribution right away!**

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, Students for Life Action

**[Donate to _Students for Life Action_ HERE <<](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sjrdtld-duchtdja-h/)**

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zuvvtld0qcfcoff924h4nfcveiqcr3npfldrkoo8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3j64o74cth2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z744avoh9qii8gl977qio60kkcn8pofip2872jug_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3j64o74cth2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhou2cjvk0f4rfbeds9q7gkiq4oget3nka8p2cqg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3j64o74cth2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

American Briefing

name: Candace Owens, BLEXIT
subject: I support law and order. Do you?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDM5NTkifQ/fKVC_ZdI88UVT8hj_19S_g)
---
Fellow American, **I am so grateful for our police officers. ** As an American who believes in law and order, truth, and justice, I have always stood with the public servants who protect our communities. **[Please join me in thanking uniformed men and women by signing our 'Back the Blue Petition' and letting brave officers know that we are grateful for their service and sacrifice.](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDM5NTkifQ/8H5WrUViEm22klDXfDYeCQ)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDM5NTkifQ/tHsm_cOlI9sKclYPZHS2QQ)
---
Unfortunately, a few years ago, radicals began propelling criminals into heroes overnight and campaigning to "_defund the police_." I refuse to accept that we must cater to the bottom denominator of our society and that the black community must fight and scream and demand support for the people in our community who are up to no good. That's one of the reasons I founded BLEXIT - an organization focused on shifting the culture in Black America as well as educating and uplifting minorities through educational programs and acts of community service. **Around the nation, our BLEXIT chapters have supported local officers, while so many others have turned their backs on those who serve our communities. ** **[To join these chapters and stand with police officers, please sign the national petition today.](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDM5NTkifQ/V-NGxTc_OHwJBsUNNJJBjA)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDM5NTkifQ/Y2Vd_JjKPXDqJxZ7CNYviA)
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDM5NTkifQ/N0FjRr9vBxDtydDuC-dMdQ)
---
_This summer, BLEXIT Maryland spent the day giving back to the Baltimore Police Department and learned some history about the city's police force._
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDM5NTkifQ/umOeX-l6eybi3NN65t9ffA)
---
_The first state chapter - BLEXIT North Carolina - paid a visit to local officers in July. Our State Director showered them with thank-you notes and delicious food as a token of BLEXIT's appreciation._
---
**[If you 'Back the Blue' - and believe that we must support local heroes - please sign the national petition right away.](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDM5NTkifQ/KvYhnUS6QJRVfe4nXiyX0A)** While the 'defund the police' crowd wants us to think minorities stand with them - polls show that the vast majority of black voters (more than 80%) want police funding to stay the same or even increase. We've been sold a lot of lies by anti-police radicals - those lies have been a detriment to Black American culture, the country as a whole, and the police officers who fight for justice every day. **We must stop the deception that is harming urban communities and demeaning police around the nation. ** If you are an American, no matter what color you are, you should want law and you should want order. That is the way forward. **[Join me in letting our police officers know that you support law and order, justice, and their valiant efforts to keep our communities safe.](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDM5NTkifQ/Wv9R7W22C6t1p0ETNbK0EA)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDM5NTkifQ/VUImU2oM3Ugi4SYVuM5F9w)
---
Candace OwensChair of BLEXITPowered by Turning Point USA
---
Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzA1LWM2NzJhM2FkY2FhZDQ2NDZiNTMzN2U1YjU4ZjM2MTI1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/XrvuH-a5a1RITv6XB4rlhw) to unsubscribe.
---
clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | Fellow American, I am so grateful for our police officers. As an American who believes in law and order, truth, and justice, I have always stood with the public servants who protect our communities. Unfortunately, a few years ago, radicals began propelling criminals into heroes overnight and campaigning to "defund the police." I refuse to accept that we must cater to the bottom denominator of our society and that the black community must fight and scream and demand support for the people in our community who are up to no good. That's one of the reasons I founded BLEXIT - an organization focused on shifting the culture in Black America as well as educating and uplifting minorities through educational programs and acts of community service. Around the nation, our BLEXIT chapters have supported local officers, while so many others have turned their backs on those who serve our communities. This summer, BLEXIT Maryland spent the day giving back to the Baltimore Police Department and learned some history about the city's police force. The first state chapter - BLEXIT North Carolina - paid a visit to local officers in July. Our State Director showered them with thank-you notes and delicious food as a token of BLEXIT's appreciation. While the 'defund the police' crowd wants us to think minorities stand with them - polls show that the vast majority of black voters (more than 80%) want police funding to stay the same or even increase. We've been sold a lot of lies by anti-police radicals - those lies have been a detriment to Black American culture, the country as a whole, and the police officers who fight for justice every day. We must stop the deception that is harming urban communities and demeaning police around the nation. If you are an American, no matter what color you are, you should want law and you should want order. That is the way forward. Candace OwensChair of BLEXITPowered by Turning Point USA Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4n8pkun8uau8kq9v7rubdq5ng18001308om1v70_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3gmcor2cjh2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zro8f61o6pqahf5l3l7is46e54999bnlh6dg4eqo_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3gmcor2cjh2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1hdi4htllv2nnd558fk0ijeovuii0feuvkpeelo_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3gmcor2cjh2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt2eqe42omrl4sm9sig0tfajnqvm6m91cd7ftfvo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni68o77c3jmcoh1k8gn48n24hhm9o70s5j66oj4s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn85nkmt5ot8m15046v1q5vod36kqa4tmbiiut3g_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3gmcor2cjh2bs)_

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: Imminent Threat
body:
Peter,

A record-breaking number of individuals on the Terrorist Watch List crossed the southern border this year. Our national security is at risk, and the current administration is doing nothing about it.

Help me fight.

DONATE NOW → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=first+button&utm_campaign=Imminent+Theat+Email]

Chip in $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or ANY AMOUNT. Your donation will aid me in fortifying our national security and tackling this alarming issue head-on. # WEDNESDAY, NOVEMBER 1, 2023

**Good morning!** On this date in 1938, champion thoroughbred Seabiscuit beat Triple Crown winner War Admiral in one of the greatest horseraces of the 20th Century. [Watch the race here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FugzAURb_G3oJ4z8aYwUPVio2oQ9WMyNgPcGXilDig_H1F56z3SufoXLq-syGG63S2C5k8pt66HDbqAU5wQtFL7s1IhCQ4GVCN1lKg1Hw2Y11rUkNjAQaolKqdJ7IOtVReIzgeDJYoAEoom0oKKOqKEJ0Ww1ApWVY1kyX5kNNa_KRwzTON8Zk2WguXFh7NnPPtzsQbw5Zhu-978UyP_Bjo-I_FZjcz0W5MfFy-v7D7PL__Th1fjb_tIcZwV4diWmyI_8j8MvAvAAD__wolUGM) If you haven't signed up for _The Flyover_ yet, you can take care of that [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFugzAQgOGnsbdEvjvbwOChUsRUunZEBg641uCIuKn69lXUsdk__cP_3vVdlCT78hY3DmXOfRyL3LkHOMEJqbd6CjMzMmkO4Ju6toS21muw5GlAqmbLMHvvTIQm8uC4YhgdGC0BDRKAAdM4S3CuHCOONQ2D89a4SlnDk5R8nD-y7GXlOf3kOx_nMW86hbWU603Ri8JWYfufKGy7uMj4Kvvnw1DLii7T9VtSkpt_5JctSvqz_qtsii7W6CM8N7o8HfAbAAD__2-SWl4). Don't forget to check out today's sponsor, [NativePath](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0MFqtEAMB_CniTdlkszMjoc5fCDCR9meSnuUUeM6xVXR6Za-fZnSYy8hIYH8-L9du2uIS1xvz-EuPk1bF4YUH9IhllgSd7oY_SRCwoV4tLVzmkm7YvY0ahQTej2wC1PtDNY6YF9frBFjnS2iJ0WMqFDVRjNWFyNEg-O-N1YrcwGtZIxpO6r3La5plmn52h5yVMN2LxY_p7SfwP-AWqB26qs1ZNoe0pwvgNpjzKXa5x24PeMI3FhtgOz-0QM3lJ8wkB0wT7-Y8qWd4nGmslYq7wi4eXr9n1sGborDj_tnXJZ42iy83UNcfkTpz3y-AwAA___n7l6T).

## FBI Warns of Terror Threats Against Americans
FBI Director Christopher Wray warned Congress Tuesday that the threat of a [terror attack against Americans](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1yqzAQxfGngU6MJL4LitvQ-bYpmUVamU0E8qx2rPjtM06d9pzmN_-P23YDinTd_8OJi4S0gRN64maMMsq2W1f7JSBabGtczDBPU9fabqqPZdZuDxOOXnfazyHA7npvhrEPxvrgbU2L1bY1Rhs9911rmrFHa93U7ns_dLofq06jJ0ncfCa65MAQX-mJ3Lh01nE5RB65av9Vdq3sWkppQvq-sOT3X9n1kSIJuVzZNeykPDE6SawKw0sV4CsrQebESg5GEAUnMjm4sipHiqiSHMgq4hOjgiDI6oATsqLM8J5EwH3VvPhHoRgpD2_x_QSKv0L5s9dPAAAA__-v9HCq) has risen to a "whole other level" due to the Mideast war. Wray said multiple foreign terrorist organizations have [called for attacks against Americans](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOpDAQBNCvgawRbhsGAoJLyObSC5GBNvTI4JHdjHX79Ss23rQqeVX_ntPTsudz-2sPGsSFyS7CH5qUAgWoJ1OugyNC0iUNqu27zmg0XbkPs3Yt9l2vOte5ep6xVzRrY9TSuMWuc8kD1qiVqlXdN0ar6tEQ4tLpeW5aUzePwtS0soRYvQKfspPz_8OHYrWEo_TDLvJOhf5T4FjgmHOuIl1CMd39nYTo1wLHKxU47lYIJGQbV3hR5rRDkmulUxK44H3IfG6w2S8LSzid50XAXXRPB3sKJzpYOB1wJbjZoGrQqsCxjMP6zuw9p_YWb4dl_yOUX__6DgAA__-bkG2y) and the West. He compared the threat level to that presented by ISIS years ago. Meanwhile, a Senate hearing on military aid for Israel and Ukraine was [disrupted by shouting protestors](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL8Gb0TmgNgZGLp4S9eO1tmc46sIWHBNlL-v0rnzG97T-7rOV-TE-faJdwqylRlX4QfNxmijwc6ui2EjArIdBXO-jKOz4MZuDyvB0OPoI0Y7bAv5caEISB5cxGFYOg7QgzWmN_3FO2tOgyeAdbTL4s-u94NyPUWWUk_fhbPstKVXeVA9reXepbCLHE3ZDwWTgkl22jmlN1MwHSXx-lIwRdooN1IwORg9GKcxC-snVn3UItSk1KYrHYRCMb00Z6Fafw7RjTIK6Z2wcr7pkjW3ipQUTF0N8XhyStzO78zbHflP3cm_k34DAAD__wdIaoY), some with red-stained hands, calling for a ceasefire in the Mideast as police dragged them out one by one.
## Supreme Court Weighs Social Media Rights
The Supreme Court heard arguments Tuesday on two cases weighing whether public officials [can block their critics on social media](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0D1vhSAUxvFPoxsGDr4ODl3cbteOBvGgp0UggJf02ze3Y9PxybP88v94rA9Fltzxri6cs_Gr0pmeuArBBAO5tvU-G0RAWeMs-mkcWwntWJ-z4r00Sg8T3_sNxW64khMfNbTDOCHwmmbgIIXggk9dK0UzdAigR7ltXd_ybqhajjtlH5tPTy6faOy3f2JstL9qO585h1TJtwqWCpZSSuM27bCk11_BErylTDpVsKQ7RLyQaX_H_HezgnSciZUT84mRhXuzpJk3hjQpm5hWjqUbd7ZZr7_IHSygDxZZ1E4JgKHv6jjvoZC1lPqX-7gU2V9n_rfaTwAAAP__TJtw4A). Both involve local government officials, but President Trump's blocking of critics on Twitter looms over the case. The cases turn on the issue of whether the posts of public officials constitute part of their governmental function. It's often ambiguous, and the Court's decision will define where the lines will be drawn. The plaintiffs in the two cases are [the reverse of each other.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFztCAQgOFfo906sOCpBcXX2N3XpnQQlrtN8HAAz8m_z5g69ds8837cl7vlyK_Hf7uRqSEt1lV-0yIlSEC16NabQISkWjLyNo2jVqjH9mnGabJCWj2MSjskYcMwyLAqoZ0frcCWDQpUUgoppl4r2Q09IbpRrWt_06IfGi3Ic025-0z8qk8K8Tu9KXcubW00z1r30qh_Dc4Nzud5dpmOSrlcvcE50sPGBuejQDn2TBuBS0eu4MmxJ-AA-7FGdpBCYMc2FnD2BWtM7gtc5squQElXgY08W7jAIAUo2eDcZuP3k2Pkcrusj81y_LXVP0_9BAAA__8acGn8) In one, school board trustees are appealing a decision in favor of parents they blocked. In the other, a Michigan man is appealing a decision allowing a city official to block him on Facebook.
## First 'Florida Man Games' Ready to Go Low
The world's first ["Florida Man Games"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2OrDAUg58mdEHJSSBQpLgN3dx2SxTghDmr_CCSGTRvv2LrbSwXlm19X4_54ShQ2v-7iLb6PLu10htnKbnkoGbdbNYjAqoGrezHYdAK9NA8LZgVhFykMqMxCvoVoXNLr5cO_OYHbMiCACWlkGLstJKt6RBgHdSydL0WnWFa4EY1n-13plSf6MMnv_Fs1xybYJ-1HoWpfwwmBtN1XW1ZkquU0x1gMN31DCYpbm9uUaPSRowMJh_ySZvj0SW-u4iFl8rda3-VSgl5Dp940Fqa027HRSFQ6e8_e3QUfvfrnzR-AgAA__9cjl3d) is looking for teams to compete in five trashy sports events capturing the spirit of the mythical "Florida Man" always caught by police doing something outrageous. The events include a Weaponized Pool Noodle Mud Duel, an "Evading Arrest" Obstacle Course, a Category 5 Cash Grab in high winds, and a Beer Belly Florida Sumo match. [The fifth event is too hard to describe; you can read it here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz79ugzAQgPGnwVuQz_-AwUMXtnTtiM7mgKtsHIEV1Levkjn7p5_0_dynO3Liff3GTL4uZcJY-UkTwA1uSk9GzH4hUqQFeXBD3xutTC8276hD4xwtPVoZA8JguhCDs9IBBB0FeyWVBpAgB2s0tJ0lpWKvQ7DOSNs1RtLMtRztb-G9brSkv_Kko40li-S3Wh9no78aNTZqvK6rfSfl4Bkz7itmOl9po0Zx-PlxcUp8uhe7ZuT0ZurHqf8AAAD__4wpTWI) The games are set to take place Feb. 24 in St. Augustine, and tickets range from $45 to $145. If, by some odd life choice, you'd like to join in, you'll need a team of five participants. [You can sign up here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FugzAQgOGnwVuQfWdjGDx0YUvXjuiAA66ycQRuUN--Subuvz7p_7oPd5Io-_pJiUNZ8kBTkScPxtzMDXCwag4LMzAqDqbp2tYi2FZtwTvsrGfGscPJ6ZYaD9q7ZkbQROSVBNCAxmijO2fR1N4xwNTiOLrGaucrq3mWko_6O8teNl7ib37yUU85qRi2Uh5nhR8V9BX013XV7yQfMlOifaXE5yutoKcx_5SbVUeYH5fEKGfz0tdEEt9a-fftLwAA__831U8o)

Supreme Court Weighs Social Media Rights The Supreme Court heard arguments Tuesday on two cases weighing whether public officials . Both involve local government officials, but President Trump's blocking of critics on Twitter looms over the case. The cases turn on the issue of whether the posts of public officials constitute part of their governmental function. It's often ambiguous, and the Court's decision will define where the lines will be drawn. The plaintiffs in the two cases are In one, school board trustees are appealing a decision in favor of parents they blocked. In the other, a Michigan man is appealing a decision allowing a city official to block him on Facebook. body:
It's nearly election season.

| [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bef9da31d5a9401dbcdadf4ab5572f3e&_e=x-Bs7XjJ_B3780PsdlxJeTunRtVSc4ErNXcCZUxo7HKmGOMR3Y_qFENWMYn_2GV1wN60tulX4TxUMiXU0pVo4DWq4DvWw9ZF2n8EmFYbDflSbjV90qeAWnjfoJBi5gbu-_lKoNWbFKxC0J6PE2Scz_7DqEQj0efehbtX1YysE7h7sDgzXghpKc3BnFTymfb-eShtg-kW7MX-_UlB6UbPTd9TFhc70DC04nL0W6SHCJItxt3cPaFSjTTjyK6BAFXDg3puV1fyMUWE5G7jE1TASsFjx6qRlrSxHLUdAPicS7HMBBinTN5OSZUmiPqE56OvQnP4DsnFZmF6kGh7pTcUIuvwhE5X-z12gTGg1OzDunbSu9LYtHEisxI6oy_-qVKAj0oIicuL7URfN0RzWSRnefUhdPPHVWdGdIU8j2HJAj0%3D)

Fellow American,

It's nearly election season. We hear promises from both sides of the aisle and commitments made to causes the American people rarely agree on.

Surprisingly, however, 7 in 10 Americans agree on this one thing:

**Across our nation, unborn babies should be protected by at least the point when they can feel pain. The latest science proves that unborn babies can feel pain by as early as 15 weeks.**

72% of voters agree on this issue but the American people are still being bombarded with lies and misinformation from Big Abortion and its allies. These "pro-choice" organizations are committed to using misleading information to manipulate women and destroy innocent children for their own gain in this billion-dollar industry.

In their own materials, Planned Parenthood states abortion is "one of the safest medical procedures performed in the United States" and "abortion has over a 99 percent safety record."

But how can this be true when a child's life is snatched from its mother's womb because it's purposefully put to death? Who is telling the American people the truth here?

_**What do you think about this?**_

[My team and I would love to know your opinion about abortion in America.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bef9da31d5a9401dbcdadf4ab5572f3e&_e=x-Bs7XjJ_B3780PsdlxJeTunRtVSc4ErNXcCZUxo7HKmGOMR3Y_qFENWMYn_2GV1wN60tulX4TxUMiXU0pVo4DWq4DvWw9ZF2n8EmFYbDflSbjV90qeAWnjfoJBi5gbu-_lKoNWbFKxC0J6PE2Scz_7DqEQj0efehbtX1YysE7h7sDgzXghpKc3BnFTymfb-eShtg-kW7MX-_UlB6UbPTd9TFhc70DC04nL0W6SHCJItxt3cPaFSjTTjyK6BAFXDHDiPDjldiRqiyvBOjl456id8IdhKmR0O-giznFJbSt9sLrN5pZ_quix77FHmV_XRFaTIwXm_fez0f18YVFvBA-IB4sn33BYFtDUL9y1kWRuw8hdd-FaZP66wslepyEcZ3UYAT92W249EF6zYJFQQNZjonh4L3XmIHhqvQ1qxAGM%3D) We want to know your answers to questions like these:

Do you believe life begins at conception?

Do you believe abortion is harmful to women?

Do you believe that unborn babies have a right to life?

We want to hear what the American people think and invite you to take our [**Abortion in America Survey**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bef9da31d5a9401dbcdadf4ab5572f3e&_e=x-Bs7XjJ_B3780PsdlxJeTunRtVSc4ErNXcCZUxo7HKmGOMR3Y_qFENWMYn_2GV1wN60tulX4TxUMiXU0pVo4DWq4DvWw9ZF2n8EmFYbDflSbjV90qeAWnjfoJBi5gbu-_lKoNWbFKxC0J6PE2Scz_7DqEQj0efehbtX1YysE7h7sDgzXghpKc3BnFTymfb-eShtg-kW7MX-_UlB6UbPTd9TFhc70DC04nL0W6SHCJItxt3cPaFSjTTjyK6BAFXDrkczOaC3MvNt789g8INcreXS1fFMXVjtbjeJhJhIsp53vNM-5UoHm9P4UfG4Opfbdyff7qP9IaZ1qrftAE7xt8ek7Gsktaoc5lZei5DJ5sm7wMwev_6hiCCsXPTg-zq_QdPvbUiMg8owPtzPTyPbi_kL_qPF4O8_HerhGDSHFLw%3D) so we know where you stand.

Take the survey today and let us know if the majority of Americans are being lied to by a deadly industry. Help us find the truth by taking the survey today at the link below. We really want to get 10,000 responses from people just like you!

[https://action.sbaprolife.org/abortion-in-america](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bef9da31d5a9401dbcdadf4ab5572f3e&_e=x-Bs7XjJ_B3780PsdlxJeTunRtVSc4ErNXcCZUxo7HKmGOMR3Y_qFENWMYn_2GV1wN60tulX4TxUMiXU0pVo4DWq4DvWw9ZF2n8EmFYbDflSbjV90qeAWnjfoJBi5gbu-_lKoNWbFKxC0J6PE2Scz_7DqEQj0efehbtX1YysE7h7sDgzXghpKc3BnFTymfb-eShtg-kW7MX-_UlB6UbPTd9TFhc70DC04nL0W6SHCJItxt3cPaFSjTTjyK6BAFXDjtRDhEP_tEN5viE_GY7SPkg73RJajUnmcf69NgPvkAYHGV0OKeOZa4ovsquwgKBcSa-zb2Ly_s2pTn86MqtA0SHWDN2NPfk5KQI2OuKK87b8ImygcHPhoRimLnSEY74OGfBBL1jxybqT0kMqRu3_TWC6a1gmQYYJMoXz1UmMLs4%3D)

subject: Sebastian Gorka Event
body:
A Formal Reception Featuring Dr. Sebastian Gorka – Friday, November 3 in Costa Mesa Don't miss this event! Come hang out with me and other patriots!

## A Formal Reception Featuring Dr. Sebastian Gorka – Friday, November 3 in Costa Mesa
---
|
---
Don't miss this event! Come hang out with me and other patriots!
Give me Liberty or Give me death!
Derrick Gates
|
---
# **Reception Featuring Dr. Sebastian Gorka – Friday, November 3 in Costa Mesa**
Dr. Sebastian Gorka
In 2008 Gorka moved to America with his family where he became a proud American citizen in 2012. He obtained his doctorate in Political Science from Corvinus University in Budapest and was a fellow at Harvard’s Kennedy School of Government. In Washington, he served as Associate Dean for Congressional Affairs and Relations to the Special Operations Community at National Defense University and has also taught on the Masters program at Georgetown University.
In 2020, President Donald Trump named Gorka to the National Security Education Board. This board provides strategic consultation and was established by congressional act in 1991.
Dr. Gorka has briefed the CIA, the DIA, the US Navy Seals, the Commandant of the Marine Corps, served as an expert for the DoJ during the Boston Bombing trial, and testified before Congress on the threat of Global Jihadism. He remains a guest instructor at the John F. Kennedy Special Warfare Center and School, at Fort Bragg, the home of the Green Berets.
Gorka writes for The Hill and has written two books for Regnery Publishing. His first “Defeating Jihad,” was a national best-seller and his latest, released in October, is called “Why We Fight...Defeating America’s Enemies with No Apologies.” Before launching his SALEM show, “AMERICA FIRST with Sebastian Gorka,” he was an advisor to candidate Donald J. Trump and served on the staff of the White House in 2017 as Deputy Assistant to the President for Strategy. Visit www.sebgorka.com for more information about Dr. Gorka.
---
©2023 www.officialderrickgates.com | Rancho Palos Verdes

name: Tim Holbert, American Veterans Center
subject: Will you buy a meal for a WWII hero?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
Fellow American, You've likely never been asked this before...
---
[](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
**[Fellow American, would you like to buy a beer for a World War II hero?](http://trk.readactnews.)** This year, the American Veterans Center is expecting our LARGEST gathering of World War II heroes for our Annual Veterans Conference in nearly 20 years. The Gary Sinise Foundation is generously covering our WWII heroes' lodging ... American Airlines is providing our WWII veterans' flights ... and I invite you, Fellow American, to chip in a round for the living legends of the Greatest Generation. **[Your gift generous gift today could provide:](http://trk.readactnews.-YhgA)**
---
[$10 -- Beer for a WWII veteran](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
[$25 -- Breakfast for a WWII veteran](http://trk.readactnews.-FH0mAA1VIrJeEDQQ)
---
[$50 -- Dinner for a WWII veteran](http://trk.readactnews.-1DNfuTFCpQ)
---
[$100 -- Meals for a WWII veteran for one day](http://trk.readactnews._2hma1XfKT8otJXhg)
---
[$300 -- Meals for a WWII veteran for the Conference](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
[Support a WWII hero with ANY amount](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
[](http://trk.readactnews._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UkFOTzQzOTYyIn0/ru7by7od970VXHad04UjNw)
---
For more than 25 years, AVC's Annual Veterans Conference has been a monumental experience for every generation of America's heroes. **But I'm sure you can understand why the Annual Veterans Conference means so much to our World War II heroes in particular this year.** At the Conference, they will have the opportunity to reconnect with their brothers- and sisters-in-arms, share their stories, and impart powerful lessons learned from serving our country to the young people and military academy and ROTC students in attendance. (_Imagine being a 22-year-old student in 2023 and having the honor to spend a weekend surrounded by dozens of legends from World War II - an experience they will never forget!_) Veterans will be able to record a Hollywood-studio-quality interview about their World War II service -- and past interviews have been seen on PBS and Netflix, in museums across the country, and watched 100 MILLION times on the AVC's YouTube channel. _But perhaps most important, these World War II veterans will see firsthand how their service and sacrifice are still being honored by a grateful nation 80 years later._ **[Fellow American, if you can't join us in-person for AVC's Annual Veterans Conference, I hope you'll consider a generous gift to support our World War II heroes this year.](http://trk.readactnews._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UkFOTzQzOTYyIn0/gP9OFhAdCPdznHEPVeaffw)**
---
[$10 -- Beer for a WWII veteran](http://trk.readactnews._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UkFOTzQzOTYyJmFtb3VudD0xMCJ9/cA3kp0uHbCP1vyMPSl38gg)
---
[$25 -- Breakfast for a WWII veteran](http://trk.readactnews._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UkFOTzQzOTYyJmFtb3VudD0yNSJ9/36PvMY54iOhCMxkFTf1eJg)
---
[$50 -- Dinner for a WWII veteran](http://trk.readactnews._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UkFOTzQzOTYyJmFtb3VudD01MCJ9/dF8AMAorHzYsawC2Jx0mjA)
---
[$100 -- Meals for a WWII veteran for one day](http://trk.readactnews._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UkFOTzQzOTYyJmFtb3VudD0xMDAifQ/0Qck5mP_HUXqgvg7Fdw7mA)
---
[$300 -- Meals for a WWII veteran for the Conference](http://trk.readactnews._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UkFOTzQzOTYyJmFtb3VudD0zMDAifQ/6HPq0fuSkVjr2H2gGgn8ow)
---
[Support a WWII hero with ANY amount](http://trk.readactnews._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UkFOTzQzOTYyIn0/MwjZk8pRtO9gcA75q1veQA)
---
Your contribution to this special mission doesn't just make a difference -- it truly makes history. Thank you for your support of America's World War II heroes for this year's special event. Tim HolbertPresidentAmerican Veterans Center
---
[Support a WWII hero at AVC's Annual Veterans Conference](http://trk.readactnews._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9UkFOTzQzOTYyIn0/DrnZkLiyHJh-9uH1SGY_3w)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

Peter,The scariest thing we're facing is not just the ghosts and ghouls that come out at night on Halloween. It's the frightening reality of the Joe Biden and Jared Golden's failed policies that have cast a dark shadow over our nation! **The Border Crisis** The chaos at our southern border is a chilling reminder of how these policies can lead to a nightmare scenario for our nation. We've witnessed an unprecedented surge in illegal border crossings, straining our limited resources and putting our nation at risk. **Failed Drug Policies & Record Homelessness** Despite promises to address the opioid crisis and drug-related issues, Democrats' policies have done little to combat the problems plaguing our communities as more and more people die each year from overdoses. **Inflation Fear** Inflation is haunting the pockets of hardworking Mainers every day while politicians like Joe Biden and Jared Golden call for more reckless spending. Peter, as we fill our candy bowls for Halloween, let's remember that we need fiscal responsibility to keep the cost of living from becoming a real nightmare.This Halloween, we're not asking for candy; we're only asking for your financial support so Mike can defeat Jared Golden. **_Tonight, at midnight, we face a big End of Month fundraising deadline and our team needs your help._** [<< $25 MIDNIGHT DONATION >>](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xmjrld-ddldgdkhd-r/) [<< $50 MIDNIGHT DONATION >>](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xmjrld-ddldgdkhd-y/) [<< $100 MIDNIGHT DONATION >>](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xmjrld-ddldgdkhd-i/) [<< $250 MIDNIGHT DONATION >>](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xmjrld-ddldgdkhd-d/) [<< $500 MIDNIGHT DONATION >>](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xmjrld-ddldgdkhd-h/) [<< $1,000 MIDNIGHT DONATION >>](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xmjrld-ddldgdkhd-k/) [<< $2,000 MIDNIGHT DONATION >>](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xmjrld-ddldgdkhd-u/) Don't let the specter of failed policies continue to haunt our country.[**_Join us in this critical fight for a brighter and more prosperous future for all Mainers, by making your contribution before midnight tonight._**](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xmjrld-ddldgdkhd-o/) Stay safe,Mike Soboleski for Congress | | **Mike Soboleski for Congress** PO Box 603Augusta, ME 04332 **Mike Soboleski** is a born and raised Mainer and a lifelong conservative with Maine values. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Help us get 10,000 responses to these questions!
body:
It's nearly election season.

| [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a7983bf1e9e14d1ebc429cb2d2dd5e97&_e=ZnhiyAbIr5_5O5extgsXElBvju5kbt6_GLE8p7PgxRqbUolwcTFXOjstxDolK5ryXryZ6jSZF4AjitMaP_7aVANeho_SQDuAEUnBzjdiGcVjJ6mJ7WsSSxLoNX7WM4MXhsCsP8w8Pn4JXW2BeXNh8bkdVYAfUNwoo5-YCZykLYayOuj_XA4IFuwtysSeBwJeBww1Pb2Rm_WHfKvEyQ9XYw1V0vI7v0_qpEU7AyE0XkrWLaX5sqGZa8TcUXaJRbQtfS75lyha5qwui1aATVzCsV3bK2YD0JBekf72yCG_H-tSV_nctJuSDlXiEy1WNpooBb57OGBDPyvbLfL2bLTDlX9n0smWjaTPYs-G4mOPgUxQTNWzCTVgTdDf-RoBvV5g08t0IaLOmOktrgAMz4uc1ryFiwK70-uppxpw917fHkQ%3D)
---
Fellow American,

It's nearly election season. We hear promises from both sides of the aisle and commitments made to causes the American people rarely agree on.

Surprisingly, however, 7 in 10 Americans agree on this one thing:

**Across our nation, unborn babies should be protected by at least the point when they can feel pain. The latest science proves that unborn babies can feel pain by as early as 15 weeks.**

72% of voters agree on this issue but the American people are still being bombarded with lies and misinformation from Big Abortion and its allies. These "pro-choice" organizations are committed to using misleading information to manipulate women and destroy innocent children for their own gain in this billion-dollar industry.

In their own materials, Planned Parenthood states abortion is "one of the safest medical procedures performed in the United States" and "abortion has over a 99 percent safety record."

But how can this be true when a child's life is snatched from its mother's womb because it's purposefully put to death? Who is telling the American people the truth here?

_**What do you think about this?**_

[My team and I would love to know your opinion about abortion in America.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a7983bf1e9e14d1ebc429cb2d2dd5e97&_e=ZnhiyAbIr5_5O5extgsXElBvju5kbt6_GLE8p7PgxRqbUolwcTFXOjstxDolK5ryXryZ6jSZF4AjitMaP_7aVANeho_SQDuAEUnBzjdiGcVjJ6mJ7WsSSxLoNX7WM4MXhsCsP8w8Pn4JXW2BeXNh8bkdVYAfUNwoo5-YCZykLYayOuj_XA4IFuwtysSeBwJeBww1Pb2Rm_WHfKvEyQ9XYw1V0vI7v0_qpEU7AyE0XkrWLaX5sqGZa8TcUXaJRbQtK6PMno-PuikndZBma6l1nN670BpFtvzDQ9yIGfT3S4dAViIGVWq5Km_4N1cXS6WJogVOYpQN2oHHTUCRxf3fzsKQSvjM0vptQCefaIJm7qtq971m1hanzSvRdDcOO0FgmVtfnj-AqCT4qcFuQ045xT-ZfTDRh61GUH08nDb605w%3D) We want to know your answers to questions like these:

Do you believe life begins at conception?

Do you believe abortion is harmful to women?

Do you believe that unborn babies have a right to life?

We want to hear what the American people think and invite you to take our [**Abortion in America Survey**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a7983bf1e9e14d1ebc429cb2d2dd5e97&_e=ZnhiyAbIr5_5O5extgsXElBvju5kbt6_GLE8p7PgxRqbUolwcTFXOjstxDolK5ryXryZ6jSZF4AjitMaP_7aVANeho_SQDuAEUnBzjdiGcVjJ6mJ7WsSSxLoNX7WM4MXhsCsP8w8Pn4JXW2BeXNh8bkdVYAfUNwoo5-YCZykLYayOuj_XA4IFuwtysSeBwJeBww1Pb2Rm_WHfKvEyQ9XYw1V0vI7v0_qpEU7AyE0XkrWLaX5sqGZa8TcUXaJRbQt5DjZ_uIFUYg-qpDRZ6o5QJeGubgkgmpzFOu28IO98eLDu5pt3jLb9zcelCptIfnqld2UDYL436ir3ldNyyT2_wmP9EH4EG9uCt_wtmBAI1_eTS_iOT5Bppk_Oj2KI6MnG36LozDiXY2Nqve-a6f0qnqx3EU0AgxCCUQ3yTTpxz0%3D) so we know where you stand.

clean_body: It's nearly election season. | Fellow American, It's nearly election season. We hear promises from both sides of the aisle and commitments made to causes the American people rarely agree on. Surprisingly, however, 7 in 10 Americans agree on this one thing: Across our nation, unborn babies should be protected by at least the point when they can feel pain. The latest science proves that unborn babies can feel pain by as early as 15 weeks. 72% of voters agree on this issue but the American people are still being bombarded with lies and misinformation from Big Abortion and its allies. These "pro-choice" organizations are committed to using misleading information to manipulate women and destroy innocent children for their own gain in this billion-dollar industry. In their own materials, Planned Parenthood states abortion is "one of the safest medical procedures performed in the United States" and "abortion has over a 99 percent safety record." But how can this be true when a child's life is snatched from its mother's womb because it's purposefully put to death? Who is telling the American people the truth here? What do you think about this? We want to know your answers to questions like these: Do you believe life begins at conception? Do you believe abortion is harmful to women? Do you believe that unborn babies have a right to life? We want to hear what the American people think and invite you to take our so we know where you stand. Take the survey today and let us know if the majority of Americans are being lied to by a deadly industry. Help us find the truth by taking the survey today at the link below. We really want to get 10,000 responses from people just like you! For LIFE, Marjorie Dannenfelser President, SBA Pro-Life America Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr. PO Box 803 Arlington, VA, 22206 Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Greedy company vs. Critical wildlife habitat
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2089696?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **STOP FRACKING IN CRITICAL WILDLIFE HABITAT: 11,000+ acres of Wyoming public lands are about to be leased to the highest fossil fuel bidder.** [_**Tell the Department of Interior it CANCEL the sale before the November 15th comment deadline!**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2089697?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) Picture this: the iconic fluffy tail feathers of the Greater sage-grouse, an iconic bird of the American west. It struts across the peaceful morning plains, until – it’s interrupted by the **_screech of metal!_** The _**ground shakes!**_ The poor birds _**scatter in fear!**_ This is the result of fracking in public lands. The Department of Interior is poised to lease public lands in Wyoming – **and every single one of the parcels are in sage-grouse habitat!** Your comment to cancel this lease sale will help SAVE wildlife and protect the nearby communities that fracking would pollute. [_**Sign the petition to STOP selling more than 11,000 acres of Wyoming public lands to greedy fossil fuel companies!**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2089698?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ***Your Signature is Missing, Friend*** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2089699?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Wyoming communities near these public lands could face increased pollution if the sale moves forward. In fact, fracking wastewater can **contaminate local waterways and drinking water,** **_including with radioactive materials!_**
That’s not all. Fracking is even known to **trigger earthquakes!** The process involves blasting high-pressure water and sand into the ground which creates cracks and destabilizes the Earth. Our public lands are full of stunning beauty – fracking could destroy it! [_**Please, Friend, will you help STOP fracking from greedy polluters on our public lands?**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2089700?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2089701?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Nicole Ghio
Fossil Fuels Program Manager,
Friends of the Earth **
|

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...

Senate Passes Joni Ernst Amendment Cracking Down On Federal Employees
Abusing Telework

The U.S. Senate passed an amendment by Republican Sen. Joni Ernst of
Iowa Tuesday to address abuses of telework by federal government
employees, particularly within the Department of Veterans Affairs
(VA). Ernst previously called out abuses of telework, citing a media
report of a VA employee who attended a staff meeting while taking a
bubble bath.

Wisconsin Gov Sues After Lawmakers Block University Pay Raises Over
DEI Policies

The Democratic governor of Wisconsin announced he is suing the
Republican-controlled legislature, alleging they are violating the
state’s constitution, according to a statement. The Republican
legislature of Wisconsin withheld pay raises Oct. 17 for employees of
the University of Wisconsin System (UW) over its diversity, equity and
inclusion (DEI) funding, estimated at $32 million.

body:
And DAVID BLACKMON: A Reckoning Is Coming For The Failing Energy Transition

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672734%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nEwuNSFASyDi%2f4m%2flck67w&sysid=1 Senate Passes Joni Ernst Amendment Cracking Down On Federal Employees Abusing Telework

The U.S. Senate passed an amendment by Republican Sen. Joni Ernst of Iowa Tuesday to address abuses of telework by federal government employees, particularly within the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA). Ernst previously called out abuses of telework, citing a media report of a VA employee who attended a staff meeting while taking a bubble bath.

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672734%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nEwuNSFASyDi%2f4m%2flck67w&sysid=1

The U.S. Senate passed an amendment by Republican Sen. Joni Ernst of Iowa Tuesday to address abuses of telework by federal government employees, particularly within the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA). Ernst previously called out abuses of telework, citing a media report of a VA employee who attended a staff meeting while taking a bubble bath.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The Truth about America’s Christian heritage
body:
Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze4v4b82da8u2i071gcdg6kcmjccsmjka0v3pu0o_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3im6oj1chh2bs)
---
Hello, Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

I’ve written a book whose title boldly declares what I know to be true: _America Is a Christian Nation_. Many would dispute that claim, but my book provides evidence for this truth using the very words and actions of the founders themselves. The book is a short read, accompanied by beautiful patriotic photos that I think you’ll appreciate.
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhuvrdflk68nvpcgoo3kbi7dkkaonhun7an7hlm8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3im6oj1chh2bs)
---
| | I would love for you to read this book and discover the truth about our nation’s Christian heritage. And as a token of our appreciation for a gift to Pathway to Victory, we’ll not only send you this book, but also a brand new CD featuring some of our nation’s most patriotic songs from First Baptist Dallas’ renowned choir and orchestra. [https://secure.ptv.org/america-is-a-christian-nation-generous-kit-2](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvnq3tipac1k97u476hqpjgai4bginonqln6poa8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3im6oj1chh2bs)

As believers, we must preserve America's unique heritage and fight for our religious freedoms. By understanding our nation's Christian roots, we can work to bring our country back to its founding principles. At the end of my book, I provide suggestions for how to do just that.

I hope you'll consider donating to _Pathway to Victory_ and receiving your copy of _America Is a Christian Nation_ so you can know without a doubt that the foundation of our country was solidly established in the principles of the Bible.

Gratefully,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

name: Team Freedom VA
subject: 🗳️ Important Election Reminders 🗳️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Hi Peter,
The general election is next week on Tuesday, November 7th ! As we count down to the election here are some important reminders to keep in mind:
Check your registration status here: [https://www.elections.virginia.gov/registration/]
Virginia has same day voter registration that allows you to cast a provisional ballot if you were not able to register on or before October 16th , find details here [https://www.elections.virginia.gov/registration/same-day-voter-registration/]
If you are voting by mail:
If you not yet received your mail ballot you can track it here [https://app.ballotscout.org/virginia/search/state]
In order for your mail ballot to be counted it must be postmarked by or on election day, November 7th
If you are voting early in-person:
In-person early voting has started and can be done at your local registrar's office [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
November 4th is the last day to vote early in-person
If you are voting in-person on election day:
November 7th is election day
Polls open at 6am and close at 7pm
If you are in line before 7pm your polling place MUST allow you to vote
See you at the polls!
https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVA [https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVA] https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa [https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa] https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva [https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva]
Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc.
Freedom Virginia
PO Box 10102
Norfolk, VA 23513
United States

Team,
Today, the House is _once again_ voting on the expulsion of George Santos.
Five months ago, I forced the first House vote on Santos’ expulsion, and every single Republican voted to virtually kill the bill by referring it to the ethics committee.
Since then, 10 new felony charges have been brought against Santos, including ones that accuse him of credit card fraud and identity theft.
Now, 5 Freshman Republicans from New York have reintroduced the notion to expel Santos and we have a real opportunity to get this liar and fraud out of Congress.
[**If you agree that George Santos should be expelled from Congress, please add your name to my petition calling on my colleagues in the House to vote to expel Santos today. We need as much support as we can get before the vote.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72579715/435763249/-1567050890?refcode2=6af7c191-b678-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&refcode=em231101-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWY3YzE5MS1iNjc4LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6k5XslL-SF8pL_jGHa1rh-hyD9B6mbsGgYwEPgc7GSs=&emci=f1df5533-3378-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=6af7c191-b678-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=16877361)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72579718/435763252/-1567050890?refcode2=6af7c191-b678-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&refcode=em231101-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWY3YzE5MS1iNjc4LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6k5XslL-SF8pL_jGHa1rh-hyD9B6mbsGgYwEPgc7GSs=&emci=f1df5533-3378-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=6af7c191-b678-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=16877361)
From where I stand, the choice is simple. We must come together as Congress to expel George Santos. He is a fraud and a liar, and he deceived his voters. It’s time for him to go.
But this vote is about more than George Santos himself. It is about the accountability of lawmakers. Because no one should be able to serve in Congress when elected on the basis of lies and deceit, and no person is above the law.
[**If you agree that people deserve better, join me in calling on my House colleagues to vote to expel George Santos now. We need two-thirds of the House to vote with us to expel him.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72579720/435763255/-1567050890?refcode2=6af7c191-b678-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&refcode=em231101-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWY3YzE5MS1iNjc4LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6k5XslL-SF8pL_jGHa1rh-hyD9B6mbsGgYwEPgc7GSs=&emci=f1df5533-3378-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=6af7c191-b678-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=16877361)

DAVID BLACKMON: A Reckoning Is Coming For The Failing Energy
Transition

It didn’t make a ton of news in the United States media, but a new
study published by the International Energy Agency in mid-October
emphasizes the enormous potential roadblock to a successful energy
transition posed by a projected need to refurbish and double capacity
on global electricity grids.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Preserve America’s unique heritage and fight for our religious freedoms
body:
Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z84fb98bbp2amdfra4vriinpammh1rvcd0cavoc0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3im1o32c3h2bs)
---
Hello, Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

I’ve written a book whose title boldly declares what I know to be true: _America Is a Christian Nation_. Many would dispute that claim, but my book provides evidence for this truth using the very words and actions of the founders themselves. The book is a short read, accompanied by beautiful patriotic photos that I think you’ll appreciate.
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlha2r1q0ok5pkvcjviv1po2jblui2rr1uh253dg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3im1o32c3h2bs)
---
| | I would love for you to read this book and discover the truth about our nation’s Christian heritage. And as a token of our appreciation for a gift to Pathway to Victory, we’ll not only send you this book, but also a brand new CD featuring some of our nation’s most patriotic songs from First Baptist Dallas’ renowned choir and orchestra. [https://secure.ptv.org/america-is-a-christian-nation-generous-kit-2](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2pkf19nfotn7467diq3gcaoa0ld4532dipnu0ko_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3im1o32c3h2bs)

As believers, we must preserve America's unique heritage and fight for our religious freedoms. By understanding our nation's Christian roots, we can work to bring our country back to its founding principles. At the end of my book, I provide suggestions for how to do just that.

I hope you'll consider donating to _Pathway to Victory_ and receiving your copy of _America Is a Christian Nation_ so you can know without a doubt that the foundation of our country was solidly established in the principles of the Bible.

Gratefully,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

Pro Life Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Kate Letzler Moore
subject: sharing updates from the campaign trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
all-in on this race
| | |
---
Hi there, friend, it's Kate, Debbie's Campaign Manager. As one of Debbie's very first grassroots supporters, you're a critical part of our team. **Please, can I have a minute to share a few updates from the campaign trail?**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72580711/435766521/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk250-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDU5ZjQwNDUtYjc3OC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wDA42zFYh-KoEYy_Nk1ufOG-veu-vPsW1cMDfakyfKQ=)
All of us here at Team Debbie have been working hard to meet critical swing voters across the state, and rally the grassroots support that we'll need to win this race. And trust me, Debbie has been the busiest of all of us.
She's been doing the media circuit, speaking with reporters all across Florida and the nation. You may have even caught her on _MSNBC_! And she's been traveling up and down our state — from Miami to Bradenton to Tallahassee and everywhere in between — to meet with key voters.
On the campaign trail, Debbie is spreading our message and making sure that voters know the truth about Rick Scott's horrible record. She's also listening to voters' stories to truly understand what issues matter most to Floridians and how we can solve them together.
Debbie is all-in on this race, and she can't wait to meet even more Floridians and learn how she can best serve them in the Senate. **But our campaign relies on grassroots support, not a personal fortune of millions like Rick Scott. **
We count on donations from grassroots activists like you, friend, to power every aspect of this campaign — from TV ads to paying for gas so that Debbie can keep driving up and down the state.**And right now, we're pacing behind our $150,000 end-of-month goal.[So please, if you're able, will you rush a donation before midnight tonight to help us hit this goal, compete with Rick Scott's massive fortune, and flip Florida blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72580712/435766522/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk250-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDU5ZjQwNDUtYjc3OC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wDA42zFYh-KoEYy_Nk1ufOG-veu-vPsW1cMDfakyfKQ=)**

name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: Return your mail-in ballot ASAP!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
Hello friends!
We hope this special edition of the New Pennsylvania Project eBlast finds you well.
Return Your Vote-By-Mail Ballot ASAP
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/72.jpg]
Still have your mail-in ballot? Fill it out and get it in the mail TODAY! If you won't be able to mail it back by Nov.1st, make a plan to drop it off in person either at a dropbox location or your county Board of Elections. Drop off locations vary depending on where you live, so scan the QR code in the image above or click here [https://vote.pa/?org=npp] to find approved ballot drop off locations in your area. Remember, ballots MUST be received at your county Board of Elections by 8PM on Nov.7th for your vote to count.
Graphic highlighting voter registration efforts as part of National Voter Registration Day [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/2_2.png]
Already set and ready to vote? Can you contact three friends TODAY and ask that they make a plan to vote in the Nov.7th election? Don't assume those in your network are ready to vote, a quick reminder can make all the difference. Pass them this link [https://vote.pa/?org=npp] if they need assistance in finding out when, where, and how to vote!
Voter Protection Hotlines
ANY QUESTIONS OR ISSUES VOTING? Contact one of the voter assistance hotlines below with any questions about things like: envelopes included with your ballot, where to bring your ballot, if you have a negative experience at the drop box or polling place, or anything else you want to ask or report about your voting experience.
*
Voter
Protection
Hotline:
1-866-OUR-VOTE
*
DOS
PA
Voter
Hotline:
1-877-VOTESPA

*

Fill it out and get it in the mail TODAY! If you won't be able to mail it back by Nov.1st, make a plan to drop it off in person either at a dropbox location or your county Board of Elections. Drop off locations vary depending on where you live, so scan the QR code in the image above or click here [] to find approved ballot drop off locations in your area. Remember, ballots MUST be received at your county Board of Elections by 8PM on Nov.7th for your vote to count. Graphic highlighting voter registration efforts as part of National Voter Registration Day [] Already set and ready to vote? Can you contact three friends TODAY and ask that they make a plan to vote in the Nov.7th election? Don't assume those in your network are ready to vote, a quick reminder can make all the difference. Pass them this link [] if they need assistance in finding out when, where, and how to vote! Voter Protection Hotlines ANY QUESTIONS OR ISSUES VOTING? name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb7ldg15b5s2potf85d206c2ssh7fhgl6cropdlo_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3im9o74clh2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf6lrqhq9l87tc25cqa8cacmli20as2d64nlcnc0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3im9o74clh2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd89av7t5kc7mn4hreeavsf19j741sjsf8nuhckg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3im9o74clh2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

GOP Presidential
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3fusmq2122b1kcsvpqscucia2uc95q5bjpjgn30_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3im9o74clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshi61o74c1jm49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqqdnkl2ls6vnkm1h66l3rvbfm3072iigkf2s33g_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3im9o74clh2bs)_

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za8vqcptaenmnjd13ljj7d6c6rrnev5h9cfup588_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or4s3geap70shim49fg)

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=a4dbf5e159af4a43094c746c19794cc703aa35fd505aec8d55ad32f746235e91d40e479d35ce23f106b324c8e06712951c3e0ac7af0af8e2ac1bc3538fc3c77c

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

I’m in this race because Tennesseans deserve better.

That was made crystal clear earlier this year, in the wake of the horrific Nashville school shooting. Thousands of Tennesseans descended on the state Capitol to demand action on gun violence prevention, but the GOP majority refused to give them a voice.

So two of my colleagues and I stood up to join their historic protest.

I knew it was against the rules. I knew it would piss the GOP leadership off. _But I couldn’t let the Covenant families, young people, and parents from across the state stand alone._

The Republican majority took quick action, but not on gun violence. Both my colleagues, Representatives Justin J. Pearson and Justin Jones, were expelled. I was spared by a single vote._Then the GOP majority passed a new law to increase access to guns._

**MAGA Republicans in Nashville and Washington don’t give a damn about us.** They don’t give a damn about using power to save lives or help the people who elected them into office. They only care about their big campaign donors and special interest lobbyists.

_But one thing has changed – the people are on our side, and they are standing up to demand action and make the change we need. There’s a movement afoot in Tennessee._

**I’m standing tall to take on Senator Marsha Blackburn now because Tennessee deserves better. Period.**

Marsha has _failed_ us in her five years in office. She’s voted _against_ everything from pandemic relief to ensuring equal pay for women. She’s supported tax breaks for corporations while opposing laws to keep life-saving drug prices down. She’s a danger to reproductive rights, cruel to LGBTQ+ folks, and she refuses to fight for our right to vote.

She’s also taken over a million dollars from the NRA while refusing to take action on the most basic, commonsense legislation to protect our children from the threat of gun violence. We have a senator who stands with bullies, and I have a reputation for standing up to bullies.

**Marsha Blackburn has shown us who she works for, and it’s not us.** She’s had five years and _nothing_ is getting done. Tennesseans deserve someone who will stand up to corrupt special interests and fight for lower costs so that every family can build a good life. It’s time we do something about it.

[But I need your help to get our campaign off the ground and make it to the Senate. Make a Founding Donation to help me defeat the GOP and deliver for our state! It’s time we do something about it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. = = = = With you, Gloria ******** ******** Defeat Republicans | Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www.DefeatRepublicans.org) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Ro Khanna
subject: TODAY: I’m taking the debate stage with presidential candidate Vivek Ramaswamy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

This morning at 10 am ET, I’m taking the stage for a moderated debate with Republican presidential nominee Vivek Ramaswamy, hosted by the New Hampshire Institute of Politics at Saint Anselm College.

Vivek and I disagree on a lot. Priorities for federal funding. America’s role in the global community. Addressing versus adapting to climate change. The right to vote.

In order to win in 2024, it’s critical that we show voters that there is a bright line between Democrats' vision for America as the world's first multi-ethnic democracy and a 21st-century manufacturing superpower and Republicans' failed isolationism and trickle-down economics.

That’s the reason why I agreed to debate Vivek about America’s future.

https://twitter.com/RoKhanna/status/1719503313568247949?s=20 [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna/status/1719503313568247949?s=20]

WATCH LIVE [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna/status/1719503313568247949?s=20]

My vision of economic patriotism is simple: massive public investment in industry can transform America into a 21st-century manufacturing superpower. That means bringing unionized, well-paying manufacturing jobs back to the United States, to communities ravaged by globalization. It means addressing inflation and the ongoing supply chain crisis by making things here at home. It means incentivizing factory construction, investing in training opportunities and manufacturing process innovations, and pushing the federal government to use tax revenues to purchase items made in America, not China or elsewhere.

We need to embrace a new economic patriotism: making things in America again to build prosperity and wealth. If you’re with me, will you split a donation of $3 or more between myself and President Biden today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden-2024-split?refcode=20231101-ramaswamy-debate]

Or, Donate Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden-2024-split?refcode=20231101-ramaswamy-debate]

Onward,
Ro

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Friend, did you miss this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Support has been overwhelming, so I decided to extend our deadline for 24 hours.
Democrats and the media had written us off.

|
---
| | |
Friend, thank you!

We just crushed our 1st End of Month goal!

And because of the overwhelming support of countless grassroots Conservatives, I have decided to extend our deadline for 24 hours.

**Together we sent the Democrats and their media allies a loud and clear message that we are ready to fight in 2024. **

But some patriots missed their chance to join us, so I wanted to give you 1 more chance to join this group of dedicated conservatives.

[**Chip in today to join the thousands of other conservative patriots who are ready to win in 2024.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35817%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=anoYsrYMA0Ea1QRM%2f3ZCog&sysid=1 "Chip in today to join the
thousands of other conservative patriots who are ready to win in
2024. ")
