****DEADLINE EXTENDED FOR 24 HOURS****
---

Democrats and the media had written us off.

But together, Friend, we proved them wrong once again.

**_The outpouring of support you have shown me these last few days is enough to make this Louisiana boy blush. _**

I’m just getting started, and with your help I’ll keep fighting for our shared conservative values.

So please, chip in now to join my team before our deadline expires at 11:59 PM.

Speaker Mike Johnson

name: Team Lierman
subject: Welcome to Team Lierman
body:
Brooke and her team are hard at work in the Comptroller’s office advocating for all Marylanders.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72587166/435789606/-1178948366?refcode=BLU-BLMD-Welcome-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDYwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODdkYjAxMi1iZjc4LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IkjGoL-q1vjvMr0ThC1ouW-kf8SXZc4t_NsPCpR57ds=)
---
| Peter,

Welcome! Brooke and her team are hard at work in the Comptroller’s office advocating for all Marylanders.

Before getting elected to State Comptroller, the most common question Brooke got on the trail was, **“What is a Comptroller?”** We were asked the question so often we even made a video about it!
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72587167/435789607/-803653937?v=jZnmgzQ8NDg&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDYwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODdkYjAxMi1iZjc4LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IkjGoL-q1vjvMr0ThC1ouW-kf8SXZc4t_NsPCpR57ds=&emci=5bdd1079-cfed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f87db012-bf78-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=29787386)
**So what is a Comptroller?** Well, we’ll need more than one email to lay out what the job is, what it could be, and what Brooke is doing as Comptroller.

The first thing you need to know is that the Comptroller is **one of only three independently-elected statewide officials** : the Governor is our chief executive, our Attorney General represents us in Court, and the State Comptroller manages the state’s money – the Comptroller sees every dollar in, and every dollar out.

The Comptroller also sits on our state’s most critical boards, including the powerful Board of Public Works that reviews over $450m in contracts and spending every other week. The Governor, Comptroller, and State Treasurer have three equal votes on the Board of Public Works. As an independently elected state official, Brooke is YOUR voice on the Board of Public Works, advocating spending our dollars to benefit all Marylanders.

And, finally, the Comptroller is our state tax collector (and refunder!). We can do so much to modernize our Comptroller’s office to work more efficiently for people, families, and businesses.

Thanks for being a part of our team!

– Team Lierman

* * *
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72587168/435789608/-1178948366?refcode=BLU-BLMD-Welcome-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDYwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODdkYjAxMi1iZjc4LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IkjGoL-q1vjvMr0ThC1ouW-kf8SXZc4t_NsPCpR57ds=)

---

name: Sign your name (via Left Action)
subject: Sign: Tell Speaker of the House Mike Johnson to stop dodging the question, and admit that Trump lost
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Mike Johnson to admit that Trump lost](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf90b72b3-7fb8-4aa5-96b2-19ff8f404f7a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td980d040-fed5-4bf2-ad62-0a7fedadb6da/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | When a reporter asked new speaker Mike Johnson whether he would admit that Trump lost, Johnson didn't even have the courage to give a straight answer. [**Tell Johnson to stop dodging the question, and admit that Trump lost.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2d912650-b680-40ae-92ed-6dd0176eab01/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) It's not surprising that Johnson, one of the [leaders](https://default.salsalabs.org/T22e27be9-dc8a-4589-8539-74436c81544d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) of the Trump effort to overturn the election, doesn't want to talk about what he did, now that he's got the national spotlight on him. But Johnson is now the leader of the House, and he needs to answer the question that cuts to the heart of our democracy. He needs to either admit that Trump lost, or he needs to admit that he still is pushing a dangerous fairy tale, and let the people weigh that when they vote next year. And if he keeps dodging the question, then every reporter should ask him again and again, until he finally answers. [**Add your name, and tell Mike Johnson to stop dodging the question, and admit that Trump lost.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5235c276-6af9-4e66-889e-96b26694bb87/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T831793f6-46c7-41d6-bf12-25c994cab6ad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P. S. - if you no longer wish to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_
---
|
---

* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T448a3a6d-e795-4766-bf48-370c89d57193/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T20b4fe67-8549-4e9c-94e0-8f75113c160a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Friend, it's Stefanie, Kirsten's finance director. I'm typing this from my iPhone so apologies in advance for any typos, but this is urgent: _I just pulled the numbers, and last night, we fell $1,268 short of our end-of-month goal._
Listen, our team is so grateful for everything that you've already done to support this campaign — donating, believing in Kirsten and standing up for our Senate majority.
So I wish I didn't have to ask for your help again, but in a fight like this one, that $1,268 could make all the difference. That's why we've decided to extend our deadline for another 24 hours. **Please, will you chip in $5, $25 or whatever you can spare before midnight tonight? name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672882%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=11lShpAdiHOGtcOxDhKXRA&sysid=1). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672883%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fgZ%2fOsgfG%2f1lvMDkMY0KkQ&sysid=1) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672884%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8f4lSONc0uHyz1v%2bg8tNCw&sysid=1) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

American Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

Support has been overwhelming, so I decided to extend our deadline for 24 hours.

| | |
Friend, thank you!

We just crushed our 1st End of Month goal!

And because of the overwhelming support of countless grassroots Conservatives, I have decided to extend our deadline for 24 hours.

**Together we sent the Democrats and their media allies a loud and clear message that we are ready to fight in 2024. **

But some patriots missed their chance to join us, so I wanted to give you 1 more chance to join this group of dedicated conservatives.

[**Chip in today to join the thousands of other conservative patriots who are ready to win in 2024.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmgi95kmp1adgblfacerqt2k5lftvb2214gmkql0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3hmcob2cjh2bs "Chip in today to join the thousands of other conservative patriots who are ready to win in 2024.")

name: Christie
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi there -- It’s Christie, Executive Director at the DSCC. I’m reaching out to say something that we can't say enough: **Thank you.**

**Thank you for your tireless support fighting for our Senate majority.**

Thank you for staying engaged even when there’s so much cynicism and negativity aimed at getting you to tune out.

And thank you for stepping up to help us meet our fundraising goal for October.

We’re building something different at the DSCC, and you're a big part of making it happen. We’re fighting for Democrats _every day_ , investing in data and organizing to build an operation that will defy the odds in 2024 to strengthen our razor-thin majority. **And every time we hit one of our fundraising targets, you help us lay another brick in the foundation of our victory.**

But here’s the thing: The closer we get to Election Day, the worse it is for us to come up short of our fundraising targets, and the harder it'll be for us to catch back up. **We can’t afford to fall behind a single day, which is why I’m asking for your help again.**

**[You make everything we do possible, so please: Help us start off November strong with a $5 donation, so we can continue to build a sustainable movement to defend our Senate majority.](https://go.dscc.org/go/15918?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20231101-Christie-ChristieThankYouDirect-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20231101-Christie-ChristieThankYouDirect-ETG-sl1&akid=12478%2E9716520%2EJYs_H5)**

We need your help to defend our Senate majority. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Trump in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
**Donald Trump is coming to Texas.**
Tonight he’ll hold court with MAGA millionaires in Dallas. Tomorrow he’ll fire up his base at a Houston rally, trafficking in the kind of lies and hatred that bring out the worst in our fellow Texans.
After claiming credit for “saving” Attorney General Ken Paxton from impeachment, Trump has raised $5 million from Texas donors.
And as national polls show him increasing his lead in the GOP primary and gaining against President Biden, he’s counting on Texas to be a Republican firewall in the 2024 election.
The tough reality is that it’s unlikely that President Biden’s campaign or the national Democratic Party will invest the resources necessary to counter Trump in Texas — **so it’s on us to lead the fight to stop him.**
[**Will you chip in $3 today to support our efforts to reach, register, and mobilize the new Democratic voters we need to stop Trump and maintain control of the White House next year?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231101.9-yA28&refcode=ema20231101-234236&t=1&akid=234236%2E444211%2EtOScV1)
**[DONATE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231101.9-yA28&refcode=ema20231101-234236&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=234236%2E444211%2EtOScV1)**
Together we can get this done.
— Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20231101-234236-footer&t=21&refcode2=234236_444211_tOScV1&akid=234236%2E444211%2EtOScV1)**

name: Mike Rogers
subject: 169 terrorists tried to enter.

body:
Talking border security with Fox News and Newsmax| | |
---
ICYMI, Friends, Our border is in a state of unprecedented crisis. 169 individuals on the terrorist watch list have tried to cross the border this year. That's more than 2017-2020 **combined**.

1.7 million border crossers have gotten away since 2021.

2.4 million migrants have been encountered at the southern border this year; 269,000 in September **ALONE.** I've been busy hitting the airwaves discussing the ongoing crisis on our southern border. Check out my conversations on Fox News and Newsmax below:

name: Sen. Chuck Grassley
subject: This isn’t a one-person job
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
It’s not hard to recognize someone worth helping. I’ve identified Tim Sheehy as someone I think would be tremendous to work with and I need your help to get him to Washington.

|
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3hmdramg2oee4bpkot85pvju37mc9mt18k54qd8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3hm2pj2cph2bs)

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Senator Chuck Grassley reaching out because I’m in need of a favor.

**Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy is running against one of Chuck Schumer’s foot soldiers in the Senate who votes to deliver the Biden-Harris agenda of open borders and big government spending that fuels the fires of inflation. And Tim needs OUR HELP to win.**

You see, Jon Tester has successfully pulled the wool over voters’ eyes into sending him to Washington on their behalf since 2006. How, I don’t know. Because the reality is his views are not at all in line with the views of voters in Montana. **His voting record would give him a real easy time being elected in Oregon, California, or Massachusetts.**

**Let’s put an end to Democrats representing conservative states in the U.S. Senate.** If you don’t want to read to the end of this note, please make sure you click this link to donate to help Navy Seal Tim Sheehy WIN and FLIP the Senate RED before you close out your browser.

[**MAKE YOUR CONTRIBUTION BY CLICKING HERE
**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr3bo153k5sk8m5v7c7amp6l1c2tv4s7f45qvn58_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3hm2pj2cph2bs)

After 16 years of Jon Tester voting in lock step for a liberal agenda, we Republicans have a real shot at ousting him next November thanks to Navy SEAL veteran Tim Sheehy who is running this go around. We can’t afford another six years of votes for big government, deficit spending, raising taxes, open borders and climate extremism

Tim is a very impressive candidate and I know he’d make a **GREAT U.S. Senator**. He needs our help, which is why I’m personally reaching out to ask you to get involved today.

**[Please, send him a large donation right now.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrgc25kb8eu6pcb5dhnc6iaa5u1ui0mt7uuhp3mo_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3hm2pj2cph2bs)** I’ll leave it up to you what you consider to be large, but please know that he’ll put your gift to the best possible use. Every dollar counts.

[**CHIP IN $10
**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhak0egkkpepirctgn12s5ha9v919lktb14orikg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3hm2pj2cph2bs)
[**CHIP IN $25
**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z693ml2i8u8sq1ssnq66etl86nl3ldat74qt9jto_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3hm2pj2cph2bs)
[**CHIP IN $50
**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdegrqlmivdr41cv5esknehtidkhgjb8kqu357c8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3hm2pj2cph2bs)
[**CHIP IN EVEN MORE ->
**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za6vofkv2m3mhj3u06q9as0havptj3gqrqqkn1cg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3hm2pj2cph2bs)

Thank you,
Sen. Chuck Grassley

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Binkley?=
subject: Happy holidays from Ryan
body:
| |
---
| | |
# Campaign News and Views
Season's greetings from Ryan and Binkley 2024!
---
| [ ](http://)
---
### Happy holidays from Ryan!
We're starting the holiday season with good news. Ryan is officially on the ballot in New Hampshire, South Carolina, and Nevada. Thousands of people can vote for him on election day. Stay tuned for more updates on ballots across the nation!
| | [ ](http://)
---
### Meeting NH Governor
Ryan met with New Hampshire Governor Sununu and Secretary Scanlan this week. He signed the primary ballot and ensured his place in every voting booth in the state.
---
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=d96fe7ab93&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### Cerro Gordo Speech
Ryan spoke at the Cerro Gordo County GOP's Fall Festival. He talked about the danger of America losing its power to protect liberty. He championed a 'brightening of the lamp' and economic revival.
_[Watch here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=71b9c1e87c&e=c1403f41d3)_
---
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=2114c8f54e&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### 90-Day Push to the Primaries
Will you help bolster our outreach to voters over the next 90 days? We're asking for dedicated volunteers to make calls to Iowa and New Hampshire voters. [_Sign up here_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=d53c04c903&e=c1403f41d3)
---
|
####
**Coming Up**

---
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=95ac24ee20&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### YRNF Des Moines
Ryan will give a speech at the Iowa Young Republican's Hoover Dinner. The event starts at 6:30 pm on November 11th at the Renaissance Savery Hotel in Des Moines, IA. Ryan will be speaking at 9:30 pm. [_RSVP here_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=3b91781f20&e=c1403f41d3)

---
|
####
**How Can I Help?**

---
| [Contribute Today!](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=77e780fb41&e=c1403f41d3 "Contribute Today!")
---
| **We ask that you take one moment to donate and send the link to 10 new people. Tell them to send it to 10 more! BE THE CHANGE that allows Ryan's message to reach the nation!**
---
| [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=8467083c32&e=c1403f41d3)
---
| • _**LIKE AND COMMENT**_ on all social media posts • A simple "I support Ryan Binkley for President" goes a long way!
• Ignore any argumentative comments that may follow
• Lastly, _**DONATE & SHARE**_ the link with everyone you know!
---
|
---
|
---
| _Coming up: Click[here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=34647a71aa&e=c1403f41d3) to stay up to date with events._
---

name: Christian Castelli
subject: It's 1979. Again.
body:
Peter,

In 1979, America was confronted with overwhelming inflation, rising gas prices, hostages held by Iran, and Russia would soon invade Afghanistan.

2023 looks eerily similar. We need proven, experienced, conservative leaders in Congress right now to get us out of this rut, not politicians.

[****](https://secure.winred.com/committee-to-elect-christian-castelli/donate-today)

_I 'm Christian Castelli. I am a retired Lieutenant Colonel in the United States Army. As a 22-year decorated combat veteran and Green Beret, I was deployed 14 times to hostile fire zones and 6 combat tours._

I recognize a challenge, and today America and Americans face challenges and threats to our freedom.

In 1979, it took Ronald Reagan, a conservative leader running for president to turn things around.

"Mean what you say. Say what you mean.
Surrender is not a Ranger word."

This is a creed I made a promise to uphold.

So, I promise you I will never surrender to the challenges we face.

As your congressman, I will:
* Undo Bidenomics to stop inflation and rising gas prices
* Defend freedom and America's interests around the globe
* Close and defend our border to keep the homeland safe
* Prioritize the needs of the middle-class, small business, and family so they may prosper again

I will always keep my word. I will never abandon you. And I will never betray your trust.

Let's restore security and prosperity in America again. Please make a contribution today of $250, $100, $50, or $25 today.

**AND, if you make a donation of $20.23 or $19.79 to send a message of your support for my campaign to undo the challenges we face and challenges we conquered before, I PROMISE TO MATCH YOU CONTRIBUTION!**

Christian Castelli
Lieutenant Colonel (Retired)
U.S. Army Special Forces
Republican Candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives, NC-06

body:
This is my story

| |
---

Friend,

After we delivered the historic upset to Biden & Pelosi in the TX-34 special election last year, the liberal media & woke Democrats immediately sunk to disgusting lows to defeat me in the November midterms.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Supporting Riley Gaines, switching from Eventbrite
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/greenenergy-11571321?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**Riley Gaines was recently deplatformed by the ticket sales company, Eventbrite.** According to reports, Eventbrite announced it was not willing to sell tickets for a speaking event about protecting women’s sports since the topic violates the company’s hateful-conduct policy.

**Having hosted Riley Gaines here in Jackson using Eventbrite, MCPP feels it is our duty to stand with Riley - and part company with Eventbrite.**

**As happened with Disney and Bud Lite, conservatives need to apply consumer power to stand up to these woke corporations. **

**In two weeks, we are hosting our major Education Freedom lunch meeting here in Jackson to push for school choice in our state. **We will be switching away from Eventbrite, and using an alternative provider.

**Anyone that has already bought a ticket need not worry. Your ticket is still valid.**

**If you have not bought a ticket yet, please click on the image below to order your ticket today!**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d24410da75&e=5703353baa)
---
_Click the photo above to purchase your tickets!_
| Please do join me at this event! It is going to be awesome!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d9273efe93&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
Friend, I have incredible news in my race to defeat Sen. Rick Scott here in Florida — and I wanted you to hear it from me:
A new poll already shows this race in a statistical tie!
I’ve always believed that we can reach our dreams if we work for them. That’s what’s so great about this country. I came to this country at 14 and worked for minimum wage at a doughnut shop, so I know the value of hard work. I know that with hard work, determination, and the grassroots support of people like you — we’ll elect someone who’s proof of the American dream as Florida’s next U.S. senator.
But I need to be frank about what’s ahead of us: Rick Scott has already sunk millions of dollars of his own money into his campaign. I simply will not be able to compete without grassroots resources. That's why my team and I have set a weekly $50,000 goal to ensure we can fight Scott’s wealth, build our campaign, and win.
With grassroots support of the utmost importance, I checked your donation record to see where things stand. Could you please chip in?
Supporter: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Progress to Goal: 74%
Suggested Gift: $25 to flip FL blue
The harsh reality is that my opponent is one of the richest senators in Washington — he spent $64 million of his own fortune to buy this seat last time. If we don’t keep up with key goals this early in the election cycle, we'll never be able to make up the gap and stay competitive.
This is our best chance to flip Florida blue. And with control of the Senate at stake, we cannot let ourselves be outspent. That's why I am personally asking: Please, will you split $25 or more between my campaign and Serve America to help us hit our weekly goal and stop Rick Scott from buying this seat? subject: Why Are Some Social Justice Unionists Backing the Palestinians?
body:
Child prodigies, Speaker Johnson, Ugly Truths of Antisemitism, and more...

**[Why Are Some Social Justice Unionists Backing the Palestinians?](https://link.email.thepricklypear.)**
| [ ](https://link.email.thepricklypear.)
---
Since the horrific terrorist attacks against Israel on October 7, numerous left-wing institutions have disgraced themselves by taking actions that at least appeared to side with the terrorists against their civilian victims. In perhaps the most regrettable of all illustrations of the power of social justice unionism, labor organizations joined the self-discreditation—and where they didn’t, their usual allies on the far left denounced them for craven, financially interested right-deviationism.

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: The Clintons, Qatar, and the Israel Massacre
body:
Shortly after the world began learning the details of the massacre of
Israeli civilians on October 7, Hillary Clinton published a note of
support on X for “everyone affected by the horrific attacks by
Hamas” and expressing “strong support of our ally,” Israel.

[alt_text]

[*****]
November 01, 2023

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65620&L=30592&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaXNyYWVsLW1hc3NhY3JlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=53d89753900bbe7c7d9de9e4906e0125c5daeaae5936af86e43d4f44148e8b47]

Shortly after the world began learning the details of the massacre
of Israeli civilians on October 7, Hillary Clinton published a note
of support on X for “everyone affected by the horrific attacks by
Hamas” and expressing “strong support of our ally,” Israel. The
former secretary of state had nothing to say about one of Hamas’s
key allies, the energy-rich kingdom of Qatar, and not surprisingly:
Qatar is not only an important friend of the U.S. in the region but
also for many years was a generous patron of Bill and Hillary Clinton.
As JW President Tom Fitton noted on X, Qatar funneled money to the
Clintons when Mrs. Clinton was secretary of state and she “hid this
until disclosures from Wikileaks and pressure from Judicial Watch
forced her to admit to tens of millions of previously hidden foreign
cash payments to ‘Clinton Inc.’”

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65620&L=30592&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaXNyYWVsLW1hc3NhY3JlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=53d89753900bbe7c7d9de9e4906e0125c5daeaae5936af86e43d4f44148e8b47]

[alt_text] [*****] November 01, 2023 [article-image] [] Shortly after the world began learning the details of the massacre of Israeli civilians on October 7, Hillary Clinton published a note of support on X for “everyone affected by the horrific attacks by Hamas” and expressing “strong support of our ally,” Israel. The former secretary of state had nothing to say about one of Hamas’s key allies, the energy-rich kingdom of Qatar, and not surprisingly: Qatar is not only an important friend of the U.S. in the region but also for many years was a generous patron of Bill and Hillary Clinton. name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35821%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XfJDv4Q6loBBBgfjgzOaRQ&sysid=1). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35822%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fvClGExi8vkRHtiZjYZphw&sysid=1) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35823%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Gw5oaKs6zkcWLPyhOlFTcQ&sysid=1) on these survival food kits while you can.

clean_body: This might be your only warning. The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis This might be your only warning. According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: “Food shortages are coming.” Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling . When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. on these survival food kits while you can. name: Mike Johnson
subject: The cornerstone of leadership
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life.

|
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8gep8qpd4loucamlfggj5fthtbojmvls7o201io_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfl0k2e9iasblmv8ncdf42g9pb8j0c9j68p30chhiasblmvb7fdbieoqjbojl6dpiasblmvarac9kmlqrbp9lmgqb3cp5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4d5nm79r3kthqep238h1e8he4933cjge1or7c1g69oh5u)
---
Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I’ve devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z44g2p9rqj5fchqarph6oeon77k7hradrmmn9t48_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfl0k2e9iasblmv8ncdf42g9pb8j0c9j68p30chhiasblmvb7fdbieoqjbojl6dpiasblmvarac9kmlqrbp9lmgqb3cp5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4d5nm79r48d245p25oh4cdie1o73ctg60p724no) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

[** SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON > **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuhah2oakbecae4v469cl781bte26sfviprf7270_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfl0k2e9iasblmv8ncdf42g9pb8j0c9j68p30chhiasblmvb7fdbieoqjbojl6dpiasblmvarac9kmlqrbp9lmgqb3cp5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4d5nm79r48d245p25oh4cdie1o73ctg60p724no)

Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness.**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It’s the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support – to restore our country and defend our values. Can you make a donation immediately?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjsatgl6qifflc8hrv7asicj1adp0d0mbh0eneng_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3hmeo30cjh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqga174p5e5qrfkbm6ni184slk9g64pj4chg68op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti4no)

[** DONATE TO SAVE AMERICA > **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z39kjvm4lj2nkd5mj0r13tisukk094tlkagp89k0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3hmeo30cjh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqga174p5e5qrfkbm6ni184slk9g64pj4chg68op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti4no)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it’s too late.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zecvm579lfhiip0gt054mljdelkeav647u0vgboo_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3hmeo30cjh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqga174p5e5qrfkbm6ni184slk9g64pj4chg68op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti4no)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It’s why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It’s also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference – one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House – and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee.

We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, [**but we cannot do it alone.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znjbfcf48ur60nps6p9jdhegck7rmk9o161ka62o_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3hmeo30cjh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqga174p5e5qrfkbm6ni184slk9g64pj4chg68op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti4no)

[**If you are committed to keeping the House from the radical Democrats who are self-serving and want to turn America into a socialist country, then I need your support today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt1avrlijgq37d19dg840is4hdh2te2cm7eq58no_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3hmeo30cjh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqga174p5e5qrfkbm6ni184slk9g64pj4chg68op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti4no)

[** CHIP IN > **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziiikkq66gk2p12g1i2l5ul1boknbo18irutg1fo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ejn9ctiekoj79hnmmrqbd5mmkpbfc5jmprr7dt26irrb83k6mh7fpjm6nh60oj6chg64or7qm99f44jipbp75ul2kbt0l0nq8a9f5uiak9lfl0k2e9iasblmv8ncdf42g9pb8j0c9j68p30chhiasblmvb7fdbieoqjbojl6dpiasblmvarac9kmlqrbp9lmgqb3cp5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4d5nm79r48d245p25oh4cdie1o73ctg60p724no)

The path we’re on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

[**Can you pitch in right now to help save our country, Fellow American?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zen8nkgumt7id700fnemom0701ucehlid7bc6va8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3hmeo30cjh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqga174p5e5qrfkbm6ni184slk9g64pj4chg68op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti4no)

Thank you for all you do, and God bless.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z76884rsiccgb6mibee39tdcok17rcb3h1ivmi78_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3hmeo30cjh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqga174p5e5qrfkbm6ni184slk9g64pj4chg68op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kti4no)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvteqs3s0nc8p0dngpe7cg847batb8nv1qcmto3o_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3hmeo30cjh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt5mirbaclnm2prcttjmuh39dtlk1q3b8jnspr3boj0c9j68o32cdjtb4kni29pclsjivaha5ugagbt454niv95a4qnqga174p5e5qrfkbm6ni184slk9g64pj4chg68op5e5qrfljnmlp7cd9ls9qj6sp5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqoq3bc3k6irj7df26irr3kthqeot7ch5u)

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I refuse to co-parent with the government
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWv_en6iNL

Mike Johnson for Congress

When Kelly and I dreamed of our future, we certainly
didn't envision co-parenting with...

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWv_en6iNL

Fellow American,

When people ask Kelly and me why
we keep going, and why we are still compelled to serve in public
office, no matter how difficult the days, our answer is simple:
"This is for our children. For ALL of our children and
grandchildren."

There is a very real question
right now whether they will be able to enjoy the same liberty,
security, and opportunity that we have. Freedom is imperiled
today and there is a crisis at every turn.

Kelly and I have four amazing
kids, and we give our all-every day-to try to ensure that we can
pass along the blessings of liberty to Hannah, Abby, Jack, and
Will, and everyone in the generation of Americans that follow us.
I am certain that you share that same conviction.

I believe that God is not done
with America yet.

I believe we need to unite as a
party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is
great - but I am bullish about the future of America.

I believe in the law - I'm a
constitutional law attorney and I respect the law.

I believe America is the freest,
most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world
- but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are
numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda
on the rest of us.

Last November, the American
people put their faith in House Republicans and gave us a
majority. We've been charged with holding Democrats accountable
for their failure to get our country out of the malaise of their
own making. To deliver on the promises we made, we need you on
our team TODAY.

STAND WITH SPEAKER MIKE >

Fellow American, I know it takes
time to build trust; you're getting to know me and I'm navigating
this new role - but we must act - and quickly. We need a full
course correction, otherwise, I'm not sure what version of
America we'll hand down to the next generation.

So, I'm asking you today - please
commit to a donation of any amount. We will use your gift to help
defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for
freedom.

-STEP FORWARD TODAY-
DONATE >

I made a promise when I was first
elected to do what is best for our country, and I intend to keep
that promise. Stand with me today.

God bless,

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

MIKE JOHNSON
Mike is a dedicated

clean_body: Mike Johnson for Congress When Kelly and I dreamed of our future, we certainly didn't envision co-parenting with... Fellow American, When people ask Kelly and me why we keep going, and why we are still compelled to serve in public office, no matter how difficult the days, our answer is simple: "This is for our children. For ALL of our children and grandchildren." There is a very real question right now whether they will be able to enjoy the same liberty, security, and opportunity that we have. Freedom is imperiled today and there is a crisis at every turn. Kelly and I have four amazing kids, and we give our all-every day-to try to ensure that we can pass along the blessings of liberty to Hannah, Abby, Jack, and Will, and everyone in the generation of Americans that follow us. I am certain that you share that same conviction. I believe that God is not done with America yet. I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great - but I am bullish about the future of America. I believe in the law - I'm a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law. I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world - but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us. Last November, the American people put their faith in House Republicans and gave us a majority. We've been charged with holding Democrats accountable for their failure to get our country out of the malaise of their own making. To deliver on the promises we made, we need you on our team TODAY. STAND WITH SPEAKER MIKE > Fellow American, I know it takes time to build trust; you're getting to know me and I'm navigating this new role - but we must act - and quickly. We need a full course correction, otherwise, I'm not sure what version of America we'll hand down to the next generation. So, I'm asking you today - please commit to a donation of any amount. We will use your gift to help defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom. -STEP FORWARD TODAY- DONATE > I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and I intend to keep that promise. Stand with me today. God bless, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House MIKE JOHNSON Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE? PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 18, 2022. subject: The tip of the America First spear
body:
If you recall, a few short weeks ago 8 brave Republican members of Congress said enough is enough and voted to oust Kevin McCarthy as Speaker.. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10397647?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | |
#
Friends,

If the past few months have proved anything it’s this:

**If conservatives are willing to fight, we can defeat the Washington cartel.**

My team at Citizens for Renewing America helped lead the rebellion that successfully expelled Kevin McCarthy as Speaker and replaced him with Mike Johnson, a reliable conservative.

In fact, we’ve been the tip of the spear of every major America First battle in Washington this year and the liberal media has taken notice.
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=7bc1b86ba7&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| That’s why I'm asking you, personally, to consider stepping up to [support our efforts](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=0e664d4170&e=17913c7d6d) through the end of the year to fight these battles.

→ Cut woke and weaponized federal spending through the appropriations process.
→ Push lawmakers to cut funding for the endless war in Ukraine.
→ Hold the corrupt FBI accountable for targeting conservatives and pro-lifers.

As you can see, we have a plan, we have a first rate team in place, [we just need support from Americans like you to keep the fight alive in Washington](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=33c81cb4ab&e=17913c7d6d).

Now is no time to rest on our laurels. We’ve made gains, but the left won’t retreat and neither can we.

[I hope you’ll stand with us](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=4ca0c85836&e=17913c7d6d).
---
| Thanks for your [continued support](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=199c3dfbb7&e=17913c7d6d),

Russ Vought
President, Citizens for Renewing America

subject: Ted Cruz has recorded *how many* podcast episodes?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tchenko for Texas
body:
Those are Joe Rogan numbers right there! | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3aec4cf939c0/a-new-way-forward-for-texas-12659580?e=b8ba94fd9b)
---
We all know that Ted Cruz doesn’t care about working people.
He’ll choose Donald Trump, the Republican party and his billionaire donors over everyday Texans every single time.
But we do have to give him credit where credit is due.
He is extremely committed... _just not to Texas._
**A little while back he recorded his 100th podcast episode of 2023.**
100 podcast episodes in a year!!! _Those are Joe Rogan numbers right there._
We wanted to congratulate him on this amazing achievement. So we made him a certificate to let him know just how proud we are of him for his dedication... _to his podcast._

[](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=df10ae450f&e=b8ba94fd9b)
We mailed it to his office.
If we get a thank you card in return, we’ll be sure to share it with you.
**In the meantime, we don’t have big donors supporting this campaign – we have everyday folks like you.**
[**Will you kick in $10 or more today and ensure we have the resources we need to keep on getting out the message of A New Way Forward.**](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=1d3479f219&e=b8ba94fd9b)
Unlike Ted Cruz, we don’t have a massive podcast audience to talk to. Which is why we’re traveling across the state, and talking to people where they are.
**Please join our grassroots movement today with a donation of $10 or more and together let’s defeat Ted Cruz and give him more time to do what he really loves: podcasting!**

subject: They’re voting to censure Rashida today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Today, Congress plans to vote on right-wing extremist Marjorie Taylor
Greene’s resolution to censure Rashida Tlaib for demanding a ceasefire in
Gaza.

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Sinema limited background checks HOURS before shooting
body:
Sinema put politics over Americans’ lives | | | Peter – Did you see? The Arizona Republic reported that just HOURS before this weekend’s mass shooting in Maine –in which a mentally ill veteran killed 18 people and wounded 13 others–that **Kyrsten Sinema voted with Republicans to LIMIT background checks.** Specifically, she voted to limit the Department of Veterans Affairs from coordinating with the FBI on background checks. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDXZXZQ3QRmqs1HTpJ-RMwyLY0NEA1zebOpbjmtgnCJw38pLAKEZ1fv_7MdR1Lmia_eVAJnsC9Tntt9LhnIoYIxUT4MznxO_ut01zsRR7sJEWMtF313Hpf50isEyH8380SYmwNnHPTDs7b8iB-ladCDlgtQAZl4kGyJTLbvVz8bclnUEwMGy56NCm1lH_GLjnf3HPLI_pFgNjr4kRvC95abwka9_-tK62Ni7VH8nSZDtSQisUagpL7XNfUXAm75Aok6e8kktZ-MM42TWF2fmLlHsnJU4GGXdQbOo279xE3Iw1yGVw38ZIZ81fcsxGrbUI/40x/-wHqjmnERu-jzoJ3pqnKdg/h0/yEadY6dLR4lgZnxyQWPrJ5ZTi1Tnkf9NO0Mafan-Kfw) Meanwhile, **Sinema likes to take credit for half-measures.** We supported the bipartisan legislation passed after the Uvalde school massacre, which took some important steps but didn’t go nearly far enough. **Because of Sinema’s REFUSAL to budge on the filibuster, Democrats were BLOCKED from passing universal background checks, reinstating the assault weapons ban, and restricting high capacity magazines.** And Sinema BRAGS about her role in that obstruction. subject: There is only one way forward

Fellow American,

I write this having just been elected by my colleagues as the 56th Speaker of the United States House of Representatives.

The task of leading our House majority is a great one, and to say that I’m humbled by the faith my colleagues have bestowed on me is an understatement.

My message to you today is this: When Republicans come together, there is no measure of what we can achieve.

In the near term, my team and I will work to make sure that we’re passing responsible, fiscally conservative legislation to fund our government and support our military. **And with an election a little more than twelve months away, we’ll work around the clock to grow our House majority and help EVERY Republican incumbent in their reelection campaign.**

clean_body: There is no limit to the things Republicans can achieve when we work together. | | Fellow American, I write this having just been elected by my colleagues as the 56th Speaker of the United States House of Representatives. The task of leading our House majority is a great one, and to say that I’m humbled by the faith my colleagues have bestowed on me is an understatement. My message to you today is this: When Republicans come together, there is no measure of what we can achieve. In the near term, my team and I will work to make sure that we’re passing responsible, fiscally conservative legislation to fund our government and support our military. And with an election a little more than twelve months away, we’ll work around the clock to grow our House majority and help EVERY Republican incumbent in their reelection campaign. As we move forward, I need to know that we have your support. For liberty, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want to know your thoughts
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjnuq3iis6vmg5fpevcao9sahr2bdg1hl0ugjl88_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3hm1o74cth2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z94oheqvippsmqegtpcfs76rodq4qfqjr1ccc6vg_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3hm1o74cth2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkpg6jd6lsepq6hk7n5qsrqqvtq7e6vbb75ci5p0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3hm1o74cth2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdn5fprl7qot865ssl0sivqid7o581v5flsvgrn0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3hm1o74cth2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zueplo51mfkjd82o17ljua6riae2sqg2o9gf1imo_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3hm1p71cjh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztokpl8qb9h5cdoukbt4kev73ljh1l4901lv65f8_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3hm1p71cjh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z13fl4klaff915qpb524h790ofvajhoqv46dm710_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3hm1p71cjh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfibejv7qneegkivhprr710og9cnf8303tid1boo_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3hm1p71cjh2bs)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: I couldn’t be more excited to share this news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
My lifelong best friend, my first-ever progressive ally – my incredible sister – Susheela Jayapal has launched her campaign for Congress!
#
Peter — My lifelong best friend, my first-ever progressive ally — my incredible sister — Susheela Jayapal has launched her campaign for Congress!
**I couldn't be more excited to share this news (and these cute photos of us from back in the day) with you!**
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46933?refcode=em20231101-3114&t=1&akid=3114%2E420207%2EVCD7tX) | [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46933?refcode=em20231101-3114&t=2&akid=3114%2E420207%2EVCD7tX)
---|---
Growing up, our parents taught us the importance of working hard to make things better, even if that means causing a little good trouble. It's what's led us to fight for progressive values like health care for all, climate justice, and abortion rights.
For years in Oregon, my colleague Congressman Blumenauer has been a tireless progressive, leading the way on so many crucial issues. His "radically effective" legacy will be sorely missed in Congress after his retirement and our progressive movement will need a new strong progressive ally to fight by our side. **I know Susheela is ready to join in that fight and deliver results for poor and working people across the country.**
Susheela immigrated to America at just 16 years old to attend college—paving the way for me to do the same just a few short years later. We were both inspired by the promise of America, and we're both committed to ensuring America lives up to its promise of opportunity for all.
Susheela served on the Multnomah County Commission where she led efforts to build more affordable housing, increase access to community health services, and support survivors of domestic violence and sex trafficking.
**I'm so proud to call her "sister," and with your support, I can't wait to call her "congresswoman."**
With MAGA Republicans in Congress causing chaos, I need a trusted progressive champion like Susheela by my side to help protect our democracy and our rights.
Susheela refuses corporate PAC dollars and is relying on grassroots donors like you to help fuel this campaign. **[Can we count on you to chip in?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46933?refcode=em20231101-3114&t=3&akid=3114%2E420207%2EVCD7tX)**
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46933?refcode=em20231101-3114&t=22&akid=3114%2E420207%2EVCD7tX)**
>From the bottom of my heart, thank you!
— Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20231101-3114-footer&t=23&refcode2=3114_420207_VCD7tX&akid=3114%2E420207%2EVCD7tX)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=3114%2E420207%2EVCD7tX)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=3114%2E420207%2EVCD7tX)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Steve Kerrigan
subject: Jen Grigoraitis for Mayor of Melrose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Peter,
Jen Grigoraitis has a plan for Melrose – one that moves the city forward, without leaving anyone behind. And she has the experience to back that plan up. And now she needs your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jenformelrose]
When I first worked with Jen in the Attorney General’s office, I saw first hand that Jen is a public servant through and through. She’s a fighter for Democratic values and issues and I know she’ll bring the same dedication to the office of Mayor of Melrose as she has for her entire career.
When it comes to managing the city’s $100 million budget, Jen has the experience needed to succeed. As the former Chief of Staff for the Massachusetts Office for Victim Assistance (MOVA), she oversaw a multi-million dollar statewide budget – experience that will help her plan and optimize for Melrose’s future.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/33694F466E68532B4F33636358506139436B64324C75327A514C37575358535255366D2F5945656A5834557459436B676F347547306A6B357443733052573776/editor_images/IMG_0919_pp.jpg]
When it comes to championing small businesses, Jen’s been a champion for years. As the City Councilor for Ward 6, she represented much of the city’s commercial sector. As Mayor, she will take her experience working directly with the business community and continue to support Melrose’s thriving business corridors.
And when it comes to affordable housing, Jen has a proven track record of success. Jen helped create the city’s Affordable Housing Trust to develop and maintain housing access. As Mayor, she will continue to invest in affordable, accessible housing for every resident.
Election Day is Tuesday, November 7th . Melrose residents can find their polling location by clicking here [http://wheredoivotema.com/] .
You can learn more about Jen by clicking here [https://jenformelrose.com/] .
Sincerely,
Steve Kerrigan
Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party Executive Director
Massachusetts Democratic Party

Friend, this is urgent. [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=4cf4a6f00d3b4f38af5cb74733fc48e9&_e=UALqdNvyMAyNTE9PAL_dXTsPJQA9mMTlp2hO1_GGptT6HZwAYMLboTJIfvloRTU9yQ45asQYvNdLsiZ2Udxz8xw5gdylIbuN9cHpQfLxEGyBYIpMus6CpSeVZCVp0UnFQwSyAEjIOejatgWbuUB72N1SJ4vd703ppYjtHOazFYa3nZ-_wlekxsFQ5aM74YCMaa0Sp9HWiJvt0UWhzKJBGPz7gi4-X7iWaARL7KNGKYC0Dh-Ei4GQkY4Eiz5iIbGnUETK1yjx65qBBJe-j2XHnjyMBVgn0_WXQulPLeUoQovSxsKqFYe8vRVKOP1jydkF) **[I just got off the phone with my team - we just missed our End-of-Month Fundraising Goal. I know we have been emailing you a lot, but we're extending the deadline for 24 more hours to ensure our numbers are met.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=4cf4a6f00d3b4f38af5cb74733fc48e9&_e=UALqdNvyMAyNTE9PAL_dXTsPJQA9mMTlp2hO1_GGptT6HZwAYMLboTJIfvloRTU9yQ45asQYvNdLsiZ2Udxz8xw5gdylIbuN9cHpQfLxEGyBYIpMus6CpSeVZCVp0UnFQwSyAEjIOejatgWbuUB72N1SJ4vd703ppYjtHOazFYY96MpPz5f9xxY9TvLXLQ1Oe0P1FwNkLcIOPRX7CgT-cK6xmPnfqqRn8MhH-GmNXWq-C0jTJqMP7dcd2Wjj27Ps7sbTRDGv04XfQQxt38iEfq0I18sWNsit_uNQDSvHZusFQBkKkKqAb5X_GPzNv4U9)** **Donate now to help us reach our goal and WIN the Senate in 2024.**
The 2024 election is nearing closer and closer, and my team has made it clear that _**we must make our monthly goals.**_ This is non-negotiable. So, I decided to reach out to a few of my strongest supporters - including you.

Democrats are pushing their already radical policies further and further to the Left, and we must stop them ASAP. Our political class is lost, and the stakes are too high to ignore. **Americans are looking for ways to get society back on track, and it's time for a new dynamic in Washington.**

**[CLICK HERE NOW to help reach our goal and WIN the Senate in 2024.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=4cf4a6f00d3b4f38af5cb74733fc48e9&_e=UALqdNvyMAyNTE9PAL_dXTsPJQA9mMTlp2hO1_GGptT6HZwAYMLboTJIfvloRTU9yQ45asQYvNdLsiZ2Udxz8xw5gdylIbuN9cHpQfLxEGyBYIpMus6CpSeVZCVp0UnFQwSyAEjIOejatgWbuUB72N1SJ4vd703ppYjtHOazFYZ5HO_tQtvRCYdICE9GAG7O1lqyb0Jthjb01piFhrHwWBOmVyBiSLiVeN-_8FyC2h2Ez-1HRRo0WYUa1ol02U9YfIuVV75en7VNgA-Git-wpNUONzjSe0H7sYnDy8-qleS77MgGAKIv-AqoGnDRgXGV)**

_I 'm so grateful to have your support - I know you'll have my back. _

Thank you,
JD Vance

clean_body: We don't have much time | Friend, this is urgent. Donate now to help us reach our goal and WIN the Senate in 2024. The 2024 election is nearing closer and closer, and my team has made it clear that we must make our monthly goals. This is non-negotiable. So, I decided to reach out to a few of my strongest supporters - including you. Democrats are pushing their already radical policies further and further to the Left, and we must stop them ASAP. Our political class is lost, and the stakes are too high to ignore. Americans are looking for ways to get society back on track, and it's time for a new dynamic in Washington. I 'm so grateful to have your support - I know you'll have my back. Thank you, JD Vance | Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. Fellow American,

Most people know Mike Johnson as the new Speaker of the House, a constitutional law attorney, and small business owner – but to our family, he’s husband, dad, and role model.

My name is Kelly Johnson, and I’m Mike’s wife and his number one supporter. We’ve been married for 23 years now, and I have never known anyone who is more tirelessly committed to serving God, our country, and its people—or who fights as hard for our principles every single day. He was born with that servant’s heart.

Mike is respected for his courage and integrity and trusted for his wisdom and insight. He is honest, principled, smart, and unshakeable. That’s precisely what America needs in these times of unprecedented challenge.

[**I wanted you to hear a bit more about my husband Mike, from me, the person who knows him best. Americans – in ALL political parties, of ALL ages, of ALL walks of life – see that the world is falling apart under Crooked Joe. They also remember perfectly well how great our country was doing when I was your President. That’s why we now hold an incredible 10-POINT LEAD over Biden. So, in a last-ditch effort to try and beat us, Crooked Joe and his Democrat henchmen have decided to try and REMOVE MY NAME from the BALLOT. A TRIAL is currently taking place in a top battleground state to try and do exactly that – REMOVE my name from the ballot and hand the election to Biden. If they can’t get the people to vote against me, then they will try to forcibly __stop you from voting for me. Our country needs YOU to show these tyrants that they cannot stop the American people! That’s why I’m asking YOU to pledge your support on this solemn day to show that you are 100% committed to voting to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN on the 2024 Ballot. Thank you, Donald J. name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Friend, allow me to introduce myself.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|

| | |
Hi there Friend,

It's Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.

_**I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. **_

I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and sacrifice.

I attended Louisiana State University, where I received a degree in business and later my law degree.

As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values.

clean_body: | | | | Hi there Friend, It's Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson. I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and sacrifice. I attended Louisiana State University, where I received a degree in business and later my law degree. As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values. | | | | "Generic Button" But most importantly, I am husband to my wife Kelly and father to our four amazing children. | | | | "Generic Button" I'm honored to serve as Speaker of the House and to work with you to expand our conservative Majority in 2024. We have so much work to accomplish, and I can't wait to get started. But I need to ask you one favor. I set a goal of activating 5,000 grassroots donors so I can hit the ground running. "Will you join my team today and help me fight for our conservative values by expanding our Majority in 2024? " | | | "Generic Button" Thank you for your unwavering commitment to our conservative movement. God Bless, Speaker Mike Johnson | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Peter, we're on fire right now!

Thanks to supporters like you who came together, chipped in, and stood with me last month, we blew our October GOTV fundraising goal out of the water.

But look, now is when the real test begins. **In just 6 days, Mississippi faces a major gubernatorial showdown!**

It's decision time for voters: Stick with Tate Reeves and four more years of corruption, or go for new leadership that gives power back to the people and tells the good ole boys in Jackson that their party's over.

The answer is crystal clear, and that's why we can't afford to sit around. Every minute in the next six days matters as we rally voters to the polls.

[That's why my team set an ambitious final GOTV goal of $50,000 by November 7th. It’s do or die. body:
There is no limit to the things Republicans can achieve when we work together. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=82cead89ac5449f68cc009bd3bbe13bf&_t=I1Xvwyd_C9YuWfC_Tyv9HJFZujehuQwtUEXHHlFQOzHXBkSKwnW1lCvHZ8nrnwN_69aETg-gEFu9sB2EF_WGW8dFBGAM77JQ6u5NeBGudUU%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=82cead89ac5449f68cc009bd3bbe13bf&_t=I1Xvwyd_C9YuWfC_Tyv9HJFZujehuQwtUEXHHlFQOzHXBkSKwnW1lCvHZ8nrnwN_69aETg-gEFu9sB2EF_WGW8dFBGAM77JQ6u5NeBGudUU%3D)
