Peter,

I write this having just been elected by my colleagues as the 56th Speaker of the United States House of Representatives.

The task of leading our House majority is a great one, and to say that I’m humbled by the faith my colleagues have bestowed on me is an understatement.

My message to you today is this: When Republicans come together, there is no measure of what we can achieve.

In the near term, my team and I will work to make sure that we’re passing responsible, fiscally conservative legislation to fund our government and support our military. **And with an election a little more than twelve months away, we’ll work around the clock to grow our House majority and help EVERY Republican incumbent in their reelection campaign.**

**As we move forward, I need to know that we have your support.**[**Please give me a sign that you’re on Team Johnson by becoming a Week One supporter right now.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=82cead89ac5449f68cc009bd3bbe13bf&_e=6kv0PknGA5baWqdOb05u0Aop83eTlOZ3Q3L1A3z2lLTvJHEWX5ovEA9zA9E1ykMTbDBsVoeS18GL0SknjVY5_MEVNw-JFJkIiQLi1r2K5OWHv2uvFn_C16K00Ty4a7G4zwvWhSwN7giPp1pjo1bL9pNxDOfKe4SHpQSvc66RYlS2yElVaXtPN2exwU1i6SV1xsCPBDL2QTfjOkTslHMWIir2CMMhDrdm-ztgEdQAuC_QvDfgiTAtUWP4Zf43BNW3mEg5v91y6ETfOp4FtCXHH7RB9HuxNaFuTBdIkJ6L0hD8O9jLH0JK7bShsRgu5WsF7oCPc4-VJQ41N3kQ8rwG3wE4htdzTyJRaehMap1jBCPksp6ozNBpEz_ShYjcZUBsyIyTPJzY6Ci8FZAOWFckeFtRbzAiTaa_lsf9qa0soZF3-d5H0_qdjsduXG-LCPHdYZTB73RkoREC4q2EhSILbpW-kDe4sJJqUwnbvO-o5_AlTvRT6zdvjjh6OGlDXOgQRV-pTUPNv1J4krjaG_jojhn8s6RL1Iu67i8okbfbU9Y%3D)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: How do you uphold your religious liberty in today's climate?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znam2jr5s0ulnci5ebp8mdlpf52caarvebkogkm0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3jm4ob2c3h2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zap61360cvsegmvssm8claa5ehe7hl2uvies8br0_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3jm4ob2c3h2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm64bbpjq4me27kipbesoll5u802pvesvoi9pg1g_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3jm4ob2c3h2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrl73a2k38ko76rm6ehi9ojerphin90cbh3pgiuo_rp22sh2s8i66p70s3jm4ob2c3h2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

subject: A bit about the Speaker of the House
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
My name is Kelly Johnson, and I’m Mike’s wife and his number one supporter. We’ve been married almost 24 years now. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=dd90004f23df48e0942a340a4ac502fa&_t=RLfa7LOE25-7dG6wNpCJkL5HbkU4_h7J449ivGwKKlQy4yvISKwjJifdz1SYBsOFD7RVUd1MBTtdCsiVht8m0SMAisMIw9uT8lipWKRkGCM%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=dd90004f23df48e0942a340a4ac502fa&_t=RLfa7LOE25-7dG6wNpCJkL5HbkU4_h7J449ivGwKKlQy4yvISKwjJifdz1SYBsOFD7RVUd1MBTtdCsiVht8m0SMAisMIw9uT8lipWKRkGCM%3D)
[ ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=dd90004f23df48e0942a340a4ac502fa&_e=wAHBOAaCOHyVU6xBPPVYH-rSQ0OiZI5E4G_7ys7KgLsTiAxP5UdTPLelf5ZJQ00MvShaHeuu02QDXxIBG5oKosWYc-fZtIgdFsKlYB9qaDVB6MGxz_a-k_nVGP9N0vIpxQeZkNtLiKw03ZJfuoDxJ-_SnewH0hYXPvzBOf3ifruJ7fc6EqovWwr4dlylVEUTRA1M_otZXRtaokGVc_t4y4RaOXy1_K3HDxx1t5KrvK2QIT9vu8lgvVPTFROuIFLmTjdrbtTdvkiAQSNn4vIWZ6S8grgbGSfS6mdwwGrI0OxFxVKMCQrGwDQEjoha-4tJv0fnQebpwu_MKUVUoeGwEarIL0LNP2Y4heHBdt1e86HYDw2dFrmednjtL-FkNWs_)
---
Fellow American,

Most people know Mike Johnson as the new Speaker of the House, a constitutional law attorney, and small business owner – but to our family, he’s husband, dad, and role model.

My name is Kelly Johnson, and I’m Mike’s wife and his number one supporter. We’ve been married for 23 years now, and I have never known anyone who is more tirelessly committed to serving God, our country, and its people—or who fights as hard for our principles every single day. He was born with that servant’s heart.

Mike is respected for his courage and integrity and trusted for his wisdom and insight. He is honest, principled, smart, and unshakeable. That’s precisely what America needs in these times of unprecedented challenge.

[**I wanted you to hear a bit more about my husband Mike, from me, the person who knows him best. Would you be willing to spare a moment to watch this video I recorded for you?**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=dd90004f23df48e0942a340a4ac502fa&_e=wAHBOAaCOHyVU6xBPPVYH-rSQ0OiZI5E4G_7ys7KgLsTiAxP5UdTPLelf5ZJQ00MvShaHeuu02QDXxIBG5oKosWYc-fZtIgdFsKlYB9qaDVB6MGxz_a-k_nVGP9N0vIpxQeZkNtLiKw03ZJfuoDxJ-_SnewH0hYXPvzBOf3ifruJ7fc6EqovWwr4dlylVEUTRA1M_otZXRtaokGVc_t4y4RaOXy1_K3HDxx1t5KrvK3KF_db09gmzt_1l-BghWT3207JIj88gYs4TP7jeoR-cOlo1F-1wP20q4g61HYys-rt01WeZTX_AZc5eP9YeUTpXv10snekytw1swLBn2TP5P85aG9X2-OcjJ47H9D5L9YCEBQNOxgyQcK9BrYe6y5d)

clean_body: My name is Kelly Johnson, and I’m Mike’s wife and his number one supporter. We’ve been married almost 24 years now. | | Fellow American, Most people know Mike Johnson as the new Speaker of the House, a constitutional law attorney, and small business owner – but to our family, he’s husband, dad, and role model. My name is Kelly Johnson, and I’m Mike’s wife and his number one supporter. We’ve been married for 23 years now, and I have never known anyone who is more tirelessly committed to serving God, our country, and its people—or who fights as hard for our principles every single day. He was born with that servant’s heart. Mike is respected for his courage and integrity and trusted for his wisdom and insight. He is honest, principled, smart, and unshakeable. That’s precisely what America needs in these times of unprecedented challenge. I am grateful every day that our four beautiful children have such a strong role model and devoted father. We are in the greatest fight yet for the heart, soul, and direction of our country. As you know, the future that Democrats have envisioned for America is horrifying. God bless, Kelly Johnson | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? clean_body: Support has been overwhelming, so I decided to extend our deadline for 24 hours. | | | | Friend, thank you! We just crushed our 1st End of Month goal! And because of the overwhelming support of countless grassroots Conservatives, I have decided to extend our deadline for 24 hours. Together we sent the Democrats and their media allies a loud and clear message that we are ready to fight in 2024. But some patriots missed their chance to join us, so I wanted to give you 1 more chance to join this group of dedicated conservatives. "Chip in today to join the thousands of other conservative patriots who are ready to win in 2024. " **DEADLINE EXTENDED FOR 24 HOURS | | | "Generic Button" | | | | "Generic Button" DEADLINE EXTENDED FOR 24 HOURS Democrats and the media had written us off. But together, Friend, we proved them wrong once again. The outpouring of support you have shown me these last few days is enough to make this Louisiana boy blush. I'm just getting started, and with your help I'll keep fighting for our shared conservative values. So please, chip in now to join my team before our deadline expires at 11:59 PM. I look forward to seeing your name on my roster. God Bless, Speaker Mike Johnson | P.S. The support you have shown me these last few days has humbled me. I am so honored to serve you as Speaker of the House, and to lead the fight for our shared conservative values. | | | "Generic Button" DEADLINE EXTENDED FOR 24 HOURS** | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. P., Authorities carry out a multistage search on land and water for a man who killed 18 people and wounded 13 in a mass shooting at a bowling alley and bar that has gripped the entire state of Maine in fear. The active shooting incidents in America are out of control and that's why we are going to host an Active Shooter Session on zoom for everyone in our database. How many of you have ever attended Active Shooter Training? This education is offered by Generations For America on demand, by video and or in person through our Community Awareness and Prevention Program. We have been teaching active shooter training for years now because we want to keep families safe. Join us for free there is no charge because this training can save you and your loves one. Make sure to [register at our website](https://www.generationsforamerica.com/so/bcOXEdMhq/c?w=wmkYuAizqOafv7tWfpbPH1eI0sz67zsY0QSFuXiyGu4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ2VuZXJhdGlvbnNmb3JhbWVyaWNhLmNvbS9ldmVudHMtMS9hY3RpdmUtc2hvb3Rlci10cmFpbmluZyIsInIiOiI2MTUwNTU4Ny04NzkxLTQ3N2EtNWNhNC1jNzczMmQ1NjNkY2MiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIwMzcyYjMxOS1jM2FmLTRlMTUtYTIxNi00OTAxY2E1YWQ1M2QifQ). James Voymas, our Zoom host, will help you if needed. You may contact him at 617-968-1048 via text or call, or you may email him at james.voymas@gmail.com. Below is what you'll need to participate. name: =?utf-8?Q?Alfonso=20For=20Congress?=
subject: November Newsletter: Alfonso for Congress
body:
Happy November and Happy Native American Heritage Month! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/alfonsoforcongress.com/november-newsletter-alfonso-for-congress?e=16d812e81c)
---
| |
---
| |
# **Happy November and Happy Native American Heritage Month!**
This month is an opportunity to honor and celebrate the cultures, traditions, and contributions of Indigenous peoples in Southwest Michigan. Michigan's fourth district was home to the Potawatomi nation long before non-native settlers came to the area, and remains home to over four thousand American Indian and Alaska Native residents. By acknowledging and appreciating the heritage, resilience, and enduring legacy of Michigan's Native Americans tribes, our district can work towards promoting inclusivity, preserving traditions, and supporting the advancement of Indigenous voices in our community.
---
|
---
| |
# NOVEMBER NEWS
---
| **Election Day is November 7: **Head to the polls next Tuesday and let your voice be heard in local politics! While Tuesday's elections may not be on the national scale, there are several positions and proposals on the ballot in counties across MI-04.
---
| [VOTER REGISTRATION AND INFORMATION](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=ce8553aab4&e=16d812e81c "VOTER REGISTRATION AND INFORMATION")
---
|
**Ongoing Conflict in Gaza: **The ongoing Israel-Palestine conflict continues to exact a devastating toll, resulting in the tragic loss of lives and the destruction of livelihoods on both sides. Moreover, the prolonged hostilities have inflicted severe economic damage, exacerbating the suffering of communities already grappling with hardship. As the conflict persists, it becomes increasingly evident that promoting peace through constructive dialogue and understanding is imperative for the well-being and stability of all involved. All efforts must be directed towards cultivating an environment of harmony and coexistence, where the voices of all affected communities are heard and respected, laying the groundwork for a lasting and just resolution.
---
|
**New Speaker of the House:** Republican Representative Mike Johnson was voted in as Speaker of the House after his party failed three times in as many weeks to gather the votes necessary to elect a Speaker. The Republicans demonstrated during these weeks of chaos and disarray that even in the midst of global crisis, they were more concerned with petty politics than leading our country and being a global voice of peace. **2024 is our chance to flip the House blue and get back to the important work of serving the American people rather than our own political agendas. Donate today to elect Joseph Alfonso in MI-04 and bring common sense and integrity back to Congress. **

---
| [DONATE TO JOSEPH ALFONSO NOW](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=dd60879e56&e=16d812e81c "DONATE TO JOSEPH ALFONSO NOW")
---

| | [](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=0e4f38666c&e=16d812e81c)
---
|
---

Alfonso for CongressP.O Box 1375Holland, MI 49422

Peter,

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: 7 Signs Of The Times + Q&A Session
body:
7 Signs Of The Times There is so much talk about End Times Biblical Prophecy with all that is happening in our world, and rightfully so. However, m
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3114434.1021.1.6673dd1be72ff9dcbc7ddfe6b0c3e806) |
---
## 7 Signs Of The Times
---
There is so much talk about **End Times Biblical Prophecy** with all that is happening in our world, _and rightfully so_. However, many "**YouTube Preachers** " have sown seeds of confusion into the Body of Christ concerning this area of Scripture. **I am convinced that the BEST commentary on the Bible is the Bible itself.** Therefore, tonight at 7pm, I will do a biblical teaching on the "**7 SIGNS OF THE TIMES** " followed by a **Q &A session** at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3114434.1022.1.5d7f0dfe46b40f11a90f5b84b58d4f22) Tulsa. Join me for what will be a thorough study of what Scripture says about the signs to look for at the end of the age. You can join in-person or online at [https://www.youtube.com/@sheridanchurch](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3114434.1023.1.3067c239a3f161f57dc5dc8dc231e4b3)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3114434.1024.1.2006e20c76af933dfe7a7f6eaedb1512)
---
Recently at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3114434.1025.1.44bd5db93e6477c5dd9561b85a5d7a73) Tulsa & OKC, I committed the entire sermon to explaining **End Times Biblical Prophecy** and where we are on the timeline.
I addressed **Ezekiel 38** from an in-depth perspective along with the **Israel/Hamas War** that we are witnessing.
This message I know will benefit you and help you understand what the Bible says _MUST_ take place in the **Last Days**..
Watch it here: [The End Times EXPLANIED](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3114434.1026.1.11eff3f208480b9a58ff7d9c971ecd46)
| | [ Watch: Ezekiel 38 ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3114434.1027.1.d405fe8a13d917af2ec90fa642c89f5a)
---
|
---
---
## New Building Updates
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3114434.1028.1.93a9096024e1746d36e10a9b9b3cda3c)
---
It has been a little over a month since we moved to our new facility and the progress has been GREAT!
**Here are the upcoming projects to look for:**
**Auditorium**
-TV's to be added throughout the auditorium for the purpose of lyrics & Bible verses
-More lighting in auditorium
**Lobby**
-New ceiling & flooring
**Restrooms**
-The men of Sheridan know what needs to be removed and replaced...
**Kids & Youth**
-Both nursery's will be complete and youth room will be updated with new carpet and layout
These are the updates that we plan to complete here in the near future.
We are doing this entire renovation on a cash basis.
Thank you for your generosity that has accomplished so much and please consider continuing to partner with us so we can get the job done!
You can give at [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3114434.1029.1.d8badb178411a24b8ff162445769394a)
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3114434.1030.1.aaee4e4bb62d11f3edbb24b82a4e3c99), GAB, [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3114434.1031.1.f318d6cfef037108fe67f4b04c69a404), [Instagram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3114434.1032.1.743e4b8b246ba2f1a840ce69521ac8c2), [Twitter](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3114434.1033.1.6cb7c3ad975a7c66b09627aa854aa30d), [Telegram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3114434.1034.1.973085a48557560d649a2d0636064986), GETTR & [YouTube](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3114434.1035.1.b0a010d8e9e6777df80b4a40d224e52f)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3114434.1036.1.5fb9ebb080ba3266b635ea7ec4abff26)
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3114434.1037.1.602407cef21a50a82c667888dd64bceb)

name: Team WFP
subject: This is really scary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
During an interview with Fox News, Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin admitted to what we’ve all feared. | | | Halloween may be over, but this is really scary, Peter. During an interview with Fox News, Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin admitted to what we’ve all feared: If Republicans keep their majority in the House and flip the State Senate in Virginia —**Republicans will no longer have “a group of progressive left Senators that will block [them] at every turn” in their attempt to pass far-right legislation like an abortion ban.** Right now the legislature in Virginia is split — with Republicans holding a slim majority in the House, and Democrats with an even smaller majority in the Senate. But with newly drawn districts and every seat in the legislature on the ballot next week — this election could go either way. Now that Gov. Youngkin has taken his mask off, we know what we need to do. **With less than one week till Election Day, we must go all out to reach voters in Virginia to flip the House and keep the Senate in order to stop Republicans and Gov. Youngkin’s right-wing agenda.[Will you chip in $10 now to help us get out the vote in this final week?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU-YLS5wnFxS-PGfZUxnaGEwnzpT9rwHgcMpx7fdhfJUmCdPLOvuWCUGfI8uS9qtFLc1dcIjkuC-Kfk735uut5vPTuYUt7si92VSwMTk8tdlhqySPcHTKUXASYvsI9Wpht3Q34e34nhxjYl7j3K46AEXw6H9vTHr4Agi_GT1e1k9kbMfsnv_EsueVB0a4X9V6IOA7nd5eIJG5xWm_6KDaoeBaHAY4PKz_9D_nceX-H6PAVj9K8tI1hXIwDjpd3NNzaLkeMH2Rj1BWXqJZANz0XsV00LlmcAHMcv5TQpt5-xsgnrKNkrW7jhIMln8sKtlRSCDjjvvj3gkLRIJqgSKL77bVuuC7qXdhRLX21jnr4091Xy-qUzbznbFG_7l_9bdLL/40x/aFyEmMVvR-e5fN59hyPfLQ/h0/5ipS38TXF8LvyeJb9jW83FWza7CyaWQrw6enGo33ZP8)** **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU-YLS5wnFxS-PGfZUxnaGEwnzpT9rwHgcMpx7fdhfJUmCdPLOvuWCUGfI8uS9qtFL3McLgyblPVQukMpogGuUDbJMESnX-mBCXo9rVB-y02DhzG1AFWIXVV-Lm67T44SONX1hkky9w87MldKNkpNOOhaU8OW5FTJBufrG_pTpJU5DSKUVO1jBZDmrqaWTUtuOasHWvcxeDxSIJo2O3YxjEe6FtiRKvm21Z57odeqPPReRFEEM1bplg2dnvsigRVm5K9-e57bVTL-j8QVxEpCeAGpuqhVUhv3jv05ROUsChcuEXGrsr7mY-Lb20tDBRzYc6ciZlc2kubm-jfBDn5TJtM7R-U3xbAn7xbL070ah0cDUrhQv3ujB7NO_QyL4u4H0/40x/aFyEmMVvR-e5fN59hyPfLQ/h1/3SxVxj0Jclg_7wydOyLvPHm6j47ljp5ferN2R1HyQ9s)** This year we’ve endorsed nearly 20 candidates in Virginia who will fight to protect abortion rights in Virginia — the last state in the South where abortion isn't restricted. clean_body: During an interview with Fox News, Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin admitted to what we’ve all feared. | | | Halloween may be over, but this is really scary, Peter. During an interview with Fox News, Virginia Governor Glenn Youngkin admitted to what we’ve all feared: If Republicans keep their majority in the House and flip the State Senate in Virginia —Republicans will no longer have “a group of progressive left Senators that will block [them] at every turn” in their attempt to pass far-right legislation like an abortion ban. Right now the legislature in Virginia is split — with Republicans holding a slim majority in the House, and Democrats with an even smaller majority in the Senate. But with newly drawn districts and every seat in the legislature on the ballot next week — this election could go either way. Now that Gov. Youngkin has taken his mask off, we know what we need to do. With less than one week till Election Day, we must go all out to reach voters in Virginia to flip the House and keep the Senate in order to stop Republicans and Gov. Youngkin’s right-wing agenda. This year we’ve endorsed nearly 20 candidates in Virginia who will fight to protect abortion rights in Virginia — the last state in the South where abortion isn't restricted. But recent polls have Democrats and Republicans virtually tied 1 — which means this election will ultimately come down to turnout. In solidarity, Team WFP P.S. Got time to make calls? Source: 1\. , 13News Now, Oct. 24, 2023. Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Do you want to see the next Presidential Debate in Miami? Chip in before 11:59 p.m. on Thursday. | | Fellow American, I want to see you in the crowd when I take center stage for the third presidential debate in Miami. We're giving away (2) tickets to the debate in Miami - one for you and a guest. All you have to do is chip in any amount before midnight tomorrow! During the first two debates, I made it clear where I stand on the issues. I have become the establishment's number one target - and I know they're gearing up to come for me again. I am not going to let you down, Fellow American, and I hope you won't let me down either. Let's win this next debate with YOU by my side. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. In addition to two tickets (one for you and a guest), we'll provide airfare and accommodations for this historic debate. | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. body:
Gov. Roy Cooper here. I’m reaching out at a pivotal moment. The upcoming Virginia elections are six days away, and we need your help to combat a Republican power grab. Can I count on you? | | |
---
| | [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zhFQI5RXeVE44K-I2sPBm6vzCiVYBEq-UpyY2L3aPR9u0IKJM45BvvotLKO63kQeqM8D4TOXIW2CTAG5qZdXG0kkkj-A26mL8IGNcK6fEI2dgYEitFPW7ouS3jZTmcdbXRPu_BiAuJguX4_Oc1YxIqhXWlBu7EBPnH7D98Qb3U1FWzxogE4bQia-k_tP6kCz7bzPPVpDSGTR9BTwT7gs7BikCF1e97e3GjQYUwve9YjUE3TPy8ufQao4bgmqF_op4rFg6s9U7eNWi9rGwdTkDXqx9emnE_tPhV__olWtaeQK7H_Xw6oN5c2AlCNQhotqmKo2I-UZNsFiZEGbAQcfB7OOiueegn9I8ymHeSjB1kOxYzBImISxnvfIH6XiJqiK3RN62ANiYvuvyDNM1Ok-0V6bYue0Dt4G1SB9_kPRx8FqZo42v0r_NByC4yGLu2dPt3IvVXcuPYF9j9XlNNBXrNR6Y1Pmm0Ofx3NsPBlw7_-zHLe--18vYxkcbW1yKDViA3ScvgYgZGrdJU9KnYaSR-/40x/Dwv2U1PySbeN7RwA-uDcAg/h0/TL-Os9A_-D0lY3FY8bsg-Wrxm0vTMAGtI9DSRFe-DA0) We need to talk about Virginia’s upcoming elections, and I hope you’ll take the time to hear me out. As Governor of North Carolina, I’ve witnessed firsthand the damage a Republican legislature can do. Clinging to their one vote supermajority they have diverted funding for public schools, given tax breaks to the wealthy, and overridden my veto to restrict abortion rights. **Now, our neighbors in Virginia are on the brink of a similar reality. It’s all going to come down to how the votes turn out on Election Day,_exactly six days away._** The elections in Virginia are not just about one state; they’re precursors for the critical battles to come in 2024 and beyond. My friends at the DLCC are doing everything in their power to keep extreme Republicans from gaining more ground, but they need your help. [We must defend Democrats against their GOP opponents next week. So, will you stand with me and rush $10 to help power the work of the DLCC, defeat extreme Republicans nationwide, and ensure their far-right agenda doesn’t gain any more traction?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zhFQI5RXeVE44K-I2sPBm6vzCiVYBEq-UpyY2L3aPR9u0IKJM45BvvotLKO63kQeqM8D4TOXIW2CTAG5qZdXG0kkkj-A26mL8IGNcK6fEI2dgYEitFPW7ouS3jZTmcdbXRPu_BiAuJguX4_Oc1YxIqhXWlBu7EBPnH7D98Qb3U1IllETlltVzxAlym_NLCPlrzRTntqJcu-crVn12GUCrPCNTX9LbPD7ahKXGs8nE2lNzjRrBd9w3_kb8DQqBZlvAia2d9rewrgOknevQhRjrKVmXnjeDznjf20xvuJFIE2gZH_YA2iuH_FqLQPqMtgpwNSPE7xEjFBvri9WsvIXQLivPyJ2YuhPjYl7o8sBGQxIsC4qILa7GBs_K_yaT9LZ4eEzuoTP1ICZbReYuTUyCTuH33idnRlEZTELlLlgWUyN1cCPXsf1uvNtqzLWpMK_2mKKGSGy7ld_jphuM2w2pe8FF3xPInqiK5piYYiq6Gyg8-edp4nTq8cSSXCSer87rSxHOV1YmZvgmpXWKmoY4w/40x/Dwv2U1PySbeN7RwA-uDcAg/h1/hSuTV2XLpmO935QvNa5GTfuvGmQEiM5nmJRlXs9EuKo) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: Gov. Roy Cooper here. I’m reaching out at a pivotal moment. The upcoming Virginia elections are six days away, and we need your help to combat a Republican power grab. Can I count on you? | | | | | We need to talk about Virginia’s upcoming elections, and I hope you’ll take the time to hear me out. As Governor of North Carolina, I’ve witnessed firsthand the damage a Republican legislature can do. Clinging to their one vote supermajority they have diverted funding for public schools, given tax breaks to the wealthy, and overridden my veto to restrict abortion rights. Now, our neighbors in Virginia are on the brink of a similar reality. It’s all going to come down to how the votes turn out on Election Day,exactly six days away. The elections in Virginia are not just about one state; they’re precursors for the critical battles to come in 2024 and beyond. My friends at the DLCC are doing everything in their power to keep extreme Republicans from gaining more ground, but they need your help. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | I’m counting on supporters in your community to step up today and own a piece of this fight. These last few days are pivotal – we need to make sure Democrats have the resources they need to reach every single voter, and that starts with supporters like you meeting this moment and pitching in to help fuel this fight. Let’s show Republicans that we mean business. With sincere gratitude, Roy Roy Cooper Governor, North Carolina | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by DLCC PAC. Dlcc.org. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: What do you think about the Second Amendment?
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82b4b062a65f4011b13c51665b12cb48&_e=j8MKJvdOAK1e0IdomElk6m4B23JjuTW_-g12vPCWkmh2Yys-3HIkKRBDbucGXNtLuCuCHTnuZO4-EK7F6hoLz0-rVxAJ4ziGdTde1bC4_EvPgrU_enolPDCx06VekjrLLcv1tyZgP8AYANA6Uqx2kabA4c_GE9Sxg9W-koYmaWguYt4tkOh1WLC1iHNjJRkc34i0BJ_nSxMZdPRTRgj4A8eeBU2AvVRs90vqAzFe2xuh2BBNguUdM3iTAErTSFrB0M7hihpv6-fcNeOmuj-mn-4iTGw213SYekYcr7xyFlZKdRHAvFO0NEWT5l1T4aSONHRO_FHBNG7QVOZ-BXcsfysTjLMBIx6-bFrX99dvuB8wzlhQ5gJCqCvIR5M6moap) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution--with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's **Second Amendment Survey** because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82b4b062a65f4011b13c51665b12cb48&_e=j8MKJvdOAK1e0IdomElk6m4B23JjuTW_-g12vPCWkmh2Yys-3HIkKRBDbucGXNtLuCuCHTnuZO4-EK7F6hoLz0-rVxAJ4ziGdTde1bC4_EvPgrU_enolPDCx06VekjrLLcv1tyZgP8AYANA6Uqx2kabA4c_GE9Sxg9W-koYmaWguYt4tkOh1WLC1iHNjJRkc34i0BJ_nSxMZdPRTRgj4A8eeBU2AvVRs90vqAzFe2xsTxby2OKx-gQIXnZpyfd58pbwzZXWHwCmR_IHxHHaK9kuJQ01-0KpmnBhACtHbAn1_UL3jEDIMNYJpDM9ew7nIJTU-ItbIjizQRtcCSTemxRew7Uuskrv_KMDBnKDDV_RX3MTTcbmoexegoJExK4CR "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")

## There is a coordinated effort underway to undermine the Constitution, including the Second Amendment.
[AGREE](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82b4b062a65f4011b13c51665b12cb48&_e=j8MKJvdOAK1e0IdomElk6m4B23JjuTW_-g12vPCWkmh2Yys-3HIkKRBDbucGXNtLuCuCHTnuZO4-EK7F6hoLz0-rVxAJ4ziGdTde1bC4_EvPgrU_enolPDCx06VekjrLLcv1tyZgP8AYANA6Uqx2kabA4c_GE9Sxg9W-koYmaWguYt4tkOh1WLC1iHNjJRkc34i0BJ_nSxMZdPRTRgj4A8eeBU2AvVRs90vqAzFe2xuq2hGw37BedP6jU9BaKeL2oetbj-6rEO24qYuP4QMOBLVtxy64NeuLqAwn3i94Fne6v1UVMREtgxE4ru-oBmWIgnpoaK6mKjk7PFLYxSzyXA-s0mCp4sfN9dv9P5qyCcHIxmB5Zg_4ygI62HX0IW-l) [DISAGREE](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82b4b062a65f4011b13c51665b12cb48&_e=j8MKJvdOAK1e0IdomElk6m4B23JjuTW_-g12vPCWkmh2Yys-3HIkKRBDbucGXNtLuCuCHTnuZO4-EK7F6hoLz0-rVxAJ4ziGdTde1bC4_EvPgrU_enolPDCx06VekjrLLcv1tyZgP8AYANA6Uqx2kabA4c_GE9Sxg9W-koYmaWguYt4tkOh1WLC1iHNjJRkc34i0BJ_nSxMZdPRTRgj4A8eeBU2AvVRs90vqAzFe2xttpZD39R--S7THqsVLW0vGBgTpDcxqVJvnyuv_WQqjYvaCS4T_8HRtCCJse2e-J6USB7pZc3eYLne3KPEgOixorxcLTiIxkIpdw95tpmrAqMzfmi_7j1vDvgTJ8ez_XR3ZKIdepcg21SkHyaE5T1fj) [NOT SURE](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82b4b062a65f4011b13c51665b12cb48&_e=j8MKJvdOAK1e0IdomElk6m4B23JjuTW_-g12vPCWkmh2Yys-3HIkKRBDbucGXNtLuCuCHTnuZO4-EK7F6hoLz0-rVxAJ4ziGdTde1bC4_EvPgrU_enolPDCx06VekjrLLcv1tyZgP8AYANA6Uqx2kabA4c_GE9Sxg9W-koYmaWguYt4tkOh1WLC1iHNjJRkc34i0BJ_nSxMZdPRTRgj4A8eeBU2AvVRs90vqAzFe2xv0zTchoVU6SdJeSOUufZFxVhTab1Sxg34m6IzwYHdBOBi-pd_Y_WX-GT15-eGMdeCCycY_UHeGItpopJxUAmLd9nlt8p-789_k5DlO0tiQltarC0KbLoLRNg0MIXNNyti17eDC-nHQZoCdMjmCeDPC) Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**." This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it 's more important to DO something about it.** That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82b4b062a65f4011b13c51665b12cb48&_e=j8MKJvdOAK1e0IdomElk6m4B23JjuTW_-g12vPCWkmh2Yys-3HIkKRBDbucGXNtLuCuCHTnuZO4-EK7F6hoLz0-rVxAJ4ziGdTde1bC4_EvPgrU_enolPDCx06VekjrLLcv1tyZgP8AYANA6Uqx2kabA4c_GE9Sxg9W-koYmaWguYt4tkOh1WLC1iHNjJRkc34i0BJ_nSxMZdPRTRgj4A8eeBU2AvVRs90vqAzFe2xsmfJYdyu3_BV2K1e8rtgOwAWVrDVGqq4izvVIxKu6NDicQOIP-Q4kR8SR2d4NmM727cBQRbgNAa5t816mVjvU2cgCepyiawTr09IdyCMlRrhlaMoUoAocie_aBIq6yexbJB1orEgJfld13cMtUHRLM) We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution--including the Second Amendment--is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82b4b062a65f4011b13c51665b12cb48&_e=j8MKJvdOAK1e0IdomElk6m4B23JjuTW_-g12vPCWkmh2Yys-3HIkKRBDbucGXNtLuCuCHTnuZO4-EK7F6hoLz0-rVxAJ4ziGdTde1bC4_EvPgrU_enolPDCx06VekjrLLcv1tyZgP8AYANA6Uqx2kabA4c_GE9Sxg9W-koYmaWguYt4tkOh1WLC1iHNjJRkc34i0BJ_nSxMZdPRTRgj4A8eeBU2AvVRs90vqAzFe2xvuFnsvzp8Q3gFrvII3fzH-nTgZyMgS40hJ0t9HzO4e8HYy_8OWoteiJ8RsfE3hWRjOt22LcHV5h_YKMUDUjRgl0MvNmUlK2eMcfva2lzaZ2O9rNpSL-bosQXyF16UU-7clXic7_F_5im_ait-CsUK8)
---

Defend the Constitution

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=82b4b062a65f4011b13c51665b12cb48&_t=pky4w25RGp1HwV52gGX75RXmFAeOLXYOpIVutxAsd6KyOCNX3lp76j0NRcaxd6VO8kxUvaGQ-cc0qoZN7UnMYoRkSa7HZDFjEoBU4OfnP7p8q23E5Oe7BxS-D09L3mDI1pv1oMw89oEzLYXRPOHwzwsr80UJDxTKT7n5xxj78og%3D)

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: We will rise to the challenge
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Thanks to you, we’re starting November strong.
We did it, team.

Thanks to your generous support, we surpassed our end-of-month grassroots goal and will be starting November in an excellent position to resist MAGA Mike Lawler’s extremism and lay the groundwork for the close race ahead.

My resolve to defeat Congressman Mike Lawler has never been stronger. His vote to elevate Mike Johnson as House Speaker confirms what we’ve always known about him: He talks a good game, but always turns around and does what the extreme MAGA Republicans tell him to do.

Time and again, he’s shown this district his true colors—and they’re blazing MAGA Republican red.

We simply cannot afford another term of Mike Lawler and the MAGA chaos in Congress. Our democracy, our fundamental rights, and the future of Medicare and Social Security depend on retaking our House majority. That starts right here by flipping NY-17.

The stakes couldn’t be higher, but I know with this powerful grassroots team in my corner, we will rise to the challenge and get it done.

Yours in the fight,

Mondaire

Peter, I didn’t grow up with power or privilege.
I was born and raised in a working-class family in one of Brooklyn’s many diverse neighborhoods. Throughout my entire childhood and into my young adulthood, I had no real platform to voice my opinions or speak out against the decisions that were _directly_ affecting me and my family.
So when I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black lawmaker ever to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed that – _no matter what_ – I would be a voice for the voiceless and speak for those who had been silenced for so long.
**I’m proud to say that I’ve kept that promise – and this Priorities Survey is a key part of keeping it to this day.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?NEWS=20RELEASE?=
subject: Only 1 Florida Congressman received donations tied to Bankman-Fried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Judge for Congress
body:
TARPON SPRINGS, Fla. – As disgraced FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried stood trial in a U.S. federal courthouse Tuesday for allegedly stealing billions...

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/48accca20ecd/running-for-congress-in-my-hometown-13693133?e=00028e5542)
https://judgeforcongress.com/only-florida-congressman-to-receive-donations-tied-to-bankman-fried-announces-fundraiser-at-mar-a-lago/

** Only 1 Florida Congressman received donations tied to Bankman-Fried (https://judgeforcongress.com/only-florida-congressman-to-receive-donations-tied-to-bankman-fried-announces-fundraiser-at-mar-a-lago/)
------------------------------------------------------------

TARPON SPRINGS, Fla. – As disgraced FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried stood trial in a U.S. federal courthouse Tuesday for allegedly stealing billions of dollars in a Ponzi scheme and making illegal campaign contributions, the only Florida congressman at the time to take funds tied to Bankman-Fried sent out invitations to a fundraiser scheduled to be held at Mar-a-Lago later this month.

According to Federal Election Commission records, Gus Bilirakis (R-FL) was the only Congressman from the state of Florida to receive contributions tied to Bankman-Fried. Bilirakis, who lives in Pinellas County, but represents Florida’s 12th Congressional District, has reportedly refused to answer questions from the media about the multiple maximum contributions he received for both his campaign committee and the Gus Bilirakis Victory Fund on at least three occasions that were tied to Bankman-Fried.

“As a former supporter and donor to Gus, I think I deserve some answers,” said James Judge, a military veteran, small business owner and Republican candidate for Florida’s 12th Congressional District. “Sam Bankman-Fried allegedly stole billions of dollars from more than a million victims and gave more than $40 million to primarily left-wing causes and mainly Democrats. Republican donors should understand that they are being asked to support a candidate who has a track record of accepting donations made by their political enemies. I certainly wouldn’t have given Gus a contribution had I have known these details.”

According to federal prosecutors, Bankman-Fried is currently on trial for allegedly stealing billions of dollars from citizens in a Ponzi-scheme and making millions of dollars in illegal campaign contributions through straw donors. His charges include wire fraud, wire fraud conspiracy, securities fraud, securities fraud conspiracy and money laundering.

Bankman-Fried, who founded FTX, a fraud-ridden and now-bankrupt company, which used to operate a cryptocurrency exchange and hedge fund, conspired with his brother Gabriel and other FTX executives to influence lawmakers to change laws to benefit him and his company, prosecutors have alleged.

What makes these donations illegal is they were made with "straw" donors or corporate funds, which allowed Bankman-Fried to conceal and evade contribution limits, prosecutors say.

Bankman-Fried was one of the largest donors to Democrats in the 2022 midterm elections, donating millions of dollars to President Joe Biden. He also heavily funded LGBTQ initiatives. According to FEC records, Bankman-Fried and his cohorts donated to the Democratic parties of dozens of states including Florida, as well as campaigns and PACs for Joe Biden, John Fetterman, Cory Booker, Hakeem Jeffries, and many more.

“It’s sad because the victims of this fraud, many of whom lost their life savings and everything they owned, will never see their money again,” said Judge. “Yet these elected officials continue to walk around without even having to answer questions about what they discussed and why they received these funds.”

Among Judge’s chief complaints against Bilirakis are his more than 3,700 questionable special interest contributions, which include donations from Blackrock, Facebook, Google, Microsoft, Pfizer, Johnson & Johnson, Target, Disney and more.

Earlier this year, Bilirakis chaired a subcommittee meeting on blockchain and cryptocurrency, which Judge contends is concerning given Bilirakis’s willingness to accept donations tied to Bankman-Fried.

“I used to support Bilirakis, but after looking at his voting record, his hypocritical comments about term-limits and refusal to self-impose them, and his lengthy list of contributors, it’s clear that Gus is not for us,” said Judge.

About James Judge:

James Judge, a Florida native, graduated from Eckerd College in St. Petersburg and served in the U.S. Coast Guard in Operation Iraqi Freedom. Additionally, he served in Kabul, Afghanistan as a spokesman for the U.S. Department of Defense from 2010 until 2011. He now owns Judge Public Relations, a Tampa-based public relations, marketing and consulting firm. Judge is married to his wife Danielle, who is also a small business owner. The Judges live on a ranch in Dade City, with their five dogs, three cats, chickens, cows, goats and horses. Judge is a proud member of the NRA, Veterans of Foreign Wars and the American Legion. The Judges are also longtime, active members at Idlewild Baptist Church in Lutz.

## There is a coordinated effort underway to undermine the Constitution, including the Second Amendment.
[AGREE](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44738145af874e21b1bba3d1b687bf47&_e=_FbqwKcE5-JNPucuUZ2KynxcpnYRw54g-MBy3k5202OWGFupXROaRTeR6jWM6Q3wHnocW2yBrQoPbhvrKzo5VRWwl_iGIKJNd51SI-14QEe4OV0BHEJrYdZyVWGDgbAYZQjj7Be2ybSy1hFIAcLq8mFayRpF1I-OJe3rmqeLBDZ9AutlIaGRIz28YjVEtUh3nOdtfpykIVrmErPYpKGQUtpikRQvGhSjE97v1usAyT66n1jnZDWlgOU08zhy_9qYE15akdEtqsNpvUyhZhWvh2ulCBCgR0DGmeRIlkkEckIgbHrjnWhS3gGVkd8KW0bMNIJAT5Wql68HAMDqp_bd785y1QYXviS8mtMVyji7_mHRdhP1RI68yYm1Va5C6Dz4) [DISAGREE](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44738145af874e21b1bba3d1b687bf47&_e=_FbqwKcE5-JNPucuUZ2KynxcpnYRw54g-MBy3k5202OWGFupXROaRTeR6jWM6Q3wHnocW2yBrQoPbhvrKzo5VRWwl_iGIKJNd51SI-14QEe4OV0BHEJrYdZyVWGDgbAYZQjj7Be2ybSy1hFIAcLq8mFayRpF1I-OJe3rmqeLBDZ9AutlIaGRIz28YjVEtUh3nOdtfpykIVrmErPYpKGQUtpikRQvGhSjE97v1usAyT763h9l3z3q7On0tEoq6Cpgq9XTdpHjdud5iDaB_z1VBujUed6svnzqX4anNz1RFScuZUIoU4HyHqvr7t4f82QUMyvw5NxGl4JMAb_vLmWIsIpMXjp9MlDRrwzHShRb5vjxnofNuND2qUs9DYA6I-ZT) [NOT SURE](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44738145af874e21b1bba3d1b687bf47&_e=_FbqwKcE5-JNPucuUZ2KynxcpnYRw54g-MBy3k5202OWGFupXROaRTeR6jWM6Q3wHnocW2yBrQoPbhvrKzo5VRWwl_iGIKJNd51SI-14QEe4OV0BHEJrYdZyVWGDgbAYZQjj7Be2ybSy1hFIAcLq8mFayRpF1I-OJe3rmqeLBDZ9AutlIaGRIz28YjVEtUh3nOdtfpykIVrmErPYpKGQUtpikRQvGhSjE97v1usAyT7b2KSCK42ubmb-HYy0asXLw0JbIt9_37uATwmvRFcb2JzuNx3qx9lBh_PK43_XAvic_bMYxKVs7zGU3LtsIvQQ42Cg3F7PnChIrRnrjUnK6KhHd_wPZPW81xEffVpp-KFPDSCXqGQ-TDwZDfoS70Ge) Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**." This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it 's more important to DO something about it.** That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44738145af874e21b1bba3d1b687bf47&_e=_FbqwKcE5-JNPucuUZ2KynxcpnYRw54g-MBy3k5202OWGFupXROaRTeR6jWM6Q3wHnocW2yBrQoPbhvrKzo5VRWwl_iGIKJNd51SI-14QEe4OV0BHEJrYdZyVWGDgbAYZQjj7Be2ybSy1hFIAcLq8mFayRpF1I-OJe3rmqeLBDZ9AutlIaGRIz28YjVEtUh3nOdtfpykIVrmErPYpKGQUtpikRQvGhSjE97v1usAyT4BhqjAJ1okXv09p5xI1k0SS-35-vUjpOTvpLXKqAUYYFzfyF-IemiLvmhFFaf-BlsYhi_5O7OJChwbxL3TL_YTp_7AmJXN-SXPf7JZ50d7pSgPwAf9wkdTuACsg581laMdOodueErDE71F4sXDcBhd) We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution--including the Second Amendment--is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! Peter,

Most people know Mike Johnson as the new Speaker of the House, a constitutional law attorney, and small business owner – but to our family, he’s husband, dad, and role model.

My name is Kelly Johnson, and I’m Mike’s wife and his number one supporter. We’ve been married for 23 years now, and I have never known anyone who is more tirelessly committed to serving God, our country, and its people—or who fights as hard for our principles every single day. He was born with that servant’s heart.

Mike is respected for his courage and integrity and trusted for his wisdom and insight. He is honest, principled, smart, and unshakeable. That’s precisely what America needs in these times of unprecedented challenge.

[**I wanted you to hear a bit more about my husband Mike, from me, the person who knows him best. Would you be willing to spare a moment to watch this video I recorded for you?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=71f6cd98f45047d680127841c1e55ab9&_e=JKtvStP0KzqHmewkpRrjl0eE9Sbdg96j7NlG4RDjnb4HO76oaG2ajJku1olYUUu1Wz92dljbFE5a76lzjr_7iIDmY__Ec0xCBhwoUdlrMSa-M0YFaWKCdRF2QUSm4gqFDbdmtNm6_qFRcU161FaAqm6MbA7TtawsDB87rJ_veyzmCs3Pqenhys8cAnQov1NojdQHJgUCBgO-yFSwe7dTkuqtfxpS9pri-ESQ1o2MY8r4JCMfNNxuBOEq9exebdfnZvkyhe14lKhuMNgc3pXvJvBfQ4Vfznc-2Q93oq9I7c4rwDnFh9_7uDFgO6ah6qJ13JyIug6OSMMNhnsTV-ft7MlavBETjZNQvjLnvi1axw_TviKFgP_vg008jVI4a6sm)

[ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=71f6cd98f45047d680127841c1e55ab9&_e=JKtvStP0KzqHmewkpRrjl0eE9Sbdg96j7NlG4RDjnb4HO76oaG2ajJku1olYUUu1Wz92dljbFE5a76lzjr_7iIDmY__Ec0xCBhwoUdlrMSa-M0YFaWKCdRF2QUSm4gqFDbdmtNm6_qFRcU161FaAqm6MbA7TtawsDB87rJ_veyzmCs3Pqenhys8cAnQov1NojdQHJgUCBgO-yFSwe7dTkuqtfxpS9pri-ESQ1o2MY8p0NCh00CRYPJZAg0GAHCKOMvlZpKDuhYL1Um30RpsX6HXTIN5WTgHzFlCbPh9KF2KtSCwVkszZGA9Ppo_39GUJ2uEm-P7grBI1y-U_aa-FQdTqEwU0OTtHn_r-QzYSB73cph2b0rhN2o5YO8chUlyE)

If you don't want to read to the end of this note, please make sure you click this link to donate to help Navy Seal Tim Sheehy WIN and FLIP the Senate RED before you close out your browser. After 16 years of Jon Tester voting in lock step for a liberal agenda, we Republicans have a real shot at ousting him next November thanks to Navy SEAL veteran Tim Sheehy who is running this go around. We can't afford another six years of votes for big government, deficit spending, raising taxes, open borders and climate extremism Tim is a very impressive candidate and I know he'd make a GREAT U.S. Senator. He needs our help, which is why I'm personally reaching out to ask you to get involved today. I'll leave it up to you what you consider to be large, but please know that he'll put your gift to the best possible use. Every dollar counts. Thank you, Sen. Chuck Grassley | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Shawn Harris via Blue Amp Action
subject: We can unseat Marjorie Taylor Greene and build a better future for everyone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Overwhelming gratitude...
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T78a3ecaf-1239-4636-abba-60b65a8274fd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter – I really don’t know what to say besides thank you. Thank you for making the launch of our campaign such an overwhelming success. I am incredibly humbled by the supportive messages, encouragement, and donations from people across the country. We’re building our movement to unseat Marjorie Taylor Greene around our shared values of compassion and kindness. Because of you, we’re starting this campaign on the right foot. **If you didn’t donate to our launch, don’t worry, you still can **[by clicking here!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T56629927-4d36-4b80-9b9e-05e1a21f3e81/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**DONATE $7 NOW >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T20b11c30-dd11-46f8-b381-d2b1fd7bbeae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5cf59ecb-acf5-4690-81cc-b4b7d2be1918/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) As a reminder: my name is Shawn Harris. I am a recently-retired United States Army Brigadier General, a grandfather, and a proud son of Georgia. I am running to restore dignity to northern Georgia and replace Ms. Greene in the House of Representatives. Ms. Greene is the wrong person to represent us at this critical moment. Instead of addressing the issues that make it harder for us to get by, she is focused on dividing our country and devaluing our fellow Americans — embarrassing us at home and abroad. [If you’re on board, would you chip in $7, $15, $25, or whatever you’re comfortable with to help us get our voter outreach efforts up and running?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9fe09791-3584-409d-ba33-dc387c66e7e6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcbfa186c-2d11-4ad0-989e-aa0373d6187e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Ms. Greene is wrong for our country and certainly wrong for Georgia. It’s time to elect someone who will bring us together over someone who tries to divide us by perpetuating culture wars. From the bottom of my heart: thank you for your kindness. My team and I are excited to get to work! Warm regards, [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5c8d305c-5231-4c53-a9ca-a26302c31777/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Shawn Harris
Candidate – Georgia 14
United States House of Representatives
---
| | |

|

| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T624e0842-ea61-4064-b0b7-142f196900a3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|

| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Karen=20Greenhalgh?=
subject: Vote fur my mom, pls! 🐾
body:
Karen is the best hooman a pup like me could ever ask for. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/188a4d890bb3/my-work-is-far-from-finished-6071684?e=48b883ea87)
---
| |
---
| | Hello friend- Buford here.**🐾** I’m taking a break from playing and snoozing to ask you to vote for my hooman, Karen Greenhalgh. Karen is the best hooman a pup like me could ever ask for. In fact, she even let me be in her latest commercial. Have you seen it?
---
| [ ](https://KarenGreenhalgh.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f63f16544ed56137e0536ab&id=413c4d33da&e=48b883ea87)
---
| Oh yeah, that’s me:
---
|
---
| (This was a good day; mom gave me lots of treats after the cameras were all gone!) Being a good boy all the time is a lot of hard work, but my mom sets a really good example and shows me how it’s done! When she’s in Richmond I miss her a lot, but I know she’s fighting for Virginia families. She talks a lot about what she’s doing to lower taxes, keep our neighborhoods safe (important for pups like me!), and create better-paying jobs. And I know from experience that she always keeps her promises. I hope you support my hooman Karen next week! I’m also supposed to tell you that you can vote EARLY between now and November 4. If you miss early voting, you can always vote fur my mom on Election Day on November 7. Thanks for reading! Back to snoozing. -Buford Greenhalgh
---
| | | | | | | [](https://KarenGreenhalgh.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f63f16544ed56137e0536ab&id=923bfb6c80&e=48b883ea87)

subject: Urgent: Deadline Extended >>>

body:
HER Time PAC [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP46/1/102543/images/HerTimePrimary.png]
Hey Peter,

We fell just a bit short of our end-of-month fundraising goal last night — but it’s so critical we don’t fall behind before the election that we extended our deadline by just 24 hours!

We’ve got another shot at raising what we need to keep operations going on all fronts, from re-electing vulnerable Congresswomen to protecting abortion access across the country, but now we REALLY cannot afford to come up short.

I’m asking you personally if you’d be able to chip in any amount today to support our work. I know we ask a lot, but there’s too much on the line right now to not hit this goal.

Here’s a personal link for you to use: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/htp-em-nov2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/htp-em-nov2023]

Thanks in advance!

— Katie

name: Team Ohio Dems
subject: Our Election Day goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Tuesday will be here before we know it.
|
Thank you, team. As Election Day creeps closer and closer, we’ve continuously asked this grassroots movement to step up to help us pass Issue 1 and protect reproductive rights in Ohio. And every time we sent out the call for help, you answered. You’ve donated, you’ve signed up to knock on doors and make phone calls to voters, you’ve helped register Ohioans, you’ve talked to your friends and family about the election. You’ve done it all. Now here we are! The election is only _**6 days away**_ and we have a new goal that we need your help to reach. ****[We intend to raise $15,000 by Election Day so we can fight back against the Republicans working tirelessly to strip away our fundamental rights. Can you chip in $5 today to help us reach our goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72609260/435866276/1219931254?refcode=odp_em_231101_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2QwZjE3OC1lNzc4LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sWVu_i4b6mxj73H6JMsW2B2EuIiuFgCULUZ1xskFh4Y=)**** Not only is the Ohio GOP spending tremendous amounts of money to keep Issue 1 from passing, but they’re getting even more financial support from anti-abortion groups all across the country... (ain’t no rest for the wicked, as they say). That means we can’t rest either. Not until we’ve done everything in our power to stop the GOP from taking Ohio backwards. ******[Please consider donating anything you can today to help us reach our Election Day fundraising goal so we can protect reproductive rights in our state constitution>>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72609261/435866278/1219931254?refcode=odp_em_231101_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2QwZjE3OC1lNzc4LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sWVu_i4b6mxj73H6JMsW2B2EuIiuFgCULUZ1xskFh4Y=)****** Thank you, Team Ohio Dems | **************A reproductive rights initiative is on the Ohio ballot this November. Can Ohio Democrats count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help fuel our fight to protect reproductive rights in our state constitution? →************** | ********[********](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72609262/435866280/1219931254?refcode=odp_em_231101_1&amount=5;email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2QwZjE3OC1lNzc4LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sWVu_i4b6mxj73H6JMsW2B2EuIiuFgCULUZ1xskFh4Y=)****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72609263/435866281/1219931254?refcode=odp_em_231101_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2QwZjE3OC1lNzc4LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sWVu_i4b6mxj73H6JMsW2B2EuIiuFgCULUZ1xskFh4Y=) ************

name: MAGA-red Arizona?? (VPP)
subject: our jaws dropped when we read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Show Kari Lake that Democrats aren’t going anywhere >>
| We’ll get straight to the point. Here’s what you need to know about the Arizona Senate race _right now:_

1) **MAGA Kari Lake is CACKLING at the thought of Democrats ignoring this race... _LOOK AT WHAT SHE JUST SAID:_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56313?t=6&akid=11612%2E878179%2EnZMWiH) | [**RUSH $7 TO DEFEAT TRUMP MINIONS LIKE KARI LAKE AND SAVE THE SENATE! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56313?t=7&akid=11612%2E878179%2EnZMWiH)
---
2) **This race will DECIDE the fate of Democrats’ one-seat Senate majority.** Abortion rights, democracy, and Biden’s agenda are all on the line.

3) **If Lake gets her way and we sit this one out, a MAGA-red Senate is all but GUARANTEED.** _Don’t leave this up to chance!_

[**We need ALL HANDS ON DECK to show Kari Lake that Democrats aren’t abandoning Arizona: Recommit to the fight to save the Senate by chipping in $7 towards our $20,000 Flip Arizona Fund NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56313?t=8&akid=11612%2E878179%2EnZMWiH)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

---
| | Peter, How bad of a job is DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas doing?
**Even** _**_Obama’s_**_**DHS Secretary, Jeh Johnson, is attacking him for his failure.**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ffe2f5f8399346cdb33ca84353a3188b&_e=e8yOFeLYrWae5RLim-opc1LenU0btauj0eADcxSsrOC5M4ujlD6jjMM3kMSztPaxJCHvC5yqc-29zt-ly39-xdl-IE0QxFUwahO2zDPwAEA1Ft169TNdeuBlgefJ3lHn7Y_R5IA5d4yhkGPln6dfNuTAURs872He5AvCvpxtIdJ3fkg-QOV8sS92BtoTpMlNggz2MrfXACdjoK0geHfLZKeDZUrmygXecUQySLgnCHBFwHC_We6XiHmEVfYBx8gyVSudaTCNHeJbrBH-Z4qqIPnLye4L4JUKcwiGHLnZX3dbtMxaoTepoXGMhc1tYaIN4aukHvWrAPXWywbjwfynugY-vawTz98OJfS2TfmTYCB6i5WmUN0Q-Y31k_6JfPPKLSlpCCLlmhTYGlpHDhTlEUa7M61Sy0Q-r1un52KnZYrBwIzJrQsjM-3xVpriNSJjZQpeNwabf5H9RRXp5ikNmwVyOseFy3s4Bfm1HowrnSw%3D)
---
He told Fox: _“The system is broken, it’s horribly backlogged. And there are a whole lot of people entering this country who we cannot identify.”_ But Peter, before you congratulate Johnson for bravery, remember: numbers don’t lie: **This *is* the worst border crisis in our current history. ** **_At least 5.7 million illegal migrants have entered the U.S. since President Biden’s inauguration...and those are just the people we KNOW about._** To put that in context, that’s more than the entire population of Chicago AND Houston... _combined._ And the really chilling part? That’s still just the beginning because our leaders have utterly FAILED to secure our southern border. **_At Heritage Action, we’ve had enough._**
---
| | **NEW VIDEO:**** ** **Heritage Action lays out the case for impeaching Secretary Mayorkas**

If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this . | | Peter, How bad of a job is DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas doing? Even Obama’sDHS Secretary, Jeh Johnson, is attacking him for his failure. He told Fox: “The system is broken, it’s horribly backlogged. And there are a whole lot of people entering this country who we cannot identify.” But Peter, before you congratulate Johnson for bravery, remember: numbers don’t lie: This is the worst border crisis in our current history. At least 5.7 million illegal migrants have entered the U.S. since President Biden’s inauguration...and those are just the people we KNOW about. To put that in context, that’s more than the entire population of Chicago AND Houston... combined. And the really chilling part? That’s still just the beginning because our leaders have utterly FAILED to secure our southern border. Fellow American,

I write this having just been elected by my colleagues as the 56th Speaker of the United States House of Representatives.

The task of leading our House majority is a great one, and to say that I’m humbled by the faith my colleagues have bestowed on me is an understatement.

My message to you today is this: When Republicans come together, there is no measure of what we can achieve.

In the near term, my team and I will work to make sure that we’re passing responsible, fiscally conservative legislation to fund our government and support our military. **And with an election a little more than twelve months away, we’ll work around the clock to grow our House majority and help EVERY Republican incumbent in their reelection campaign.**

**As we move forward, I need to know that we have your support.**[**Please give me a sign that you’re on Team Johnson by becoming a Week One supporter right now.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e1e0cbf53db74f1c863b02103ccae911&_e=4dK3EHtduv4jWzTmqCXtbsfoLfqGHK8W1VebvHueECz3pXXZk13PCu8p9UBcTIi5wsgNqvy0Mcm6efryp60RIfSZfrCxd6Of76kgwzOCC6Up6uh6At96Rt08QC3ztJT1FFDaOxy-Rfce2g68nunvixweMYSDT-mckZGK4y7Lrt09GxX4SpigW01Geq76e3sgNjTjtUj2z7CUd5hLk-4n1ZeuVa1sqK4bWmBSzqQ39XUBpj5wiG568WaRAptDAOafc9X68DRA7W-XJ834w3LimWZmyXJa7NnFgdt_FuWAHZE7r6O19mJkh87AY2mc9uCi0ABXTwtonSG3fzNvzfo_Y6Qj9_yfWXA9JyssBJ6rKFCXO9A9O_aq5_t9HkoVFoBpOvIyiH6hGIOyoi40jV1RulV8y9BdtIdUJplPwj7RNrYHSYxdC41f9vx0HxFnRifXAOl0sCtopUddrMXA-EDm53UuGmbZdjtrrgHE8O-TOLCs4NTLOcHUmWRbH8uCAYrZYBV3NOyFKTgSbk4NmNCwY7QrYaUM9dxUEq83Bz6mFL4%3D)

clean_body: There is no limit to the things Republicans can achieve when we work together. | | Fellow American, I write this having just been elected by my colleagues as the 56th Speaker of the United States House of Representatives. The task of leading our House majority is a great one, and to say that I’m humbled by the faith my colleagues have bestowed on me is an understatement. My message to you today is this: When Republicans come together, there is no measure of what we can achieve. In the near term, my team and I will work to make sure that we’re passing responsible, fiscally conservative legislation to fund our government and support our military. And with an election a little more than twelve months away, we’ll work around the clock to grow our House majority and help EVERY Republican incumbent in their reelection campaign. As we move forward, I need to know that we have your support. For liberty, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michigan=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: We've drawn the line in the sand.
body:
Today, MIGOP is calling on all Constitutionalists to contact their State Representative's office. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e73e7f38e5c8/weve-drawn-the-line-in-the-sand?e=a2af77507c)
---
| |
---
| | **Democratic Suppression of Truth and Life** **Nov. 1, 2023** Today, Michigan Democrats vote to legalize and expand the 2022 Proposition 3, which advocated for the murder of pre-born children up to the day of birth. These representatives are also voting to criminalize the making of “false” claims about elections. This is nothing less than a massive step toward draconian rule – toward the creation of a police state without God, morality or ethics. The push to eliminate the prohibition on referrals for abortions in student services or to allow additional government funding for the murder of innocent life, eliminating restrictions on additional abortion procedures and more is nothing less than macabre. The push to crackdown on individuals who would arbitrarily “intimidate election officials” or challenge the narrative of those working to destroy our country state by state, county by county, and neighborhood by neighborhood throw corrupt elections is one that must be met with courage and unshakable conviction. As the Party of the Constitution, we cannot work toward secure elections and transparent governability when individuals in office operate in the facet seen today. The secrecy must come to an end for all elected officials. The suppression of Truth by the Democratic Party is one that must be resisted. There is no other way to state it. All members of the Michigan Republican Party must stand up. Today, MIGOP is calling on all Constitutionalists to contact their State Representative’s office. The Michigan Republican Party will not just stand and complain but lawfully resist this authoritarian agenda. This is the line in the sand we must draw in order to defend any further attacks on our Republic.
---
