name: =?utf-8?Q?Mariela=20Roca?=
subject: Volunteer Opportunities!
body:
| | | | | |
---
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=4ef42fe99a&e=0a12281e0e)
|
---
# Join Our Team: Be a Volunteer
# for Our Campaign! 🙋🏻♀️
|
---
As we gear up for an exciting 2024 campaign, we are reaching out to our amazing supporters and community members to invite you to become a vital part of our team.
Below are a few immediate volunteer opportunities we need help with right away.
# Brunswick Veterans Day Parade - Saturday, November 5th! 🇺🇸
|
---
As an Air Force Veteran & Candidate for Congress, I am very excited to be able to participate and walk in the 2023 91st Annual Brunswick Veterans Day Parade!
We need as many volunteers as possible to help us walk in the parade this Saturday, November 5th.
Parade starts at 2:00 PM, but we will need to line up at the Brunswick High School no later than 12:30 PM.
If you are in the area, please consider signing-up to help us show huge Roca for Congress support!
Sign up below or reply back to this email if you can join us on Saturday. ⬇️
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=76f3ad9dd0&e=0a12281e0e)
| [SIGN-UP HERE FOR PARADE](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=f40156156c&e=0a12281e0e)
---
# Postcard Writing & Envelope Stuffing - Thursday November, 8th 5-7 PM Frederick Location ✉️
|
---
We are getting ready to host our first in-person volunteer event!
We will be asking volunteers to help us handwrite the postcard below to voters across the district. We believe that a personal handwritten note is a nice touch that voters will appreciate.
| | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
We will also be stuffing envelopes with letters to send out!
We will be meeting next week Thursday November, 8th 5-7 PM at a location in Frederick.
Sign up below or reply back to this email if you can join us next week. ⬇️
| [SIGN-UP HERE FOR POSTCARDS AND ENVELOPE STUFFING](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=0d80af5b80&e=0a12281e0e)
---
# Sign-Up For Future
# Volunteer Opportunities ❤️
|
---
Volunteers like you are the lifeblood of our campaign. Your passion, energy, and commitment can make a significant difference in helping us reach our goals. Whether you're a seasoned campaigner or completely new to the political arena, there are numerous ways you can contribute.We need volunteers for various roles, including:
1. Canvassing: Knock on doors and engage with voters to share our candidate's message.
2. Phone Banking: Make calls to potential supporters and help build a strong network of grassroots advocates.
3. Event Coordination: Assist in planning and organizing campaign events and rallies.
4. Data Entry and Research: Help us maintain accurate voter databases and conduct research on key issues.
5. Social Media and Communications: Manage our online presence and create engaging content.

If you are unable to attend our upcoming events this week but still want to volunteer, please sign up below! Make sure to enter what you think you might be able to help with. Register as a volunteer below! ⬇️
| [VOLUNTEER SIGN-UP](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=821467c947&e=0a12281e0e)
---
# Donate Today 🙏🏼
|
---
As always, if you are unable to help our campaign by volunteering, fundraising is one of the biggest things we always need help with!

clean_body: | | | | | | | Join Our Team: Be a Volunteer for Our Campaign! 🙋🏻♀️ | As we gear up for an exciting 2024 campaign, we are reaching out to our amazing supporters and community members to invite you to become a vital part of our team. Below are a few immediate volunteer opportunities we need help with right away. Brunswick Veterans Day Parade - Saturday, November 5th! 🇺🇸 | As an Air Force Veteran & Candidate for Congress, I am very excited to be able to participate and walk in the 2023 91st Annual Brunswick Veterans Day Parade! We need as many volunteers as possible to help us walk in the parade this Saturday, November 5th. Parade starts at 2:00 PM, but we will need to line up at the Brunswick High School no later than 12:30 PM. If you are in the area, please consider signing-up to help us show huge Roca for Congress support! Sign up below or reply back to this email if you can join us on Saturday. ⬇️ | Postcard Writing & Envelope Stuffing - Thursday November, 8th 5-7 PM Frederick Location ✉️ | We are getting ready to host our first in-person volunteer event! We will be asking volunteers to help us handwrite the postcard below to voters across the district. We believe that a personal handwritten note is a nice touch that voters will appreciate. | | | | | | | | | | We will also be stuffing envelopes with letters to send out! We will be meeting next week Thursday November, 8th 5-7 PM at a location in Frederick. Sign up below or reply back to this email if you can join us next week. ⬇️ | Sign-Up For Future Volunteer Opportunities ❤️ | Volunteers like you are the lifeblood of our campaign. Your passion, energy, and commitment can make a significant difference in helping us reach our goals. Whether you're a seasoned campaigner or completely new to the political arena, there are numerous ways you can contribute.We need volunteers for various roles, including: 1. Canvassing: Knock on doors and engage with voters to share our candidate's message. 2. Phone Banking: Make calls to potential supporters and help build a strong network of grassroots advocates. 3. Event Coordination: Assist in planning and organizing campaign events and rallies. 4. Data Entry and Research: Help us maintain accurate voter databases and conduct research on key issues. 5. Social Media and Communications: Manage our online presence and create engaging content. If you are unable to attend our upcoming events this week but still want to volunteer, please sign up below! Make sure to enter what you think you might be able to help with. Register as a volunteer below! ⬇️ | Donate Today 🙏🏼 | As always, if you are unable to help our campaign by volunteering, fundraising is one of the biggest things we always need help with! Postcards, envelopes, & everything else are an added cost, and we depend on the generous financial support of amazing supporters like you! name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A quick note to say thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I never doubt that this is worth it. Not when you have my back.
#

Peter,
Just a quick note from me after a tough (but successful) October. Thanks to you, and thanks to many, many people like you, we hit our goals last night.
This isn’t easy. No doubt about it. Folks tear you down in the media, attack you, smear your name. You have to spend a lot of time away from home, away from family. That’s all true.
But I never doubt that this is worth it. Not for one minute — never. Not when you have my back. Not with someone like Kari Lake as my opponent. Not when so much is at stake.
So, one more time, thank you. And I have one question to ask you today. (It is not for money!)
[**Can you personally endorse my campaign for Senate? We’re going to need thousands and thousands of people behind us to win. Endorsing my campaign might seem like a small thing, but it says a lot about what we’re trying to do here and the team we’re trying to build.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_nov23/?source=em231101-2&refcode2=1397.734936.4TxbWG&t=1&akid=1397%2E734936%2E4TxbWG)
[ENDORSE MY CAMPAIGN](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_nov23/?source=em231101-2&refcode2=1397.734936.4TxbWG&t=2&akid=1397%2E734936%2E4TxbWG)
Can’t do this without you, Peter. Means a lot to me that you’re here. More than you realize.
\- Ruben

clean_body: I never doubt that this is worth it. Not when you have my back. Peter, Just a quick note from me after a tough (but successful) October. Thanks to you, and thanks to many, many people like you, we hit our goals last night. This isn’t easy. No doubt about it. Folks tear you down in the media, attack you, smear your name. You have to spend a lot of time away from home, away from family. That’s all true. But I never doubt that this is worth it. Not for one minute — never. Not when you have my back. Not with someone like Kari Lake as my opponent. Not when so much is at stake. So, one more time, thank you. And I have one question to ask you today. (It is not for money!) Can’t do this without you, Peter. Means a lot to me that you’re here. More than you realize. \- Ruben Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Friend, This weekend, my team and the Working Families Party held a national call with state and local elected officials who are speaking up in support of a ceasefire. During the call, we heard from a pediatrician who advises the only pediatric cancer department in the Gaza Strip, and a nurse practitioner who spoke about the 183 babies born in Gaza every day—many of whom are premature and need intensive care but cannot access it. She explained that **_“there is no work in a NICU that can go on without electricity.”_** Now more than ever Palestinian voices must be heard. The national call features a Palestinian American family whose parents are trapped in Gaza right now, devastated and abandoned by the U.S. government. We also heard from **Dearborn Mayor Abdullah Hammoud** , who shared residents’ stories of those trapped in Gaza, those who have been dehumanized by the Israeli military, and those forced to flee their ancestral homelands. As Mayor Hammoud said on the call:
> _“What we cannot bear any longer is the utter silence, an erasure of our voices. We have radio silence from all those whom we’ve elected who promised ... to carry our values and our principles and the policies that we care for—but to this point in time have not had the courage to stand forward and call for a ceasefire, and actually work toward a just solution for the Palestinian people...._**_It’s time for us to find our spines; it’s time for us to step up and step forward and demand a ceasefire from all of the electeds across this nation._**_”_
Yesterday, Israel’s military bombed refugee camps in Gaza and the West Bank, continuing to slaughter Palestinian civilians at horrifying speed and scale. In three weeks, Israel’s government has killed over 8,500 Palestinian civilians, including more than 3,000 children—and the bombardment and blockade have not stopped. [**Please click here to listen to our national call for a ceasefire and take action now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyARur9oJsIiNX9tLV9Y5vFlFT0uII91byQnhQHUm1-L6FwUPVIfrMi8ngPyAnHRWfn_iDqASNv2gkHqk65EvVKxD1ehzgrVTMuK9X7cjzDc0EpAEauuolU12jLA206EreCJKM5DmBU7cO03zYevpu0swmwf5LG-9y9BqV1Q1mvQLv2MPquROyTMzocTQEhiyNCMlc-xyv4uwpv6JiUfLR-h2zf0dNUYzZ-VgKHMvDF3FgObQD0hwK54U950iThwKcPesYjhkL79V6wylqCrITt7K-XLUZdAMtoo1JYg10aLDugpa423xkVQAqM3E6PV7vjG97ESOXCJogF8HFTO1-nm0FGsAoKgazXHbaAF4pX26E7swsXKwzE_w1tJ0ppy0DKV6DzWMg0rjW2a8VGyC6botqwnrZtNh8cX-J5S6UUbZAb_FRCxPGR582TfCyavSXYJdK9420doFq_hBn0mJGrPE3fxC-D-qp3sH6Zl8a8FGUt_eGhuWvr6QgbqTk7Bu_U4fmQYsZo3iaE7bEtYOFFYo642Umb5Ab8zOhp4ipxr6Mrh9kMuYrXvyjxhH70IDen_/40x/MqlxcOFMS3CkwYzGRxOR7w/h1/Hq-0pkXOH0jI_O4XxrRGOsN9Dok9fZPpB43cKgMRbSM) | [LISTEN & ACT](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyARur9oJsIiNX9tLV9Y5vFlFT0uII91byQnhQHUm1-L6FwUPVIfrMi8ngPyAnHRWfn_iDqASNv2gkHqk65EvVKxD1ehzgrVTMuK9X7cjzDc0EpAEauuolU12jLA206EreCJKM5DmBU7cO03zYevpu0swmwf5LG-9y9BqV1Q1mvQLv2MPquROyTMzocTQEhiyNCMlc-xyv4uwpv6JiUfLR-h2zf0dNUYzZ-VgKHMvDF3FgObQD0hwK54U950iThwKcPesYjhkL79V6wylqCrITt7K-XLUZdAMtoo1JYg10aLDuhWEFPWmXRMUoXP3BO27h1L5lqRlpnjinARGpmMkkYag_Ys62jgfunn9HM4UybjMqHtA3ywMy_Hw-ChhNFFxVj8Jbt1BgzYTjWAUHKY8ztXC1sdz91VQtmkKEjzvPgwCIUxzS_X1BKC1WX7tsqsgYoQZMajcUJqZKmPwm0w3FL13hWFuk7yopfuwdVQGEhJ0m7bxzYR4khrHORlILjLz1oYzrgYYOBoz-HnBC4HaCrYAhaLRR5YBI0xCUbA2dT_wjhBxi4jemaeRGfBd-cNVbj9/40x/MqlxcOFMS3CkwYzGRxOR7w/h2/kSO9CzfYFkPFPEvrcS6ePnWQrnf-x8Akid_H-0hZ1cg)

This week, Congress is voting on sending billions of dollars to Israel’s military. We must keep building and demonstrating support for a ceasefire.
[**Please listen to the national call for a ceasefire now. Collectively we can speak truth, move mountains, and save lives.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyARur9oJsIiNX9tLV9Y5vFlFT0uII91byQnhQHUm1-L6FwUPVIfrMi8ngPyAnHRWfn_iDqASNv2gkHqk65EvVKxD1ehzgrVTMuK9X7cjzDc0EpAEauuolU12jLA206EreCJKM5DmBU7cO03zYevpu0swmwf5LG-9y9BqV1Q1mvQLv2MPquROyTMzocTQEhiyNCMlc-xyv4uwpv6JiUfLR-h2zf0dNUYzZ-VgKHMvDF3FgObQD0hwK54U950iThwKcPesYjhkL79V6wylqCrITt7K-XLUZdAMtoo1JYg10aLDuiP3w16zbn2NqytN2MdmgdKDXEK_eS-LGO2NXjLo_aFidc3XklKtvaijPp3f5HnMLBRVRL9HRS6xVThf3XgGW1-I8Gx4OVscR0m5uy7lm78JnLPLjVV3fCitTSK6Zjb-_zLk56l1lXcaZOqkM_rxF4eKYLZOXgv1x1-CH5VHNw4nWnPEqXgm_PLfNjoUej1CfjONpBq5Mwe4Son6gfHPNHwcldsKKQqEuATRgCgbbrW8geMcCXR76K0yHvmEG9EFv7J4dvySoKTLaNJwtLTPY-q/40x/MqlxcOFMS3CkwYzGRxOR7w/h5/SpP9aicJkLzIjnB6-5AGvpU6G4GOeyhDaPjikUNOoBE)

Rashida

clean_body: | | | Friend, This weekend, my team and the Working Families Party held a national call with state and local elected officials who are speaking up in support of a ceasefire. During the call, we heard from a pediatrician who advises the only pediatric cancer department in the Gaza Strip, and a nurse practitioner who spoke about the 183 babies born in Gaza every day—many of whom are premature and need intensive care but cannot access it. She explained that “there is no work in a NICU that can go on without electricity.” Now more than ever Palestinian voices must be heard. The national call features a Palestinian American family whose parents are trapped in Gaza right now, devastated and abandoned by the U.S. government. We also heard from Dearborn Mayor Abdullah Hammoud , who shared residents’ stories of those trapped in Gaza, those who have been dehumanized by the Israeli military, and those forced to flee their ancestral homelands. As Mayor Hammoud said on the call: “What we cannot bear any longer is the utter silence, an erasure of our voices. We have radio silence from all those whom we’ve elected who promised ... to carry our values and our principles and the policies that we care for—but to this point in time have not had the courage to stand forward and call for a ceasefire, and actually work toward a just solution for the Palestinian people....It’s time for us to find our spines; it’s time for us to step up and step forward and demand a ceasefire from all of the electeds across this nation.” Yesterday, Israel’s military bombed refugee camps in Gaza and the West Bank, continuing to slaughter Palestinian civilians at horrifying speed and scale. In three weeks, Israel’s government has killed over 8,500 Palestinian civilians, including more than 3,000 children—and the bombardment and blockade have not stopped. | Leaders with the and also joined to talk about how you can help save lives. This week, Congress is voting on sending billions of dollars to Israel’s military. We must keep building and demonstrating support for a ceasefire. In solidarity, Rashida P.S. Grassroots groups are planning a big march in Washington, DC for a ceasefire and Palestinian freedom this Saturday, November 4. . If you can’t join the national march, to save lives. Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

name: Greater Georgia
subject: SOS CONTINUES TO SKIP WORK, DODGES TOUGH QUESTIONS FROM LAWMAKERS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
| | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, NOVEMBER 1
SOS CONTINUES TO SKIP WORK, DODGES TOUGH QUESTIONS FROM LAWMAKERS
ATLANTA - Yesterday, Greater Georgia [exposed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yS94zWlNcWXyGa5Ckgmz_7iGV2qoHnuHZutBcovNBEUpOTDW5y8_Zq0TkMSBi0TBcr3qxQaJTP6T2cCMS8EMZdtPd5r_UrA2ckWOl4xE1bl9TRGwxSlGQehUpl9bS7_rOb-Qj1FJkCn-nAcD8lQG9QS0tL0iD3olx735dxSG_evSRORYY8YBuivH2ykahwskbpEzWsj6vY4QrX98OS82hrL9iIWcXxVM4gxusR12jZ4=&c=rp3TKyiqhXKgMgoLctlamuWQLKRyzNXYTqbdjYO7PHRg_95x_ey5eg==&ch=MIJTBpqg91zr2INKSzokF7TcrZhGNqwBXj0dgrgcSnT3tX5YZ1M_pg==) Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger for only clocking into work 42 times this year, even amid an as-yet unaddressed [cybersecurity exposure](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yS94zWlNcWXyGa5Ckgmz_7iGV2qoHnuHZutBcovNBEUpOTDW5y8_Zm6EcWqhJG1ZCEQDcdEryzi-oEoGIzk6uMbbrGYF8opWvhqN142QzCMvVXvBz8peM_G8VcdSuuWRBiSmnxrWIi1qvzq4iSsTDNdYleAFdS2tVQatXLIQn5oiCWVBRmrcjSICqDa2vpHionjNQavsPfRuI5q4sD8ws7pw4F4pAvCnbb1hkNeTARS07ihNo8f3pgi70piOc-Kx&c=rp3TKyiqhXKgMgoLctlamuWQLKRyzNXYTqbdjYO7PHRg_95x_ey5eg==&ch=MIJTBpqg91zr2INKSzokF7TcrZhGNqwBXj0dgrgcSnT3tX5YZ1M_pg==) affecting Georgia's voting machines. Today, state lawmakers echoed those same concerns at a Senate Ethics hearing - where they had planned to question Secretary Raffensperger about his refusal to fix the well-publicized vulnerabilities within Georgia's election infrastructure.
The only problem is, Secretary Raffensperger didn't show up - either for the hearing or for a press conference called by his own office earlier in the day.
Instead, Secretary of State staff members faced over two hours of questions about why the state had not made plans to fix the security exposures they had known about since 2021, why there wasn't more urgency to do so ahead of a presidential election year, and where the Secretary has been. The oversight panel criticized the Secretary for taking a [wait-and-see](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yS94zWlNcWXyGa5Ckgmz_7iGV2qoHnuHZutBcovNBEUpOTDW5y8_Zq0TkMSBi0TBhttNbyVw7AqbYN82JG9jYoRfw3OJw66cLxiseoBlWg9tM-3BuHWwNtlVEdxI0ZfQ9zfyj_S45IkGa9q5bLhpkmHS3RRk2fWFQM2Zln9Lgmat-VJebq-r21jrshGKli_HmrLofRzqnoc=&c=rp3TKyiqhXKgMgoLctlamuWQLKRyzNXYTqbdjYO7PHRg_95x_ey5eg==&ch=MIJTBpqg91zr2INKSzokF7TcrZhGNqwBXj0dgrgcSnT3tX5YZ1M_pg==) approach to cybersecurity, for [failing](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yS94zWlNcWXyGa5Ckgmz_7iGV2qoHnuHZutBcovNBEUpOTDW5y8_Zq0TkMSBi0TBsnaX1xim8juaCyuiJkKZMtyEKv_ls8h259RB-0rSOwBxrceNMundkXKM8opVfw5hPlaqvE5gdhx7HMuIiTeR5syCs8PYmCQLbGN2DisOe3PQzmWEOyPWNK3rbyBrFNYc2e7152RF8es=&c=rp3TKyiqhXKgMgoLctlamuWQLKRyzNXYTqbdjYO7PHRg_95x_ey5eg==&ch=MIJTBpqg91zr2INKSzokF7TcrZhGNqwBXj0dgrgcSnT3tX5YZ1M_pg==) to request the funds he needed to fix the machines, and for not giving his full time or energy to defending Georgia's elections.
State Senator Randy Robertson [summed it up](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yS94zWlNcWXyGa5Ckgmz_7iGV2qoHnuHZutBcovNBEUpOTDW5y8_Zq0TkMSBi0TBbQb1StlcuB_iLdycVTgYiKVuarTk4hhgq2o7te9x9rVFGDrHjEflpJIvQo0oiuWCgdJRS4DuiUVOSH2BxDeU8fr76j8ppAE7hJtIzD2MeCjSa3mkXKVhetSbYeXbmZuT4IYK_rqYDZQ=&c=rp3TKyiqhXKgMgoLctlamuWQLKRyzNXYTqbdjYO7PHRg_95x_ey5eg==&ch=MIJTBpqg91zr2INKSzokF7TcrZhGNqwBXj0dgrgcSnT3tX5YZ1M_pg==): "There's a lot of times that we look around the Secretary of State's office. I'm talking about the individual who's elected to hold that office. He's a ghost. Today he's at a rotary meeting to speak down in south Georgia...the Chairman notified him of [this hearing] a month ago...if that rotary meeting was more important than coming up here and speaking in front of the Georgia citizens that are watching this, then that's his burden to bear. But these questions that we ask are not for your benefit or for our benefit - as much as they are for the men and women who lost confidence in the Georgia election system."
Yesterday, Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler had a similar message when she [called on](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yS94zWlNcWXyGa5Ckgmz_7iGV2qoHnuHZutBcovNBEUpOTDW5y8_Zq0TkMSBi0TBcr3qxQaJTP6T2cCMS8EMZdtPd5r_UrA2ckWOl4xE1bl9TRGwxSlGQehUpl9bS7_rOb-Qj1FJkCn-nAcD8lQG9QS0tL0iD3olx735dxSG_evSRORYY8YBuivH2ykahwskbpEzWsj6vY4QrX98OS82hrL9iIWcXxVM4gxusR12jZ4=&c=rp3TKyiqhXKgMgoLctlamuWQLKRyzNXYTqbdjYO7PHRg_95x_ey5eg==&ch=MIJTBpqg91zr2INKSzokF7TcrZhGNqwBXj0dgrgcSnT3tX5YZ1M_pg==) the Secretary of State to get back to work: "Voters are entrusting our elections to a Secretary of State who has spent more time glad-handing liberal elites and attacking conservatives as 'election deniers' than addressing legitimate security issues. This is not a partisan issue - it's about accountability in a battleground state that will decide the next U.S. President. Ensuring secure elections is not a job that can be done from the green room of MSNBC; right now, with critical security vulnerabilities exposed to the world, this state needs our top elections official to get back to work for the voters of Georgia."
---

The group works year-round to educate and register voters, engage with diverse and underrepresented communities, and protect election integrity. ###

name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: Palm Springs Pride!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P
body:
You're invited!

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72610787/435871583/1072501871?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmM1MmU4ZjYtZWE3OC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DSLq8vMtGAcgjrAmct-aTWJK8qeBA5yWs-QdPKdEFRU=)
---
Hi team,

As I'm sure you know, this coming weekend is **Palm Springs Pride!** It will be a weekend full of great events culminating in the Pride Parade on Sunday.

**I'll be walking in the parade with my amazing supporters, and I'd love for you to join me, friend!** Whether you're a member of the LGBTQ+ community or an ally, this will be a fun opportunity to hang out with me while showing your support for equality and human rights.

**The invitation for the event is here:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72610788/435871584/123597708?refcode=RRFC_20231101_EMINFO_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmM1MmU4ZjYtZWE3OC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DSLq8vMtGAcgjrAmct-aTWJK8qeBA5yWs-QdPKdEFRU=&emci=20cdb788-db78-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=bc52e8f6-ea78-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=4131986) You can find more information on everything happening this weekend at [**https://www.pspride.org/**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72610789/435871585/123597708?refcode=RRFC_20231101_EMINFO_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmM1MmU4ZjYtZWE3OC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DSLq8vMtGAcgjrAmct-aTWJK8qeBA5yWs-QdPKdEFRU=&emci=20cdb788-db78-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=bc52e8f6-ea78-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=4131986). I hope to see you on Sunday, and Happy Pride!

Best,
Dr. Raul Ruiz

name: Mike Johnson
subject: How I lead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life.

|
[ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d291354da1e04cf2bf146738ebe2bdfb&_e=irgilclnedNTTZyZ7r6ccWrzT-6lZc7A9v5BLyYDmc7g2kWxZvVsHfvdMdLzO5PsEejLcDxOyq_bFRVu2zQDvPO7TexH7LX1GmJMzZJQJWtbYnYSrDc_djUVYXKOS1u9GdQ0tgt2l2c-xxqWz7UTMgOp-aXw3TR-lcDBG1jQZPbwA6VANSj4BgZYW4Z5wEma8pgFQ3Xi5G0ZElHh0fMxGdNFLquwlwtN1cNc4ZqiAEMRBRLLk2C_ifQnbZj6Ws5bQPOa9oMTxyGYV6MwI25UfSyu-Uy34FwK25O92VUbjRf7I5511xhNk3hnam-IvzfqbHQ9GU7ttK5doRRxHe6sgtjI4CvyGljhpc5cfNnQdKIsa9tA_e6WqGc7Qo3fnMwl)
---
Fellow American,

The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them.

**Faith.** Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

**Family.** Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way.

**Freedom.** It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I've devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

[**This is a simple truth:**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d291354da1e04cf2bf146738ebe2bdfb&_e=irgilclnedNTTZyZ7r6ccWrzT-6lZc7A9v5BLyYDmc7g2kWxZvVsHfvdMdLzO5PsEejLcDxOyq_bFRVu2zQDvPO7TexH7LX1GmJMzZJQJWtbYnYSrDc_djUVYXKOS1u9GdQ0tgt2l2c-xxqWz7UTMgOp-aXw3TR-lcDBG1jQZPbwA6VANSj4BgZYW4Z5wEma8pgFQ3Xi5G0ZElHh0fMxGdNFLquwlwtN1cNc4ZqiAEMkld5Yg3FqnOcWdfsY3TK3KISNYlBSAxOfBwBhjIBI5f0ZuiLvs5h8pcFe191grf40vyPsqukrJXaskgBX5OZyef9vA1DE9E1GyDRrBWfGVR92wVOvK5M2c1Ijd6CDMnbSFUH7Ah7sQbbOO01mEXW3) America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are!

[** SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON > **](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d291354da1e04cf2bf146738ebe2bdfb&_e=irgilclnedNTTZyZ7r6ccWrzT-6lZc7A9v5BLyYDmc7g2kWxZvVsHfvdMdLzO5PsEejLcDxOyq_bFRVu2zQDvPO7TexH7LX1GmJMzZJQJWtbYnYSrDc_djUVYXKOS1u9GdQ0tgt2l2c-xxqWz7UTMgOp-aXw3TR-lcDBG1jQZPbwA6VANSj4BgZYW4Z5wEma8pgFQ3Xi5G0ZElHh0fMxGdNFLquwlwtN1cNc4ZqiAEPcfp2T34TdG8V7edAAXtWk_iurzdCbA5HB4E9UROeuhCpYx4NI8oy-laWk0SQMrxFFbXErA2zVrIod9yCb0cp8DVW36vq_O5DSu9JgwsHbi5XLecxBtBvhVRjJgwViRVcRWc9ittu68Jz7hocMakv7)

Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives.

**This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness.**

We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here.

[**Today, to continue to help lead this critical fight, I need your financial support - to restore our country and defend our values. Can you make a donation immediately?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d291354da1e04cf2bf146738ebe2bdfb&_e=irgilclnedNTTZyZ7r6ccWrzT-6lZc7A9v5BLyYDmc7g2kWxZvVsHfvdMdLzO5PsEejLcDxOyq_bFRVu2zQDvPO7TexH7LX1GmJMzZJQJWtbYnYSrDc_djUVYXKOS1u9GdQ0tgt2l2c-xxqWz7UTMgOp-aXw3TR-lcDBG1jQZPbwA6VANSj4BgZYW4Z5wEma8pgFQ3Xi5G0ZElHh0fMxGdNFLquwlwtN1cNc4ZqiAEPCUpOHK0tl0dV2pV7U08Hp-LH37GQ_HNsw7WQB7G5kpfxvvOMlaJ-A9UHyqqlZSAM-8K2UhQEK-bEKxemV-HC_qwCwdO5H9fc43F1jIRuaYbHfF0dvOw5L-RRFTjp4O3rY9bz4dyh8svdmFCt3k6xF)

[** DONATE TO SAVE AMERICA > **](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d291354da1e04cf2bf146738ebe2bdfb&_e=irgilclnedNTTZyZ7r6ccWrzT-6lZc7A9v5BLyYDmc7g2kWxZvVsHfvdMdLzO5PsEejLcDxOyq_bFRVu2zQDvPO7TexH7LX1GmJMzZJQJWtbYnYSrDc_djUVYXKOS1u9GdQ0tgt2l2c-xxqWz7UTMgOp-aXw3TR-lcDBG1jQZPbwA6VANSj4BgZYW4Z5wEma8pgFQ3Xi5G0ZElHh0fMxGdNFLquwlwtN1cNc4ZqiAEO4agMftUz2dqgxc9lKivUwINaFB38nofE2MNqxoLAqkmIRgRYfucojdfR0GQlK7Y9ohofG-XSSo61Y7AnlF8vsyHbfFJj3_wHvh1PDPVJux-9gimwJhY-fX8HoO0h1U2KzTFAepOyjUb3D-9fnFzvW)

Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we're running out of time. I'm not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must make a change before it 's too late.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d291354da1e04cf2bf146738ebe2bdfb&_e=irgilclnedNTTZyZ7r6ccWrzT-6lZc7A9v5BLyYDmc7g2kWxZvVsHfvdMdLzO5PsEejLcDxOyq_bFRVu2zQDvPO7TexH7LX1GmJMzZJQJWtbYnYSrDc_djUVYXKOS1u9GdQ0tgt2l2c-xxqWz7UTMgOp-aXw3TR-lcDBG1jQZPbwA6VANSj4BgZYW4Z5wEma8pgFQ3Xi5G0ZElHh0fMxGdNFLquwlwtN1cNc4ZqiAEND-64HmuzX0nWPMsGd_OQC2OKd_RQ8RrqUNxSEigHHP6MQej2Q99bb2uGePo9onPh0jGhdIM7Oapb-8vk-Nsk3lr7mk6cg9ZHW_KWuoJ1DE_eOkSzDT3Ttn-zPIWnaxN_1ItocHo8OZOCxLV5JvR46)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It's why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It's also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference - one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House - and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee.

We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, [**but we cannot do it alone.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d291354da1e04cf2bf146738ebe2bdfb&_e=irgilclnedNTTZyZ7r6ccWrzT-6lZc7A9v5BLyYDmc7g2kWxZvVsHfvdMdLzO5PsEejLcDxOyq_bFRVu2zQDvPO7TexH7LX1GmJMzZJQJWtbYnYSrDc_djUVYXKOS1u9GdQ0tgt2l2c-xxqWz7UTMgOp-aXw3TR-lcDBG1jQZPbwA6VANSj4BgZYW4Z5wEma8pgFQ3Xi5G0ZElHh0fMxGdNFLquwlwtN1cNc4ZqiAEOySQ45t9TOyFEI-N--Dbi9UEwAh7ztKZcTHCEsZoz2IM5l1VKva4g7DcpjqUTvWo-VoLVmw9XJfTE_vqLzvFrG1CzmIM6sxgZAijy9x19hJ5bIuVJPmCu1uKZ6bj8nEGuEEEEdgHeHj1MvVUhfSqfb)

[**If you are committed to keeping the House from the radical Democrats who are self-serving and want to turn America into a socialist country, then I need your support today.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d291354da1e04cf2bf146738ebe2bdfb&_e=irgilclnedNTTZyZ7r6ccWrzT-6lZc7A9v5BLyYDmc7g2kWxZvVsHfvdMdLzO5PsEejLcDxOyq_bFRVu2zQDvPO7TexH7LX1GmJMzZJQJWtbYnYSrDc_djUVYXKOS1u9GdQ0tgt2l2c-xxqWz7UTMgOp-aXw3TR-lcDBG1jQZPbwA6VANSj4BgZYW4Z5wEma8pgFQ3Xi5G0ZElHh0fMxGdNFLquwlwtN1cNc4ZqiAEPR36tu04y0Ev9NJrRjJbiuEBgAcN49gX5UJBaf9x2Pw8gQl6Bik2vnRFh9VAC5loVONn8P1kpKfalNK4g3_3G2D0PT-r3FAmvbad4kmvcJopXvzf9p_Gm28FGd4jGGPG_ovwot-sSVBNAyYM6_9x8o)

[** CHIP IN > **](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d291354da1e04cf2bf146738ebe2bdfb&_e=irgilclnedNTTZyZ7r6ccWrzT-6lZc7A9v5BLyYDmc7g2kWxZvVsHfvdMdLzO5PsEejLcDxOyq_bFRVu2zQDvPO7TexH7LX1GmJMzZJQJWtbYnYSrDc_djUVYXKOS1u9GdQ0tgt2l2c-xxqWz7UTMgOp-aXw3TR-lcDBG1jQZPbwA6VANSj4BgZYW4Z5wEma8pgFQ3Xi5G0ZElHh0fMxGdNFLquwlwtN1cNc4ZqiAEOXRjqahQJBg29O9toZq-yjzgFVzL7Gv9s-zMBeGBB3ejqgwzpIaOItMLL7tx_k2VOYA1VlPkmkaL9Q3SQ8yeXSxCpg2n73jRwEA7SJhpKnmYp0TlIx0iIXnosfisSM85V0VWkQ0obgbl6X_3l5UzTG)

The path we're on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so today.

clean_body: I believe to my core that the most important things in life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the values that guide me and shape my life. | Fellow American, The most important things in life are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I am fighting every day to preserve them. Faith. Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many American households through the generations, in our house we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people. Family. Stable, happy families are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear family should be a top priority, and government should get out of the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor, and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been the American way. Freedom. It is a self-evident truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience, and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people. I've devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress. America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who we are! Right now in America, children are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected, unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every aspect of our lives. This is simply un-American, and we must stop the madness. We must elect more leaders who make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God, family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings we have been given here. Fellow American, we have a chance to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we're running out of time. I'm not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana, and I intend to keep that promise. It's why I have been a trusted ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It's also why I was elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House Republican Conference - one of seven elected leadership positions for Republicans in the House - and to chair the Subcommittee on the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary Committee. We are working in Congress every day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom, The path we're on currently will lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT NOW. We MUST act, and we must do so today. Thank you for all you do, and God bless. Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

| [ ](https://link.email.thepricklypear.)

Mounting scientific evidence suggests that net zero is wildly impractical and probably not even achievable. In September, the Electric Power Research Institute, the research arm of the US electric power industry (which would seem to be naturally inclined to support proposals that increase reliance on electricity), released a sober report on the practicality of net zero.

name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: Josh Hawley’s latest campaign prop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Hawley claims his new bill would “reverse” Citizens United. Experts say otherwise.
#
You won’t believe Josh Hawley’s latest stunt, Peter.
He’s claiming his latest bill would “reverse” the Supreme Court’s decision in Citizens United — a decision in favor of an organization that Hawley’s proudly taken endorsements and max-out checks from. **Or at least, that’s how he’s marketing it.**
Like all his other legislation, this is just a campaign prop. It’s a fake bill that, upon closer inspection, doesn’t do anything. But don’t just take our word for it.
**Experts across the country are calling him out** — including author Jane Mayer, who literally wrote the book on dark money in American politics (_Dark Money: The Hidden History of the Billionaires Behind the Rise of the Radical Right_):
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38841?refcode=em20231101-4106&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4106%2E614464%2EQGmACP)
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38841?refcode=em20231101-4106&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4106%2E614464%2EQGmACP)
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38841?refcode=em20231101-4106&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4106%2E614464%2EQGmACP)
**[HOLD HAWLEY ACCOUNTABLE →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38841?refcode=em20231101-4106&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4106%2E614464%2EQGmACP)**
**The bottom line here is that the elites buying our elections got what they paid for when they supported Hawley.** His bill won’t even affect them — since Citizens United is registered as a nonprofit — and it won’t stop billionaires and corporate elites from funding the groups responsible for flooding our democracy with dark money.
Hawley’s deceit is a real threat to our democracy and we can’t afford another six years of a fraud like him representing Missouri in the U.S. Senate. That’s why Lucas Kunce is doing more than just building his campaign to replace Hawley without a cent from corporate PACs — he’s on a mission to abolish corporate PACs altogether and put everyday people in charge of our country.
**It’s time to get big money the hell out of our politics, and Lucas is the only candidate in this race who’s committed to doing just that.[So if you’re ready to join our grassroots movement, please consider adding your first donation of any amount toward our campaign to elect Lucas Kunce today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38841?refcode=em20231101-4106&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4106%2E614464%2EQGmACP)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38842?refcode=em20231101-4106&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=6&akid=4106%2E614464%2EQGmACP) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38842?refcode=em20231101-4106&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=7&akid=4106%2E614464%2EQGmACP) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38842?refcode=em20231101-4106&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=8&akid=4106%2E614464%2EQGmACP) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38842?refcode=em20231101-4106&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=9&akid=4106%2E614464%2EQGmACP) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38842?refcode=em20231101-4106&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=10&akid=4106%2E614464%2EQGmACP) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38842?refcode=em20231101-4106&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=11&akid=4106%2E614464%2EQGmACP) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38841?refcode=em20231101-4106&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=4106%2E614464%2EQGmACP)

Friend, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell's self-funded extremist opponent Rick Scott only won in 2018 by 0.12% — and experts say he's one of the most vulnerable senators in 2024.
**Now, Debbie is _TIED_ with Scott in a recent poll!**
She's proven to be a serious contender — but Mitch McConnell is counting on Florida staying red to retake Senate control, so we can't slow down for even a second**. If defending our slim Senate majority requires Florida flipping blue** , **then Debbie has to break that tie.**
But to beat Rick Scott's multimillion-dollar campaign, she needs a massive grassroots movement behind her. _The best way to build it is with the crucial insight of the people she's running to represent in Washington._
**Debbie will only win by putting the interests of this people-powered team first — but she still needs 218 responses from Democrats like you! name: Hold The Line
subject: 🎙 Hold The Line Podcast #54 Israel Through God’s Eyes: An Israeli Jew and Lebanese Arab Agree
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=82056c8746804be6a774cfcb4e597b13&_e=vJyLxK743ErNa3hXdcY5pZLJ-L5xgcPGDA9iNzeYJVb6coxpHw5r8HJi-agPkE9UaMChsEDWrD-wRwma5yJTFtd8YlYU_HwBcf_Dp5uWpMF1NWiCMt5Uvo3kutjG1ulNmwQBRHrdEJHFvTj0obyfoN6privkWlRXX1o3hBHRe83W5dlHxIvOG3cBVZipEfMDMQe6FnSlVZ7E9k0lnZV3KxkKJYUCORl6l3Dra6BXcswCgE1GmIxrg75VzWziUmrvCuR-qCBWgvZiIoQMjx_OPT5Kzs7mvAvZsJthzx6GLDTYGgskcxlwgWudqi5EJ5TF)

|

| | Fellow American,
---
War continues to rage in Israel and despite the hatred spewed by the mainstream media and left-wing radicals, it has never been more crucial to stand with Israel! This week's Hold The Line Podcast is a special roundtable discussion between myself, Israeli musician and former IDF captain Yair Levi, Lebanese musician Carine Bassili, and Pastor Rob McCoy. We discuss what’s going on in Israel, how we can pray, and what we can do to respond. Listen today and be informed!

As a reminder, we will have another "Night of Hope For Israel" revival TONIGHT at 6pm at Upperroom in Dallas, TX! We'll be streaming the prayer and worship live at [**letusworship.us/israel**](letusworship.us/israel) or **[HERE](letusworship.us/israel)**.
---

**Postcards & Envelope Stuffing will be next Wednesday November, 8th **
**This has been corrected below.*****
# Join Our Team: Be a Volunteer
# for Our Campaign! 🙋🏻♀️
|
---
As we gear up for an exciting 2024 campaign, we are reaching out to our amazing supporters and community members to invite you to become a vital part of our team.
Below are a few immediate volunteer opportunities we need help with right away.
# Brunswick Veterans Day Parade - Sunday, November 5th! 🇺🇸
|
---
As an Air Force Veteran & Candidate for Congress, I am very excited to be able to participate and walk in the 2023 91st Annual Brunswick Veterans Day Parade!
We need as many volunteers as possible to help us walk in the parade this Sunday, November 5th.
Parade starts at 2:00 PM, but we will need to line up at the Brunswick High School no later than 12:30 PM.
If you are in the area, please consider signing-up to help us show huge Roca for Congress support!
Sign up below or reply back to this email if you can join us on Sunday. ⬇️
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=e65898d734&e=0a12281e0e)
| [SIGN-UP HERE FOR PARADE](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=25f264fd0a&e=0a12281e0e)
---
# Postcard Writing & Envelope Stuffing - Wednesday November, 8th 5-7 PM Frederick Location ✉️
|
---
We are getting ready to host our first in-person volunteer event!
We will be asking volunteers to help us handwrite the postcard below to voters across the district. We believe that a personal handwritten note is a nice touch that voters will appreciate.
| | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
We will also be stuffing envelopes with letters to send out!
We will be meeting next week Wednesday November, 8th 5-7 PM at a location in Frederick.
Sign up below or reply back to this email if you can join us next week. ⬇️
| [SIGN-UP HERE FOR POSTCARDS AND ENVELOPE STUFFING](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=aaa3b4bd46&e=0a12281e0e)
---
# Sign-Up For Future
# Volunteer Opportunities ❤️
|
---
Volunteers like you are the lifeblood of our campaign. Your passion, energy, and commitment can make a significant difference in helping us reach our goals. Whether you're a seasoned campaigner or completely new to the political arena, there are numerous ways you can contribute.We need volunteers for various roles, including:
1. Canvassing: Knock on doors and engage with voters to share our candidate's message.
2. Phone Banking: Make calls to potential supporters and help build a strong network of grassroots advocates.
3. Event Coordination: Assist in planning and organizing campaign events and rallies.
4. Data Entry and Research: Help us maintain accurate voter databases and conduct research on key issues.
5. Social Media and Communications: Manage our online presence and create engaging content.

If you are unable to attend our upcoming events this week but still want to volunteer, please sign up below! Make sure to enter what you think you might be able to help with. Register as a volunteer below! ⬇️
| [VOLUNTEER SIGN-UP](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=9f1cb160fc&e=0a12281e0e)
---
# Donate Today 🙏🏼
|
---
As always, if you are unable to help our campaign by volunteering, fundraising is one of the biggest things we always need help with!
Postcards, envelopes, & everything else are an added cost, and we depend on the generous financial support of amazing supporters like you!
Donate below today! ⬇️
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=c8116363d0&e=0a12281e0e)

Roca for Congress P.O. Box 1725 Frederick, MD 21702 USA

name: Bob Casey for Senate
subject: re: Last month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1038%2E552475%2E_fQ0xy)
Peter, we wanted to be sure to tell you -- because of supporters like you, we exceeded our October fundraising goal and are in a strong position for the next few weeks of this campaign.
**Thank you.** Whether or not you were able to make a contribution, reading our messages means you're part of this team, and we appreciate you being here.
Bob Casey believes all public service is a trust, given in faith and accepted in honor. With your help, we'll fight to keep Bob serving Pennsylvania. He's fighting against attacks on Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid; against tax cuts for the ultra-rich; against countries like China that threaten our jobs with unfair trade practices; and against big health care companies raising costs for the middle class.
We're grateful we met our October goal. But our work is far from over -- and the year between now and Election Day 2024 will go quicker than you think.
**[If you're ready to stay in this fight with us, we hope you'll consider chipping in so we can sustain our work through November and beyond.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231101-1?refcode=em20231101-1&refcode2=1038_552475__fQ0xy&akid=1038%2E552475%2E_fQ0xy)**
We'll share more soon, but for now, thank you again.
With gratitude,
Team Casey
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231101-1?refcode=em20231101-1&refcode2=1038_552475__fQ0xy&akid=1038%2E552475%2E_fQ0xy)**

* * *
To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=1038%2E552475%2E_fQ0xy)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1038%2E552475%2E_fQ0xy)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

Peter, I’m angry.
Ted Cruz is nowhere to be found when gun violence strikes Texas. I know because I saw him do nothing after a 18 year old shooter took the lives of 21 children and teachers in Uvalde, Texas.
Loose Republican gun laws are killing our kids and hurting our communities.
Enough is enough.
As the Uvalde State Senator, I stood alongside survivors and families of loved ones lost to gun violence to demand change and now I’m taking that fight against Ted Cruz and those in Washington.
If you’re frustrated like me, and you want to change the status quo in this country, keep your families safe, and stop gun violence in a real way.
Join our campaign.
Texas needs a Senator who will stand up and keep us safe — and I’m committed to being that Senator. But I can’t do it alone, so I have to ask: Will you rush in $15, or whatever you can spare, to help send me defeat Ted Cruz once and for all? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]
Thank you,
Roland

body:
Support has been overwhelming, so I decided to extend our deadline for 24 hours.

|
---
| | |
Friend, thank you!

We just crushed our 1st End of Month goal!

And because of the overwhelming support of countless grassroots Conservatives, I have decided to extend our deadline for 24 hours.

**Together we sent the Democrats and their media allies a loud and clear message that we are ready to fight in 2024. **

But some patriots missed their chance to join us, so I wanted to give you 1 more chance to join this group of dedicated conservatives.

[**Chip in today to join the thousands of other conservative patriots who are ready to win in 2024.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=717c67da00e342fe95972741be641d99&_e=Al0KaVAYhlekud9PQN2VSXahYo6U32_UWdZvvSu5A6pyoVI-_921EW08UyX6IVYHH9UAmMy9088Rgge0K7TdvrxLzEVCWVGdRpiAobgpaygZdnHm84Gxyq7Usqn4Q8vAPFSr3FJs3_ETo2bDjoH3A5hS2VRUBCLKxMuX9HSOZfV57AxjuIQO-xnG6nATajmI3cBo-tWIQyHiEJIW5-fDkwQ1Lesnhfzz_845NRoHDBXO6shqKeSZGJQuW0h3PjVK6RU7niA6jiI35ipY9LAzU0WImcuMRG16JegZQwpIMvSvV573lKn3A27z0pJ-HqNw7gkfBRO40XLhiuWrLwwT1qVVZrn4QMruJDWTk-H4QBq-wptT3lo6GGpvvHuTYdbrg2V7G3ZHHVQxvZshqxDFvoqoVQHXv_O7ciHBNLn60YCdVjjmbRjRo0CZdN0yCsZ7gaAEnb4BNfNXD3M39s6qsg%3D%3D "Chip in today to join the thousands of other conservative patriots who are ready to win in 2024. ****DEADLINE EXTENDED FOR 24 HOURS****
---

Democrats and the media had written us off.

But together, Friend, we proved them wrong once again.

**_The outpouring of support you have shown me these last few days is enough to make this Louisiana boy blush. _**

I'm just getting started, and with your help I'll keep fighting for our shared conservative values.

So please, chip in now to join my team before our deadline expires at 11:59 PM.

_**I look forward to seeing your name on my roster. **_

God Bless,

Speaker Mike Johnson

name: James Comer
subject: 40 FBI Informants
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**
body:
In the Biden Family
|
---
| [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4573b3b05a9b4de4b77f569f5f600c2f&_e=vB5-8UGgUdS0og9gvKv4xKbE2ehxwC0ZNR5VpRIZ9Fh6ZWoTX4xX-IbdEtyKp2fnK1OspV4WCzVo5OxGjlo_tVL9MUYLLtzOf1n93aRRe-sUqdjdEBMag5a9aRhngu6fvyq80ePj3gBeo1sdJ2i-dsnRPltcRg8J6SxYXjLqMtmlYRrRa2eYTUQ8EtH0T5rM7_BfcO5zo1Mv8tmd66UxanuTIvwxBoQhziW5RY2dhO-AGLsuhuM5Vjb3MInwbs2O2wu0kYdohO4vZpAsiCcvqnC-0uSmKV-Mck2MozGtCqhJsSYRBVfRohmnCxLLWVQIRQNS-tEbhH4Wmvl6fAsa3sWzdVqWFYoZj_xuSlZaKpg%3D)
---
Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I just heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4573b3b05a9b4de4b77f569f5f600c2f&_e=vB5-8UGgUdS0og9gvKv4xKbE2ehxwC0ZNR5VpRIZ9Fh6ZWoTX4xX-IbdEtyKp2fnK1OspV4WCzVo5OxGjlo_tVL9MUYLLtzOf1n93aRRe-sUqdjdEBMag5a9aRhngu6fvyq80ePj3gBeo1sdJ2i-dsnRPltcRg8J6SxYXjLqMtmlYRrRa2eYTUQ8EtH0T5rM7_BfcO5zo1Mv8tmd66UxaoFTWJrbrSw7bnUpcrVnxqnV2Z7E6lbqBstYGDXMCPYeNcA3o0cVbNHPFwBGCpMUsfsIka5R9eF949AiI8IJEbtX4rU1_8aONDy_-_KEY20I94J9LNWxY4hChBOzeseiXP70wYB694xQoAfUgcUuVHE%3D)
---
It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4573b3b05a9b4de4b77f569f5f600c2f&_e=vB5-8UGgUdS0og9gvKv4xKbE2ehxwC0ZNR5VpRIZ9Fh6ZWoTX4xX-IbdEtyKp2fnK1OspV4WCzVo5OxGjlo_tVL9MUYLLtzOf1n93aRRe-sUqdjdEBMag5a9aRhngu6fvyq80ePj3gBeo1sdJ2i-dsnRPltcRg8J6SxYXjLqMtmlYRrRa2eYTUQ8EtH0T5rM7_BfcO5zo1Mv8tmd66UxavUwXhNDHy0zekkhmuJmu2I9GmlBz_rGK-w9rEajBEl4uunP87OgLX-y0D4iWguCC7IDn-tVhLxwr-UvfFh8l0wn4UHeV1soLwGgTM44DJ3M79YnjEasC7pxhqy2jGtmA6MyS36b9bp2avBNB1idcFM%3D)
---
I've only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I'm once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.
As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. **
[**If you 're with me, I'd be honored to have your support.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4573b3b05a9b4de4b77f569f5f600c2f&_e=vB5-8UGgUdS0og9gvKv4xKbE2ehxwC0ZNR5VpRIZ9Fh6ZWoTX4xX-IbdEtyKp2fnK1OspV4WCzVo5OxGjlo_tVL9MUYLLtzOf1n93aRRe-sUqdjdEBMag5a9aRhngu6fvyq80ePj3gBeo1sdJ2i-dsnRPltcRg8J6SxYXjLqMtmlYRrRa2eYTUQ8EtH0T5rM7_BfcO5zo1Mv8tmd66UxaoCuTKHC3FL19pUT27ksyJLmK6Xa0d0d7AXumKwZcO6jFZnbMRS7SSA0a-qk2hTfgprgrNA1lLExBZX61Pv73GTjmz9kFojYKMH3JjlLV8fexMK4pebl9b_lgKn_o-tqOO2kNMY3XDlR1tWKyZ50aZo%3D)
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4573b3b05a9b4de4b77f569f5f600c2f&_e=vB5-8UGgUdS0og9gvKv4xKbE2ehxwC0ZNR5VpRIZ9Fh6ZWoTX4xX-IbdEtyKp2fnK1OspV4WCzVo5OxGjlo_tVL9MUYLLtzOf1n93aRRe-sUqdjdEBMag5a9aRhngu6fvyq80ePj3gBeo1sdJ2i-dsnRPltcRg8J6SxYXjLqMtmlYRrRa2eYTUQ8EtH0T5rM7_BfcO5zo1Mv8tmd66UxagQGqwUDugA7taBTHYGzQFiiaIosPWgK9cpwktZX7tBE9GX8mP47aA5EoDpIqKs8qJCKdDw6E3OQFRJjYwoDTdq9YV6NH8zNDAFIa6KWLkTwH5ijY5Nw3FEvwzQOqxYCjt9OmmAk99ythHeHYvGlvsI%3D)
---
_With Courage,_ James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee
| [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4573b3b05a9b4de4b77f569f5f600c2f&_e=vB5-8UGgUdS0og9gvKv4xKbE2ehxwC0ZNR5VpRIZ9Fh6ZWoTX4xX-IbdEtyKp2fnK1OspV4WCzVo5OxGjlo_tVL9MUYLLtzOf1n93aRRe-sUqdjdEBMag5a9aRhngu6fvyq80ePj3gBeo1sdJ2i-dsnRPltcRg8J6SxYXjLqMtmlYRrRa2eYTUQ8EtH0T5rM7_BfcO5zo1Mv8tmd66UxaqL8N3g8agl7j8lrBwNc1T5p4E8xsmhPQXXCtoACrxGi-TFTFboHRThpdiqHUDUnaHGycbOCsc_PsQrZ7oluL_iBKwMtHkA3z4tyl_FFr7eC4QmDAU68Ykw7nmkrtFXL-KNlf-dl2JEuy6m2xUFSJAc%3D)
---

Harvard University President Claudine Gay has unveiled plans to establish an advisory council aimed at combating antisemitism on campus. In her remarks during the Harvard Hillel Shabbat Dinner, Gay acknowledged the rise in anti-Jewish ..

name: Jirair Ratevosian
subject: Why the American Dream is worth fighting for:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Jirair Ratevosian for Congress
body:
Jirair is running for Congress because there is so much at stake to ensure everyone in our community has equal opportunities and a fair shot to chase their own dream. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/zXToNFXV4kioy6WMrocbTQ2?unsubscribedata=Xh0rbOJQUFvkns2epgiTPuKjFAFzlZDj%2BWOEvtbMbmLZCJ%2F250DT3UwxU6xpImhyluiEWjw4SC5U7dY3euBow9K2tUh%2FCIfZa6Pm47bCAff5LocIylCfRZ0QI%2FqimLlIGH3TOg8sN4ouJGzJlcCHzOwXie4%2BnUFTHnfEGuXwLCROEUkKqyX3iKSvo6yAYrPcEutZKwYRwpACLu76lhQY25mAr%2Bl%2FJY1Te9GiF4wJKqWSxXyFKvArZbXS6M7rf%2BfdPInxL1upTROv3dxdEBCo7zuDPe8fv%2BZHPC9OAObs4OAEqa3oddccFxOOb77Ld%2BH4h%2BAQXauVDlA9JPKYyBVkLQ%2BJPVN2DID8N28m9Gqd8hDs09EuxjOf4AQZq%2FYjZ4YbCOBAh3CriMYoIeTEbYYO3PzypI78P9d9BHYtY1OtPVttzCSxq3P%2BBVFKrnlVFGT6)
---
| |
---
Hi Peter —

My parents and grandparents came to this country to chase the American dream. With a few dollars in their pocket and a few words of English, they left their lives behind to come to Los Angeles – the land of possibilities. They worked multiple jobs to put food on our table, give us access to a good education, and inspire us to live out our own American dream.

**_But now more than ever, the American dream feels out of reach for many._** Our district needs someone who understands those struggles firsthand. I’m running for Congress because I know how Washington D.C. works and have the experience to deliver real change. **[If you stand with me, pitch in $10 or $25 to help my campaign for Congress so that I can strengthen and bring back the American Dream.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72618479/435886220/-377887102?amount=25&refcode=SBD_JR_EM_FR_110123_1_1_AmericanDream&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjQ3NDk0ZGEtZjY3OC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=C3UPQ-Oeo2_AEAGQl96nb_ZtzSHC_PhA4DHpCCXbIGU=)**

The fact of the matter is that Americans are struggling to afford their homes, afford college, access healthcare, and find good-paying jobs — and this is only magnified in marginalized communities.

**To me, the American dream means:**
* More pathways to affordable housing and homeownership
* Every student has the opportunity to pursue a quality higher education without signing up for a life-long sentence of student debt
* Starting and growing small businesses is possible
* Communities are safe from crime
* Access to a healthy environment with clean air and water
* Access to health care for all
* Pathway to citizenship for Dreamers

That’s why I’ve developed a legislative package that addresses these and other priorities that make the American dream attainable again.

**[But to get there, I need your help. Pitch in $10 or $25 to give my campaign the edge it needs to keep the momentum going.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72618482/435886225/-377887102?amount=25&refcode=SBD_JR_EM_FR_110123_1_1_AmericanDream&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjQ3NDk0ZGEtZjY3OC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=C3UPQ-Oeo2_AEAGQl96nb_ZtzSHC_PhA4DHpCCXbIGU=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

name: Our Revolution
subject: UAW stood up to the greed of the rich and won!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
| | [Click here to congratulate UAW workers on their historic win!](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12059?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231101_PT_uawty_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_uawty&t=11&akid=4862%2E5885482%2Evu6cJG)

| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12059?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231101_PT_uawty_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_uawty&t=12&akid=4862%2E5885482%2Evu6cJG)
---

Peter Willis,

After 46 days of skilled organizing that demonstrated the power of worker solidarity, the United Auto Workers union delivered a significant victory that will concretely improve the lives of workers.

Union leader Sean Fain's tactical brilliance and message discipline kept the public dialogue focused on the greed of the auto companies and created a fresh example of what solidarity can accomplish.

[Peter Willis, thank you so much for standing with auto workers against the greed of the big three auto companies! Celebrate this victory for workers by clicking here!](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12059?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231101_PT_uawty_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_uawty&t=13&akid=4862%2E5885482%2Evu6cJG)

[](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12059?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231101_PT_uawty_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_uawty&t=14&akid=4862%2E5885482%2Evu6cJG)
In the final deal struck, General Motors tentatively agreed to a 25% wage increase that took the rising cost of living into account. The top wage will now be over $42 an hour by 2028, and workers successfully eliminated an unfair two-tiered wage system for newer employees.

But that's not it. The agreement also secures permanent positions for temporary workers and raises benefits, including increased 401(k) contributions.

Additionally, the UAW secured a future for their workers by winning a pathway for workers at GM's electric car battery plants to earn the same wages as others and won $2,500 in additional payments to retirees and surviving spouses.

This agreement was only possible because of the diligence of the workers and their union — and the solidarity of Our Revolution members like you who stood with our union siblings at UAW on picket lines across the country.

[Click here to congratulate UAW on their amazing union victory!](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12059?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231101_PT_uawty_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_uawty&t=15&akid=4862%2E5885482%2Evu6cJG)

When we organize, we win.

Fellow American, we are blessed! I just got word from House GOP leadership and I have HUGE news - **They have granted my campaign an EXTENSION. ¡Vamos!** I’m so grateful because if not, I would have to consider ending my campaign. The Democrats' money machine is just so BIG, and we didn’t hit our fundraising deadline. I made sure they knew, you would step up and help with this extension. clean_body: | | | Fellow American, we are blessed! I just got word from House GOP leadership and I have HUGE news - They have granted my campaign an EXTENSION. ¡Vamos! I’m so grateful because if not, I would have to consider ending my campaign. The Democrats' money machine is just so BIG, and we didn’t hit our fundraising deadline. I made sure they knew, you would step up and help with this extension. Please don’t let me down, Fellow American! | | | | | | We need to post numbers so good that the Left simply can’t ignore it. I want everyone to know that you can’t mess with Florida, and that our conservative leadership is here to stay. But first, we need to meet this goal. | | | | | | Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar | | | | Paid for by Salazar for Congress | | Unsubscribe from future emails

subject: Join Us To Get Out The Vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMMP/1/85567/images/FVA-logo-05.png]
Check out the exciting events Freedom Virginia has coming up
Please join us for our upcoming events over the next two weeks,
to make sure you don't miss anything follow us on social media.
https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVA [https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVA] https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa [https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa] https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva [https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva]
Fall Fest Vote-A-Rama
https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/588678/ [https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/588678/]
Saturday 10/28
Join us for an evening of FREE family-friendly fun! Come to the Signet Center Bowling Alley for free bowling and other games, free food, and more! There will be entertainment from local comedians, swag bags, and a trunk-or-treat for the kids. During the fun, you can find information on HOW and WHERE to vote and make a voting plan!
Click here to sign up via Mobilize
Sign up here [https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/588678/]
https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/580994/ [https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/580994/] Saturday 10/28:
Join Freedom Virginia, Repro Rising, and Generation Ratify VA to help get Russet Perry across the finish line for SD 31! This is a crucial seat for us to win to protect abortion access for Virginia - come out and help us spread the word and get voters to show up!
Click here to sign up via Mobilize
Sign up here [https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/588180/]
https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/588997/ [https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/588997/] Saturday 10/28:
Join South Asians for America, Democratic Asian Americans of Virginia, and Freedom Virginia to get out the vote for the amazing candidates we have here in Loudoun. Let's make sure voters are aware of how important it is to come out for this election and help get these champions for equity and affordability across the finish line!
Click here to sign up via Mobilize
Sign up here [https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/588997/]
https://www.mobilize.us/dpva/event/584107/ [https://www.mobilize.us/dpva/event/584107/] Canvassing For Clint Jenkins
Come knock doors for Nadarius Clark and Clint Jenkins! In such a close election, every vote counts! We'll be talking to Democrats about Early Voting and making a plan to get out and vote!
Click here to sign up via Mobilize
Sign up here [https://www.mobilize.us/dpva/event/584107/]
https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/588868/ [https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/588868/] Virtual PhoneBanking For Travis Nembhard
Call your neighbors to get the word out about HD-22's next Delegate Travis Nembhard! Travis Nembhard is an attorney, former financial regulator, and a former administrative law judge running for VA House of Delegates District 22.
Click here to sign up via Mobilize
Sign up here [https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/588868/]
At Freedom Virginia
We are dedicated to advancing economic security policies and creating a Commonwealth where all Virginians have the freedom to thrive and contribute to their community. We are working to ensure that hard work is respected and that all Virginians, no matter who they are, where they live, or what they do, can succeed for themselves and their families.
Visit our site [https://freedomva.org/]

To our family, he's husband, dad and role model.

| [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9323b51a4d604b0ead3e8c359275cb73&_e=fpF9TGbKrzve-IAxOP3EzGu8aDpSwU57LVggXSPsL7Gt83sn3dPZCv3FqFQZzXbG1Qk7VpHrIQQoU_LcGNdE_OLdPyd8IkwCKUrddxdTFXBvjW-Dyzz2By4HtXxluzuEnKplBL4_H4lM0eavGpxLcRfGpdKM-k22dGfBMRaNl6vQb5xgBAzYg6RtvSdZtb3z0KJKISYlqupXqCR28ldW_yx5hedGF8xnS0KlfAWn7wjX5FsaXIsSda9BDvKmZsu0D7HghCILLvaRqUfZxr0P269_E052EhWrpIanCJ4WRsRgJfl_LYwxlEQSmJ1cy1MeKTicEd4eJQvvSfjzKqJyNTJHz3aesHQQMQUFI8hxk2DzLHXjReQZ468ewebY2MXk)

Fellow American,

Most people know Mike Johnson as the new Speaker of the House, a constitutional law attorney, and small business owner - but to our family, he's husband, dad, and role model.

My name is Kelly Johnson, and I'm Mike's wife and his number one supporter. We've been married for 23 years now, and I have never known anyone who is more tirelessly committed to serving God, our country, and its people--or who fights as hard for our principles every single day. He was born with that servant's heart.

Mike is respected for his courage and integrity and trusted for his wisdom and insight. He is honest, principled, smart, and unshakeable. That's precisely what America needs in these times of unprecedented challenge.

[**I wanted you to hear a bit more about my husband Mike, from me, the person who knows him best. Would you be willing to spare a moment to watch this video I recorded for you?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9323b51a4d604b0ead3e8c359275cb73&_e=fpF9TGbKrzve-IAxOP3EzGu8aDpSwU57LVggXSPsL7Gt83sn3dPZCv3FqFQZzXbG1Qk7VpHrIQQoU_LcGNdE_OLdPyd8IkwCKUrddxdTFXBvjW-Dyzz2By4HtXxluzuEnKplBL4_H4lM0eavGpxLcRfGpdKM-k22dGfBMRaNl6vQb5xgBAzYg6RtvSdZtb3z0KJKISYlqupXqCR28ldW_yx5hedGF8xnS0KlfAWn7winglZAXXHPpuJNLUaOnTsSgwd73FEbbGQiCdzLdY6o1K4Jr3yxYTMtKFHWp9ew6Viz9KtkA4VA5wvm4YUI_3hIx8Rx6EOHmUJfXbDk1ssEfWpYywMDhoB9ZmulaUznVS-QEUTuGFVBxSem-Xinpmny)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Sign the Petition: Toxic wastewater is polluting our oceans and communities
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2091486?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Cruise ship pollution is harming marine life, our oceanic ecosystems, and our environment! Act Now! >>** In 2021 we lost _**1,101 manatees**_ \-- the worst year on record for these beloved gentle giants. And in 2022, there were over _**600 manatee deaths**_ reported. Experts link this decline to a devastating loss of seagrass -- manatees’ primary food source. Seagrass is essential to our oceanic ecosystems -- **_it absorbs almost a fifth of the entire world’s ocean carbon._** This is _**CRUCIAL**_ in defending our planet from climatic crisis. **Seagrass and other valuable marine resources are being decimated by profit-driven cruise ship corporations** that dump polluted wastewater into our oceans and churn up sand and contaminants that endanger water quality. The cruise industry is hurting marine life like manatees, destroying our oceans, and harming communities. [_**TAKE ACTION: Big Cruise corporations are putting profit over our planet, and we MUST hold them accountable for their destructive pollution >>**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2091487?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2091488?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
When cruise ships travel close to shore, they churn up sand and contaminants -- endangering water quality and polluting coastal communities. Yet, there is no lasting accountability for the damage the cruise industry causes.
**Carnival Corp. has already been fined millions _TWICE_ in the last 5 years for its illegal wastewater dumping.** But right now, Carnival ships are free to continue sailing, polluting all the way. These greedy Big Cruise corporations will continue to pollute our waters unless we do something immediately. [_**Friend will you take action now to STOP the cruise ship industry from threatening our oceans and our environment?**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2091489?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2091490?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for taking action against Big Cruise corporations!
Friends of the Earth**
|

body:

Peter,

I write this having just been elected by my colleagues as the 56th Speaker of the United States House of Representatives.

The task of leading our House majority is a great one, and to say that I’m humbled by the faith my colleagues have bestowed on me is an understatement.

My message to you today is this: When Republicans come together, there is no measure of what we can achieve.

In the near term, my team and I will work to make sure that we’re passing responsible, fiscally conservative legislation to fund our government and support our military. **And with an election a little more than twelve months away, we’ll work around the clock to grow our House majority and help EVERY Republican incumbent in their reelection campaign.**

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Fighting extremism in Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_110123_Johnson_fwd_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_110123_Johnson_fwd_actrs]
Friend,
I wanted to reach out to you myself because Republicans have already passed their first major piece of legislation under their new Speaker, Mike Johnson.
This bill is bad news for working families, the economy, and the climate.
A year ago, I fought to pass the Inflation Reduction Act, the most significant climate legislation that any country on the planet has ever passed. This bill boosts domestic manufacturing of clean energy, invests in the health of our forests and watersheds, and helps us tackle drought in the American West. All the while, it already has created thousands of good-paying jobs in Colorado, with thousands more on the way.
The Inflation Reduction Act reduces emissions, while building an economy that works for everyone. It’s a win-win. But under their new Speaker, Republicans in the House have passed a bill to repeal parts of this historic legislation.
I’ve spent years working on solutions to address the climate crisis, cut pollution, and ensure clean air and water for Coloradans. The Inflation Reduction Act is a critical piece of this.
My campaign has a key fundraising deadline coming up. With your grassroots support, we’ll be able to hit our goal and keep fighting against Republican extremism — and keep up our work for reproductive rights, corporate accountability, and climate action. Will you donate now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_110123_Johnson_fwd_actrs]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_110123_Johnson_fwd_actrs]
Thank you,
Michael
