clean_body: [] Friend, I wanted to reach out to you myself because Republicans have already passed their first major piece of legislation under their new Speaker, Mike Johnson. This bill is bad news for working families, the economy, and the climate. A year ago, I fought to pass the Inflation Reduction Act, the most significant climate legislation that any country on the planet has ever passed. This bill boosts domestic manufacturing of clean energy, invests in the health of our forests and watersheds, and helps us tackle drought in the American West. All the while, it already has created thousands of good-paying jobs in Colorado, with thousands more on the way. The Inflation Reduction Act reduces emissions, while building an economy that works for everyone. It’s a win-win. But under their new Speaker, Republicans in the House have passed a bill to repeal parts of this historic legislation. I’ve spent years working on solutions to address the climate crisis, cut pollution, and ensure clean air and water for Coloradans. The Inflation Reduction Act is a critical piece of this. My campaign has a key fundraising deadline coming up. With your grassroots support, we’ll be able to hit our goal and keep fighting against Republican extremism — and keep up our work for reproductive rights, corporate accountability, and climate action. Will you donate now? [] DONATE NOW [] Thank you, Michael ---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team Bennet <info@michaelbennet.com> Date: Thu, Oct 26, 2023 at 11:04 AM Subject: Boebert's buddy Well, friend, it finally happened. After three weeks, four nominees, and five votes, Republicans have finally elected Rep. Mike Johnson as Speaker of the House. There’s no point in sugarcoating it: Mike Johnson is a MAGA Republican whose views are bad for working families, our economy, and our fundamental rights. Here’s a taste of our new Speaker’s values: Johnson supports a nationwide abortion ban and cutting off funding for Planned Parenthood. Johnson has denied the science on the climate crisis and questioned whether it’s caused by human activity. Johnson has tried to slash Social Security and Medicare. Johnson has repeatedly made anti-LGBTQ statements and introduced a “Don’t Say Gay” bill to the House last year. * Johnson helped create the legal strategy behind the Big Lie — Trump's effort to overturn the results of the 2020 election — despite no evidence of widespread fraud. With a resume this extreme, it’s unsurprising that Lauren Boebert, who represents CO-03, is embracing Mike Johnson’s leadership — especially given his role as an election denier. She was right by his side yesterday celebrating his victory. MAGA extremists like Lauren Boebert and Mike Johnson are the face of the Republican Party. But in 2024, we have a major chance to get Boebert and others like her out of office. Michael is working hard to elect Democrats in Colorado and across the country that support democracy and reproductive rights. But he’ll need your help. Can you chip in whatever you can right now? After all the support that grassroots patriots like YOU showed our campaign ahead of last night's end-of-month deadline, we absolutely CRUSHED our October goal! And despite the unconstitutional Biden Gag Order and a sham trial to REMOVE yours truly from the ballot during the month of October, our resilient movement proved that truly NOTHING can break us. But with such a strong showing to close out the month, I simply had to ask... How much higher can we continue to SURGE? Can we surge so high in this FINAL QUARTER of 2023 that we 'll even end it with more cash on hand than Crooked Joe for the second straight quarter? So, I 've instructed our team to put in place an internal *extension until 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT**to give us the largest boost possible as we work tirelessly to surge higher than ever before. | Thank you, Donald J. name: Rick Coplen
subject: Scott Perry’s Perfect Two-Fer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen
body:
|
---
After electing the most extreme House Speaker in our nation’s history, it’s no surprise that the first order of business for Perry & Co. was trying to protect wealthy tax cheats while weakening national security, a perfect two-fer in Perry-land.

**Help me enforce the law against wealthy tax cheats and strengthen our national security.**

Specifically, House Republicans proposed to give $14.3 billion in aid to Israel and pay for it by crippling the ability of the IRS to go after wealthy tax cheats. Worse, it splits aid for Israel from aid for Ukraine, ignores humanitarian aid for innocents in Gaza, and fails to strengthen border security, all of which are contained in President Biden’s proposal.

It’s hard to know whether this is more stupid or more self-destructive.

On the stupid side, going after the top 0.1% of wealthy tax cheats brings in $6.29 for every dollar it costs. So by not going after wealthy tax cheats, Perry is either increasing the national debt by $30 billion, according to the Committee for a Responsible Federal Budget, or shifting $30 billion onto the backs of honest taxpayers. Perry thinks this is smart.

A 2021 study found that the top 1% of earners fail to report more than 20% of their income. Perry wants to let these cheaters continue to break the law. So much for his “commitment” to law enforcement.

**Please help me enforce the law against these tax cheats and reduce the deficit.**

On the destructive side, Perry & Co. are playing into the hands of the 21st Century’s #1 war criminal, Vladimir Putin. By wavering in America’s support for Ukraine, they embolden Putin. As a combat and peace-keeping veteran, I find it personally offensive that Perry & Co. flirt with policies that can get American soldiers killed if Putin thinks Republicans won’t object to him invading a NATO ally.

On both stupid and destructive sides, this radical House Republican proposal cannot pass the Senate and so is nothing more than political theatre. Even Senate Republicans, including Minority Leader Mitch McConnell (R-KY) and Susan Collins (R-ME), the ranking Republican member of the Senate Appropriations Committee, think it’s wrong. McConnell called it “a false choice.” Collins correctly said, “...our national security interests are being aggressively challenged by all these authoritarian actors in an effort to dismantle the international order that we established following World War II.”

At a time of international crisis when level-headed, mature governance is needed, Perry & Co. are playing juvenile games.

**National security and law enforcement are not games. I won’t play them. I will put America’s interests first, not partisan politics.**

Onward,

Rick

P.S. My sincerest thanks to all who donated ahead of our end-of-month deadline. With your continued support, I'm confident that we can overcome any challenges we'll face on the road ahead.

clean_body: | After electing the most extreme House Speaker in our nation’s history, it’s no surprise that the first order of business for Perry & Co. was trying to protect wealthy tax cheats while weakening national security, a perfect two-fer in Perry-land. Help me enforce the law against wealthy tax cheats and strengthen our national security. Specifically, House Republicans proposed to give $14.3 billion in aid to Israel and pay for it by crippling the ability of the IRS to go after wealthy tax cheats. Worse, it splits aid for Israel from aid for Ukraine, ignores humanitarian aid for innocents in Gaza, and fails to strengthen border security, all of which are contained in President Biden’s proposal. It’s hard to know whether this is more stupid or more self-destructive. On the stupid side, going after the top 0.1% of wealthy tax cheats brings in $6.29 for every dollar it costs. So by not going after wealthy tax cheats, Perry is either increasing the national debt by $30 billion, according to the Committee for a Responsible Federal Budget, or shifting $30 billion onto the backs of honest taxpayers. Perry thinks this is smart. A 2021 study found that the top 1% of earners fail to report more than 20% of their income. Perry wants to let these cheaters continue to break the law. So much for his “commitment” to law enforcement. Please help me enforce the law against these tax cheats and reduce the deficit. On the destructive side, Perry & Co. are playing into the hands of the 21st Century’s #1 war criminal, Vladimir Putin. By wavering in America’s support for Ukraine, they embolden Putin. As a combat and peace-keeping veteran, I find it personally offensive that Perry & Co. flirt with policies that can get American soldiers killed if Putin thinks Republicans won’t object to him invading a NATO ally. On both stupid and destructive sides, this radical House Republican proposal cannot pass the Senate and so is nothing more than political theatre. Even Senate Republicans, including Minority Leader Mitch McConnell (R-KY) and Susan Collins (R-ME), the ranking Republican member of the Senate Appropriations Committee, think it’s wrong. McConnell called it “a false choice.” Collins correctly said, “...our national security interests are being aggressively challenged by all these authoritarian actors in an effort to dismantle the international order that we established following World War II.” At a time of international crisis when level-headed, mature governance is needed, Perry & Co. are playing juvenile games. National security and law enforcement are not games. I won’t play them. I will put America’s interests first, not partisan politics. Onward, Rick P.S. My sincerest thanks to all who donated ahead of our end-of-month deadline. With your continued support, I'm confident that we can overcome any challenges we'll face on the road ahead. | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen | =

body:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72624864/435892052/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDlhN2ZhZS1mYjc4LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SJpG3FLsw8D-aLld87IhBjPLkwVfLgGbbQxFJGkgeOY=&emci=145926c8-f978-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=d09a7fae-fb78-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72624866/435892053/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDlhN2ZhZS1mYjc4LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SJpG3FLsw8D-aLld87IhBjPLkwVfLgGbbQxFJGkgeOY=&emci=145926c8-f978-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=d09a7fae-fb78-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
When I ran for Congress against Lauren Boebert last year, one of the greatest gifts was being able to meet and listen to so many people on the campaign trail.
My son Felix and I traveled over 24,000 miles in our red pick-up truck across the entire district – meeting people in diners, bars, living rooms, and backyards. We’re already racking up even more miles this time.
You can learn a lot when you stop and take the time to truly listen. It’s something more people in Washington should be doing frankly, instead of only meeting with big-pocketed donors and corporate lobbyists.
**Now, I’m running against Boebert again, and my team created a short survey.[Will you take just a few quick minutes to tell me what you’re concerned about right now and what issues are most important to you and your family?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72624868/435892054/-1529768751?em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&mp=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDlhN2ZhZS1mYjc4LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SJpG3FLsw8D-aLld87IhBjPLkwVfLgGbbQxFJGkgeOY=&emci=145926c8-f978-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=d09a7fae-fb78-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)**
I’m looking forward to hearing what you have to say.
Thank you for being such a critical part of this campaign.
With gratitude -
Adam

Peter, We know you’ve been getting a lot of emails. But we wouldn’t be reaching out if it wasn’t absolutely necessary. Brandon takes the stage for the only debate of the year in less than 4 hours. To be blunt — this debate could be the difference between winning and losing. But before he steps on stage, we need your support to fund our voter outreach work. **[Can we count on you to chip in $25 before Brandon’s debate, Peter? We need to raise $50,000 to fully fund our GOTV work during this final stretch.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72626512/435892886/-192700460?amount=25&refcode=ea.7618522d-fd78-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.7618522d-fd78-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzYxODUyMmQtZmQ3OC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BqhZqDGrk7Ung6toW_qCImwBYrk8sNvqlK1ugZl2TOg=)** | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72626513/435892887/-192700460?amount=25&refcode=ea.7618522d-fd78-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.7618522d-fd78-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzYxODUyMmQtZmQ3OC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BqhZqDGrk7Ung6toW_qCImwBYrk8sNvqlK1ugZl2TOg=)**

Tate Reeves pushed this debate back until the very last minute. That means reporters, pundits, politicians, and — most importantly — voters from all across the state are all going to be watching this debate closely.
**And if you are able to make a donation of $25 right now, you’ll make a real difference in our ability to reach and mobilize those voters after Brandon steps off stage.**
Our team has a $50,000 GOTV goal that we need to raise by the end of the election. Please understand: We aren’t making that number up. It is exactly what we need to raise to fund our final voter outreach push across Mississippi.
Missing this goal means cutting back our field operation and our TV budget at the very worst time. With polls showing us virtually tied, that could be the difference between winning and losing.
**[Please, can you make a contribution right now toward our $50,000 goal? Anything you can invest before Brandon steps on stage to debate Tate will make a real difference to our grassroots campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72626514/435892888/-192700460?amount=25&refcode=ea.7618522d-fd78-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.7618522d-fd78-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzYxODUyMmQtZmQ3OC1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BqhZqDGrk7Ung6toW_qCImwBYrk8sNvqlK1ugZl2TOg=)**

clean_body: This could be the difference between winning and losing. | = Peter, We know you’ve been getting a lot of emails. But we wouldn’t be reaching out if it wasn’t absolutely necessary. Brandon takes the stage for the only debate of the year in less than 4 hours. To be blunt — this debate could be the difference between winning and losing. But before he steps on stage, we need your support to fund our voter outreach work. = | = Tate Reeves pushed this debate back until the very last minute. That means reporters, pundits, politicians, and — most importantly — voters from all across the state are all going to be watching this debate closely. And if you are able to make a donation of $25 right now, you’ll make a real difference in our ability to reach and mobilize those voters after Brandon steps off stage. Our team has a $50,000 GOTV goal that we need to raise by the end of the election. Please understand: We aren’t making that number up. It is exactly what we need to raise to fund our final voter outreach push across Mississippi. Missing this goal means cutting back our field operation and our TV budget at the very worst time. With polls showing us virtually tied, that could be the difference between winning and losing. = Peter, let’s do this together. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Do you want to see the next Presidential Debate in Miami? Chip in before 11:59 p.m. on Thursday. | | Fellow American, I want to see you in the crowd when I take center stage for the third presidential debate in Miami. We're giving away (2) tickets to the debate in Miami - one for you and a guest. All you have to do is chip in any amount before midnight tomorrow! During the first two debates, I made it clear where I stand on the issues. I have become the establishment's number one target - and I know they're gearing up to come for me again. I am not going to let you down, Fellow American, and I hope you won't let me down either. Let's win this next debate with YOU by my side. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. In addition to two tickets (one for you and a guest), we'll provide airfare and accommodations for this historic debate. | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. name: Juanita at United We Dream Action
subject: We’re dedicated to protecting our rights
body:
Halloween is over, but the Republicans are getting spookier | | | Peter, Halloween may have come and gone, but the Republicans are becoming even more chilling in their efforts to undermine our causes: DACA, accessible healthcare, freedom of movement, immigration reform, reproductive rights, and more. | 6 Days To Go!
---
|
---
| Friends,
My wife, Tracy, and I are fired up for Virginia. Everyone across the state is working so hard. For the next six days, getting folks to vote Republican in Virginia elections is all that matters. The last day to vote early in person is Saturday November 4. Please pray for Virginia, please get friends to the polls, and please vote November 7.
Volunteers Wanted Election Day: Email john@mcguireforvirginia.com Thanks to everyone who has signed up already!
While campaigning all over the place, I am keeping my ears open and listening to your ideas on how we can improve Virginia. The following is some of what is on my mind and what we have been up to:
---
| Are You Over Target?
---
|
---
| With just six days to go, you might be catching a lot of flak. This means you are over the target! We all know politics can be nasty and we know those over target get the most heat. Despite the challenges, keep it positive and keep doing the right thing. To my fellow Republican friends across Virginia, in the thick of battle right now, put on the whole armor of God; [Ephesians 6:10-18. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014f3pEu3tih3GEN7EXCBNszFvTAIH9GY4C3VDfUsSj-Tc9402YU3jj2N_9tlzPqQy4XbjxOpySAkeW3NMAlUEmfZjr4Luvx5jQyATqc1Fjv3d7KUPGBFIVYU2h2dhVbdRMiguWMAnSlD8JGKIl3lbMR43AOltNZDGuDnEzAHpBik9eMT_yjFqza08Dcsl34qpYJz7Imko3MEYqnTiGQppa2oqWDx4751snZIUQbtbPc0=&c=tJzQbGBLfMGqlMDLTml-0v7JgVv4cjSz5NPbqMe08FR7vzDxHCjb9w==&ch=pZdbKwJedGTxjCMm2HHSwwusls_01LJEnZvohYJGverfFWpwWbTwOQ==), pray, and keep your foot on the gas! Remember God is in control!
---
| A Funny Frogman Meme
---
|
---
| Someone sent me this Meme and I thought it might get a few laughs. There are many ways to serve. I am proud to continue to serve you and our great country as a legislator!
---
| All in Virginia; Governor Youngkin Visits Louisa County Schools
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
Auto repair class.
---
|
---
Cyber security class.
---
|
---
| Always great to see my brother, Louisa Commonwealth's Attorney Rusty McGuire. Thank you and all law enforcement folks for keeping us safe!
---
|
---
Casey Clifton!
---
|
---
We have been praying for Lloyd. He looks great!
---
|
---
|
---
| Today, it was honor to tour Thomas Jefferson Elementary School and Louisa High School with Governor Youngkin, Secretary of Education Aimee Guidera, Superintendant of Schools Lisa Coons, fellow Delegate Buddy Fowler, and so many more. Thank you, Louisa School Superintendant, Doug Straley and staff for welcoming us and for participating with us in the All in Virginia round table. Thank you Governor for allowing me to discuss legislation I worked on with Louisa Director of CTE-Workforce Development Bo Bundrick and others that created a Virginia CTE signing day, the fourth Wednesday of April!
Governor Glenn Youngkin also delivered Certificate of Recognition recognizing November as Family Engagement in Education Month. Parents absolutely sit at the head of the table in their child's education journey.
---
| Governor issues executive directive to combat anti-Semitism
---
|
---
| Gullible or lazy protestors at our Universities and around the world don't seem to realize Israel is fighting right now for her existence. I stand with Israel and the Jewish people.
Thank you, Governor Glenn Youngkin, for issuing an executive directive to combat anti-Semitism and other religious hate in Virginia.

|
"As a Jewish Israeli Member of the Central Virginia Community, John McGuire has always been there for my community and for Israel. He understands that a threat to Israel is a threat to the U.S. and all of Western Civilization. -Yael Levin Board of Supervisor Candidate Ashland District, Hanover County.

[Click here for Governor Youngkin's press release](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014f3pEu3tih3GEN7EXCBNszFvTAIH9GY4C3VDfUsSj-Tc9402YU3jj2N_9tlzPqQyApDnugmWgquGLQobDBv9aPVasIxWDVDGIlv-Lfw1extOHrmUhZjAz76gXe8BuK2dnytk6-G9zu364OrtHMPbZtZ2eiC49JimzjTQoinGLK4C1RU8WYh8DrK79kAqu-lHs14PiUi20yYw78bF46AK5UVgUI-m1L1cykPUGGKFp3_4z3oV1yEFcw==&c=tJzQbGBLfMGqlMDLTml-0v7JgVv4cjSz5NPbqMe08FR7vzDxHCjb9w==&ch=pZdbKwJedGTxjCMm2HHSwwusls_01LJEnZvohYJGverfFWpwWbTwOQ==).

clean_body: | | | | | | == | 6 Days To Go! | | Friends, My wife, Tracy, and I are fired up for Virginia. Everyone across the state is working so hard. For the next six days, getting folks to vote Republican in Virginia elections is all that matters. The last day to vote early in person is Saturday November 4. Please pray for Virginia, please get friends to the polls, and please vote November 7. Volunteers Wanted Election Day: Email john@mcguireforvirginia.com Thanks to everyone who has signed up already! While campaigning all over the place, I am keeping my ears open and listening to your ideas on how we can improve Virginia. The following is some of what is on my mind and what we have been up to: | Are You Over Target? | | With just six days to go, you might be catching a lot of flak. This means you are over the target! We all know politics can be nasty and we know those over target get the most heat. Despite the challenges, keep it positive and keep doing the right thing. To my fellow Republican friends across Virginia, in the thick of battle right now, put on the whole armor of God; ==, pray, and keep your foot on the gas! Remember God is in control! | A Funny Frogman Meme | | Someone sent me this Meme and I thought it might get a few laughs. There are many ways to serve. I am proud to continue to serve you and our great country as a legislator! | All in Virginia; Governor Youngkin Visits Louisa County Schools | | | | | | | Auto repair class. | Cyber security class. | | Always great to see my brother, Louisa Commonwealth's Attorney Rusty McGuire. Thank you and all law enforcement folks for keeping us safe! | Casey Clifton! | We have been praying for Lloyd. He looks great! | | | Today, it was honor to tour Thomas Jefferson Elementary School and Louisa High School with Governor Youngkin, Secretary of Education Aimee Guidera, Superintendant of Schools Lisa Coons, fellow Delegate Buddy Fowler, and so many more. Thank you, Louisa School Superintendant, Doug Straley and staff for welcoming us and for participating with us in the All in Virginia round table. Thank you Governor for allowing me to discuss legislation I worked on with Louisa Director of CTE-Workforce Development Bo Bundrick and others that created a Virginia CTE signing day, the fourth Wednesday of April! Governor Glenn Youngkin also delivered Certificate of Recognition recognizing November as Family Engagement in Education Month. Parents absolutely sit at the head of the table in their child's education journey. | Governor issues executive directive to combat anti-Semitism | | Gullible or lazy protestors at our Universities and around the world don't seem to realize Israel is fighting right now for her existence. I stand with Israel and the Jewish people. Thank you, Governor Glenn Youngkin, for issuing an executive directive to combat anti-Semitism and other religious hate in Virginia. | | | ---|--- | "As a Jewish Israeli Member of the Central Virginia Community, John McGuire has always been there for my community and for Israel. He understands that a threat to Israel is a threat to the U.S. and all of Western Civilization. -Yael Levin Board of Supervisor Candidate Ashland District, Hanover County. ==. | Law and Order | | Law and order, or lawlessness, is on the ballot. To our men and women in law enforcement, thank you for keeping us safe! | Margie Derreberry Goochland Tea Party | | Song of the Day, Lauren Daigle - On To Me | == | Here is one of my wife Tracy's favorite songs. For a little inspiration, ==. | Hope Church | | Keep it Positive | | Fluvanna Candidates | | Appomattox County | | Powhatan County | | Prince Edward County | | Mark Early for Delegate, Chesterfield | | We are Praying for Trump | | Ground zero; if you know anyone who lives in Henrico County, please ask them to vote to re-elect ==, elect ==, and elect ==. Please also help the following Senate Candidates with your prayers, your vote, and your dollars; ==, ==, ==, ==, and ==. | Take care, please spread the word, and I look forward to seeing you around the District! Want a yard sign, want to volunteer, want to receive our newsletter? name: Team Baldwin
subject: We missed our goal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| We missed our October fundraising goal.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1447%2E35263%2E9tRcoO)
We wanted you to hear this from us, Peter: **We came up short of our October fundraising goal.** Look, we’re not here to tell you that missing a deadline means the sky is falling or that we’ll never be able to recover. Everyone here at Tammy Baldwin for Senate appreciates your support and we won’t scare you into donating. But these deadlines _do matter_ to grassroots campaigns like Tammy’s. Here’s why: **$20 million** : That’s how much Tammy’s potential opponent — California megamillionaire Eric Hovde — is reportedly willing to self-fund when he jumps into this race. **$77 million** : That’s how much Republicans spent in 2022 to reelect Ron Johnson to Wisconsin’s other Senate seat. **$100 million** : That’s how much experts anticipate Republicans could spend in next year’s election to defeat Tammy. When we’re up against these eye-popping sums, every fundraising goal we set makes a difference — and each $5, $10, or $25 donation from supporters like you to help us get there makes a difference, too. **[Tammy doesn’t have a multimillion dollar personal warchest to fall back on like her potential GOP opponents, which is why we’re asking: Will you help us make up the ground we lost by making a donation to reelect Tammy?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-nov23.TOAtRC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231101_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1447%2E35263%2E9tRcoO)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-nov23.gM21RB&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231101_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1447%2E35263%2E9tRcoO)

body:

name: Amazing News!! (Stop Gun Violence PAC)
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene & Lauren Boebert
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STOP GUN VIOLENCE PAC

Fellow American,

Most people know Mike Johnson as the new Speaker of the House, a constitutional law attorney, and small business owner – but to our family, he’s husband, dad, and role model.

My name is Kelly Johnson, and I’m Mike’s wife and his number one supporter. We’ve been married for 23 years now, and I have never known anyone who is more tirelessly committed to serving God, our country, and its people—or who fights as hard for our principles every single day. He was born with that servant’s heart.

Mike is respected for his courage and integrity and trusted for his wisdom and insight. He is honest, principled, smart, and unshakeable. That’s precisely what America needs in these times of unprecedented challenge.

[**I wanted you to hear a bit more about my husband Mike, from me, the person who knows him best. Would you be willing to spare a moment to watch this video I recorded for you?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f87938d6eecd4629a5689b7945acbf1c&_e=ZcGpOsIqNQad5HIj2rBpeOYLg3gzW1GJPcNv35GSkpNgFwYAK7B0jP709bjmRLjaMa2a_o-9Y-GkKad5iBqBAG-cut-Hnw4AjJJAU51e2jBs-j3le6dQL_BvZrDxMuxtLhNiYkKzfpsgT_4KsZCdoxHruvjt-9smYeeQ7OPK0i5KXrWbiz_0rXa6PlhD4HrSdiNcYl03D_j-3ydm-aeRMQWELnNNcZEgONNfMiASu2wfxtxs98xjPzJHcQwbed0nQviIq-klplgYnOPxRd6h3xYHkoU9AMfWycaBPt9A9X86B_sbuFlRLxRnj_iF-rvHRchu1mJmnQSsY6dTGzJ7gezZn87y2-yn9UQ1IncI8VYGLcGJSvdkQKh3bCMxCAiWyEQsqsSP9h7nJW-BnCRmOg%3D%3D)

clean_body: To our family, he’s husband, dad and role model. | | Fellow American, Most people know Mike Johnson as the new Speaker of the House, a constitutional law attorney, and small business owner – but to our family, he’s husband, dad, and role model. My name is Kelly Johnson, and I’m Mike’s wife and his number one supporter. We’ve been married for 23 years now, and I have never known anyone who is more tirelessly committed to serving God, our country, and its people—or who fights as hard for our principles every single day. He was born with that servant’s heart. Mike is respected for his courage and integrity and trusted for his wisdom and insight. He is honest, principled, smart, and unshakeable. That’s precisely what America needs in these times of unprecedented challenge. I am grateful every day that our four beautiful children have such a strong role model and devoted father. We are in the greatest fight yet for the heart, soul, and direction of our country. As you know, the future that Democrats have envisioned for America is horrifying. God bless, Kelly Johnson | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

I’ve got good news and bad news, Peter.
I’ll start with the bad: Our beloved Diamondbacks lost another game last night, 11-7. Not the results we were hoping for, but we’re still proud of our city for showing up to support our team, the vendors, local businesses and our community! The series isn’t over, yes, and we know what it’s like to be underestimated, so I still believe in the Dbacks: ¡SI PUEDEN!
Now the good news: Thanks to your support, we blew through our monthly fundraising goal! I can’t express my gratitude enough for all the generosity you show our grassroots campaign. With only a few months until 2024, we’re going to do all we can to ensure we’re in a good position, and because of your support, I know we can!
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_110123_goodnewsbadnews]
Muchas gracias,
Raquel Terán

For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.
She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.
Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_110123_goodnewsbadnews]

It’s because of grassroots supporters like YOU that we’ve been able to consistently call out the Fake News media EVERY SINGLE TIME they try to spread misinformation or outright LIES about the important work President Trump is doing to SAVE AMERICA. Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we’re going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.

It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. If you'd like to change your subscription status [follow this link.](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_s=5dbc4417fc9d40b3bb10cc9c1f0e372d&_t=XfQHIaK0RdlVGWiGq4yV3WbiQYnor-ebVJvuh7K3IP7h72myAaAwrvK4y9oPo8FiA3_jSEgCIwYDrgichqaFkavqg_bgvYUdGZRBGVaf0ug%3D)

clean_body: ############################| | | | | Patriot, My First Amendment right to Free Speech has been unconstitutionally taken away in the middle of my campaign for President of the United States. How can the LEADING candidate for president be seriously restricted from campaigning in a free and open manner? If our First Amendment rights can be ripped to shreds in broad daylight, then it’s only a matter of time until the rest of our constitutional rights are destroyed. That’s why it’s critical that the people of our country take a stand at this pivotal moment. Now is our chance to send a powerful – and peaceful – message to Joe Biden and the Democrats who are trying to silence the ONLY political movement that promises to give a voice to the American people. With a SURGE of support from grassroots patriots like YOU – no matter the amount you choose to give – we will show Crooked Joe that he can try and gag me, but he can NEVER GAG the American people! | | Thank you, Donald J. name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20J.=20Lee?=
subject: 🚨NEW ENDORSEMENT!🌵
body:
Today, I am happy to announce that my campaign to be NV-04’s next Representative has been endorsed by Governor Joe Lombardo! | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/343408bebd3f/john-lee-mayor-who-rescued-north-las-vegas-announces-for-congress-12662270?e=91a702298f)
---
[](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=7fc786eb1b&e=91a702298f)
Friend,
Ever since I started this campaign, I’ve been fortunate to be endorsed by those across the state and county that we know and trust. Today, I am happy to announce that my campaign to be NV-04’s next Representative has been endorsed by Governor Joe Lombardo!
[](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=655cbda3ca&e=91a702298f)
| [STAND WITH JOE AND JOHN! >>](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=2906741958&e=91a702298f)
---
Governor and former Clark County Sheriff Joe Lombardo was elected in 2022 to put Nevada on the right track after the failed liberal policies of Governor Sisolak, and ever since then, he has been a model leader for the rest of the country.
I am proud to have gotten to know him on the campaign trail for governor, and I am proud to share in his vision of a Nevada that is economically strong, safe, and prosperous. We owe it to ourselves and future generations of Nevadans to leave them a better state, and I worked to do that myself as Mayor of North Las Vegas.
Governor Joe’s endorsement means a lot to me, but so does the support of Americans like you who understand the importance of Republican leadership. We must hold and expand our majority in the House, and I look forward to being a part of that majority.
[**Can you make your endorsement of my campaign official with a gift of any size today? >>**](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=b075e19ecf&e=91a702298f)
| [SUPPORT MAYOR LEE FOR CONGRESS >>](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=2ba48436b9&e=91a702298f)
---
| [BECOME A MONTHLY SUPPORTER >>](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=93dbcd846d&e=91a702298f)
---
**For Nevada,** Fmr Mayor John LeeCandidate for Congress, NV-04
[](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=a08a2923c8&e=91a702298f)
|
---
| | | | [](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=5aa4c683ee&e=91a702298f)| [](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=6db00bb74b&e=91a702298f)| [](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=5a4fbb54f0&e=91a702298f)

name: Team AOC
subject: Thank you 🍂
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
On behalf of Alexandria and our entire team, we wanted to thank you for being a part of our movement for a brighter future for all people across the country.
The collective power of your support has transformed countless lives, on both a personal and systemic level: from raising thousands in support of advocacy groups and emergency relief efforts, to strengthening progressive allies across the country, to bringing hundreds of hours of free, virtual homework tutoring to under-resourced families.
**And there’s more to come.** As Alexandria pushes to hold special interests to account, fights for real action to combat the climate emergency, and organizes for change that actually centers working families, we **thank you for standing with us.**
In solidarity,
Team AOC
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231101.yMMWSV&refcode=em20231101-5247-P_ENG_EOM_ORG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=5247%2E2526796%2ENk6XTU)**

clean_body: On behalf of Alexandria and our entire team, we wanted to thank you for being a part of our movement for a brighter future for all people across the country. The collective power of your support has transformed countless lives, on both a personal and systemic level: from raising thousands in support of advocacy groups and emergency relief efforts, to strengthening progressive allies across the country, to bringing hundreds of hours of free, virtual homework tutoring to under-resourced families. And there’s more to come. As Alexandria pushes to hold special interests to account, fights for real action to combat the climate emergency, and organizes for change that actually centers working families, we thank you for standing with us. In solidarity, Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

_I 'm holding Joe Biden **accountable**. _

I'm **sick and tired** of watching the Biden administration take advantage of the American people and use the Justice Department to go after President Trump. That's what you'd expect in a Banana Republic, not the United States.

****That 's why I've decided to put an official hold on all of Biden's nominees for the Department of Justice. Until the Radical Left stops TARGETING President Trump, I'm putting my foot down.** **

_**For too long now, we 've seen the corrupt Biden Administration abuse its power to target freedom-loving Americans. I've had enough, and I know you have too. **_

I've got to say I was a little embarrassed when I gave an update to our generous donor that there were only 53 people who accepted his generous 1500% match.

Ever since I broke the news to my supporters, I've been shaking in my boots because this fundraising push was supposed to obliterate every fundraising worry this campaign's had for months, and contributions have just totally undermined our expectations.

**I 'm going to make this short, the data folks have crunched the numbers and we need at least 300 more contributions by MIDNIGHT to reach our projections.**
| [**RUSH $35 -> $525 IMPACT**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=08f2c136439f4993a7ffba72c0315299&_e=8rhLu95Y-9S-DnChA4vPkkCjO9m69_bTc_pE3hDzy1XQGotzQjUZF25FDLJKrlrGeH3W0vumDt5syl0Ot8YPTMcvMblrX8z3IfoIEXij4Vsq9NZJLGo0QNjTsmEFUUgdEvCkekli2KIiLhrpvv780gg6bgLp5Z4X4M6K40d31NICwm4WG2N7QCF2o1qdAjX7gB5LH_rIdK30s0Q2CIE2COZsI_ICh2HkT_SJryifXQv0Xat7Wd_6OzNBLAjRuJpGUBHJ7AaRAlNn13cXlRQMn6eRrm7evrKgKNwPyt8RvysVU38fyTFiAwMVGvRIAjRRXifqsQL1G3H4JTBNPn-v_-84zzoTqGmhSF2HAaUl3-o%3D)

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

Fellow Conservative,

We hope this email finds you well. Thank you for your dedication to the Conservative cause and for standing up for America.

As you know, the midterm elections did not go as planned. We did not see the red wave we expected. We did take back the House majority, but we did not flip the Senate.

[ **NO, DEMOCRATS WILL STAY IN OFFICE** ](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=3cd2598e6e8b4543a20510ec1c698798&_e=skFjnV2kyKu2DDnPjsMmdzI12WzVAGl_yqTLNu7yuuhvEM-g-N4tfSjcQaJ402bjbzBN8McybaCQe1XCdnpR45wQY6u7lOXkl8HAoz5DRW_lXBLFKspk6dnRiXvjg00doBJn7jVoQMM-c4PbWVLe6okKnXOmXnahRhM4tWPcJWTLG4wgPdcbN5zqlPyHR62PjLQPzjQ3gYioqh3f0Uv2u6v4bF-CozOOEHg346X1NDQMHRlVP4E6D77Xn0vQXvV7Ve25ggPFSOI2wkOXc1tvEjPHvf-voMpX7zpolQy_19zYKsLtGU6iZJo_8DB7l9F_ZvGsJJdS5T7VoBcpApPe5RWEKQSgBZBjhZg6oP93W_mdcffTcyqQITP3Rak7McHTvn4n50QupAl5IBqJSK7VVZR-udbOVMWhG5H0u7_1FKCRBzmaI3N1wcMHhY7CEb4teC7e5zUQGo76Op42Wh1o0ViVtKb_bnm4JBXWiHbUuHCp3EK_qO3P9uBiDxawoiVc)

name: Katie Porter for California
subject: Add your name: We will never accept a nationwide ban on abortion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=32429%2E3422442%2ElpfAlH)
Derek,
After _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned last year, Republicans told us that if they control the House, Senate, and White House, they will ban abortion nationwide. Currently, in that scenario, there’s nothing states like California could do to stop them.
Now, Mike Johnson—the new Speaker of the House—supports a national ban on abortion. _This fight isn’t over. Abortion and reproductive freedom is a fundamental right that can and must be codified into federal law._
In the Senate, Katie will be a fierce advocate for overturning the filibuster to protect and restore abortion access. We need to send a message to Mike Johnson: our movement is more powerful than his extremism and hate.
**[Will you add your name right now to tell Mike Johnson that we will never accept a nationwide ban on abortion? Every signature will make a difference.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-abortion-ban/?source=EMAN01_1_REP_20231101_V1_F&akid=32429%2E3422442%2ElpfAlH)**
[Add your name >>](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-abortion-ban/?source=EMAN01_1_REP_20231101_V1_F&akid=32429%2E3422442%2ElpfAlH)
Thank you for being in this fight with Katie.
—Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAN01_1_REP_20231101_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=32429_3422442_lpfAlH&akid=32429%2E3422442%2ElpfAlH)**

clean_body: Derek, After Roe v. Wade was overturned last year, Republicans told us that if they control the House, Senate, and White House, they will ban abortion nationwide. Currently, in that scenario, there’s nothing states like California could do to stop them. Now, Mike Johnson—the new Speaker of the House—supports a national ban on abortion. This fight isn’t over. Abortion and reproductive freedom is a fundamental right that can and must be codified into federal law. In the Senate, Katie will be a fierce advocate for overturning the filibuster to protect and restore abortion access. We need to send a message to Mike Johnson: our movement is more powerful than his extremism and hate. Thank you for being in this fight with Katie. —Katie Porter HQ Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

subject: 🎉 Congressman Tom Tancredo Endorses Our Campaign!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elizabeth for Nevada]( "Paid for by Elizabeth for Nevada")
body:
But can we count on you? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/22ce47470b8e/congressman-tom-tancredo-endorses-our-campaign?e=54a81bd33c)
---
| | [ ](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=238fb89f56&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| Dear Peter:
---
| | Hot on the heels of our exciting announcement about Legacy PAC's endorsement, we've received another monumental endorsement for our campaign!

**Former Colorado Congressman Tom Tancredo** , a lifelong advocate against illegal immigration and a stalwart of conservative values, has officially thrown his support behind our campaign for Nevada's 3rd district. [](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=6a4984ee1e&e=54a81bd33c)
[See our full list of endorsements
HERE](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=80aca5093f&e=54a81bd33c) I'm deeply honored and energized by Congressman Tancredo's endorsement. His tireless advocacy for our shared values, even in the face of overwhelming opposition. Tom Tancredo is a conservative warrior who has been in the trenches for decades. His lifelong advocacy for sanity at our border was ignored by the liberal elite policymakers, but he never wavered. Every America First patriot owes a debt to Tom Tancredo.

Now, more than ever, we need your continued support. With powerful endorsements from figures like Congressman Tancredo and organizations like Legacy PAC, our campaign is surging forward. But our journey is far from over.

[**I NEED Your endorsement**](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=7b25aabf9c&e=54a81bd33c) to amplify our message and show that NV-03 is ready for genuine conservative leadership.

---
| [ENDORSE ELIZABETH](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=0e634e53c0&e=54a81bd33c "ENDORSE ELIZABETH")
---
| Your unwavering belief in our mission and your continued support fuel this campaign. Together, we're championing a brighter future for Nevada and our nation.

For Freedom,

| [ ](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=ddc6c74f9f&e=54a81bd33c)

Candidate for U.S. Congress, NV-3
[**ElizabethForNV.com**](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=eea971d4a1&e=54a81bd33c)

**P.S**. I know you have been getting a lot of emails from me asking for money, but we need to keep the momentum going. The Establishment is scared after I raised more money than their handpicked candidate last quarter, but that means they will be working even harder to stop us. **[Any donation, even $17.76 could make the difference.](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=9ab407ee38&e=54a81bd33c)**

**That's how much time we have until the Iowa Caucus, Fellow American.**

By now, you’ve heard from all the Republican primary candidates and know where each of us stands on the issues. To this day, I am still the only candidate running _**to something**_ , not just running away from Joe Biden and the Left. This country needs a candidate willing to deliver the TRUTH and lead with purpose.

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=5c36cdf1b3a94892ba46575827a0ef85&_e=9bonPxvSgkv6_vmefsuyQ4gMuJQC9Ub5gOdsGO3REXhZP-hUZedzqmDmIDIjhGjFNR6jksO6PdknlGQdC_fJzs0cfJG6UOpmtnvHLEhuWouG4W9vPYtd1rcgz3JSkDHRxxOO8vg0yamXWgANPb4XobLDC6-1tthsHYkbAh6epnWZOJDxmkrr54zGin54e5WfbDe884pFx4LXpxIYW6ofTfAX2yBgQa9Hjesd2YHc_qS5PPzUBZbjg2V29Rnhc27xHOOxHIJh-GfQ1uN36pevrLwfcIETl9q_5cT87ij2azU6WJUN_LbSBlkssgsQG_2NI9QS_hHZm3B5TEOJl1HA1RPBgM_o72kYcPIyW3-pL9t-OPWKa-3lfxo6dwlgq3eO)
Fellow American, I'm proud of what my campaign has accomplished so far, but we have more work to do. Every campaign event, every single voter I’ve talked to, and every debate I’ve participated in has led us to this moment.

The first caucus in Iowa is crucial.

**Team Vivek is on the ground in Iowa every day between now and the caucus, but we cannot do it without your support.** [**Can I count on you to make a $7.50 contribution today to reach our grassroots goal?**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=5c36cdf1b3a94892ba46575827a0ef85&_e=9bonPxvSgkv6_vmefsuyQ4gMuJQC9Ub5gOdsGO3REXhZP-hUZedzqmDmIDIjhGjFNR6jksO6PdknlGQdC_fJzs0cfJG6UOpmtnvHLEhuWouG4W9vPYtd1rcgz3JSkDHRxxOO8vg0yamXWgANPb4XobLDC6-1tthsHYkbAh6epnWZOJDxmkrr54zGin54e5WfbDe884pFx4LXpxIYW6ofTfAX2yBgQa9Hjesd2YHc_qTZlwmCpWOOJ5iNv029fTUVR4pgetfgnYn69f37t6RAAN8QYTFRSfMqhpBgHYCB0bftDxMiKYSVj3dsUWc_pQcIMILD8qvMvm9Itk1c13qW5U16rF1vDk9AFGe333QQ9M9YPzrhXDU_CqGLwgmBe8EB)

Thank you,

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=5c36cdf1b3a94892ba46575827a0ef85&_e=9bonPxvSgkv6_vmefsuyQ4gMuJQC9Ub5gOdsGO3REXhZP-hUZedzqmDmIDIjhGjFNR6jksO6PdknlGQdC_fJzs0cfJG6UOpmtnvHLEhuWouG4W9vPYtd1rcgz3JSkDHRxxOO8vg0yamXWgANPb4XobLDC6-1tthsHYkbAh6epnWZOJDxmkrr54zGin54e5WfbDe884pFx4LXpxIYW6ofTfAX2yBgQa9Hjesd2YHc_qQFASWbG_ipdt6RtVtmfjY1fp2b69D2JlKy5HbApR2R_5u6ZkL1xUC6-WL7OHG-7E-2SOsBk24WwlzVEWR5CmNUS450aaYiOErESwaTnC1Wbk0QSKDTsgut3LXz2vQv9wAQl4P443T8HSvBZ-Ab1LBo)
Vivek Ramaswamy

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

body:
One week until Election Day 2023 and another week of great events and happenings in the campaign. Here are just a few highlights: |
---
[](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=b1ef013b91114d7396c4ff5825cf2a31&_e=Ozd5SEyxPYxaNYnz-x6jMOy6w0BBPxymhftXnQ2G6QSdIFWwZpH519kmvM3_J4QCZ9OQq5HtZSuBbPX7BcpiIgZ_nej1RxilQDGlMb2R9yiLY9nSyxHBEtLmjAcRqC_iwsubeT3NkLBeQyc0baTNnBmjjjpYVERrE34HGXkpgGswnoTwPLPG-EyhJu8E2QQgFIjjBraH4yVjuk24DmiVT8eaK7Llo2kTvqt7b6aHn0oicDMsDtry7Esl71dnbbnUlI7Oi9RwqRIoE7-H-nu-_3hVsAwETmdl7FErTVKqBpJ4agL3xWSM2tDM8fjSMULOOvR4HU-EjXd13VDtDpA_W1v23Yzfjd20s0lPeWu_l7Wu8BnWWYZRstqtWsSpleH5W3BB99PofBY53umoSvFjxa2z4ja8GmROW2vfKPqtC04%3D)

_**The Mackenzie Minute**_

* * *
Peter,

I hope everyone got enough candy on Halloween and the Halloween events around our communities. I know I did! Along with candy, our campaign had some other treats this week as well. Here are some highlights:

• First to take the ATR Taxpayer Protection Pledge
• Mackenzie Election Integrity Team
• Jim Thorpe Halloween Parade
• Poll Results = Bad News For Montero Campaign
• Carbon County Republican Committee

NEXT TUESDAY IS ELECTION DAY! Remember to vote for your Republican Team - and get your neighbors to do the same.

As always, if you need to get in contact with my campaign, please feel free to reach out at (484) 347-8777.

All the Best,
[](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=b1ef013b91114d7396c4ff5825cf2a31&_e=Ozd5SEyxPYxaNYnz-x6jMOy6w0BBPxymhftXnQ2G6QSdIFWwZpH519kmvM3_J4QCZ9OQq5HtZSuBbPX7BcpiIgZ_nej1RxilQDGlMb2R9yiLY9nSyxHBEtLmjAcRqC_iwsubeT3NkLBeQyc0baTNnBmjjjpYVERrE34HGXkpgGswnoTwPLPG-EyhJu8E2QQgFIjjBraH4yVjuk24DmiVT8eaK7Llo2kTvqt7b6aHn0oicDMsDtry7Esl71dnbbnUlI7Oi9RwqRIoE7-H-nu-_w4Smu9nbq9uroTOCyci0eqxgf5Itaz2hwEXSB78hI-hrbBsqp0BRs77YfPVMEcd_g_xWNUr83rEMmUaj6WrKtmLvJNPIKO8QUoznutG3bGBZxoZkzyHp9kBg3V4VHkqREu2ORHZTvPN-RJSgF0STiU%3D)

* * *
**NEWS**
* * *

**Americans For Tax Reform’s Taxpayer Protection Pledge**
I am proud to be the first candidate in the race for Pennsylvania's 7th Congressional District to sign the Americans for Tax Reform’s Taxpayer Protection Pledge.

As a State Representative, I have consistently fought for taxpayers: never voting for a tax increase, and being the prime sponsor of legislation that eliminated the inheritance tax on small family businesses. I look forward to continuing my record of cutting and eliminating taxes that are taking money out of the pockets of American workers and impeding economic growth. Just merely holding the line is not enough.

* * *
**Join My Election Integrity Team Today**

Last night, our team held an election integrity call putting the pieces in place to help ensure fair and secure elections for our local Republican candidates across the 7th District.

If you are interested in joining other volunteers as they help with monitoring polls and the mail-in ballot counting process, please sign up TODAY. Time is short and we need to get Poll Watcher Certificates for those who want to help. Sign-up [**here.**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=b1ef013b91114d7396c4ff5825cf2a31&_e=Ozd5SEyxPYxaNYnz-x6jMAJ-RuwoPTtAtZBGDxBjM_J5jsZmPG87K9pEIEYLAG5HRXpt2VOpa06fF7wQy29pVscmAXSqt5nt1iIaFX9McC9TB7NoEYy5bQO3sslO-ZcGG-D4CGXdixTjGTuL7r8xUkbIsdZRBPv8s9ausRVISO5ZPDVg8P6rLkj7riBm4FoXpirIY7aqdXUCtRa9sgspNA%3D%3D)

Even if you can’t volunteer with our Election Integrity Team, if you see any issues on Election Day, we encourage you to call our campaign at 484-575-1872

* * *
**Jim Thorpe Halloween Parade**
Over the weekend, I walked in the Jim Thorpe Halloween Parade. Jim Thorpe is a beautiful community and I was so happy to see so many residents on a great day, and so many kids having fun.

* * *
**Poll Results = Bad For Montero Campaign**
A little over a week ago, our campaign polled nearly 20,000 likely 2024 Republican Primary voters.

We started with a documented fact:

Just months ago, Maria Montero moved here from the Philadelphia area. Only 96 days later she announced her run for Congress.

Then we asked a simple question:

Would you vote for a candidate knowing they only recently moved to the area to run for Congress? The results are in, and they’re bad news for Montero’s campaign. A whopping 81.8% said “NO – I want a Representative from our area.” **81.8%!**

It’s clear that Republican voters won’t be fooled in next year’s Primary.

And we already know that the Democrat attack machine will use this same information against Montero’s campaign the way they did against Dr. Oz’s.

* * *
**Carbon County Republican Committee**
Last week, I was happy to address the Carbon County Republican Committee and talk about my campaign for Congress, my proven record, my deep roots in the district, and why I am the best candidate to defeat Susan Wild. I thank everyone who attended for their graciousness and great questions.

* * *
This week is the final push for our 2023 Republican candidates, and we all need to join together and help them. Please join me in this effort by contacting your local candidates and finding out how you can help them in these important last days of the Election. As always, if you’d like to join our team, visit [**ryanforpa.com/#volunteer**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=b1ef013b91114d7396c4ff5825cf2a31&_e=Ozd5SEyxPYxaNYnz-x6jMDjIezofgqTC4O-sgvsZsLOfy7xmCio0TncUEMEtIHCR-pUOulHEGNXIBZI1aaLBF7xqqI97g-TuqiuUq_0r3M-Xe7bin43jBLS9Ma2iq3xkmJEo0Y1w95sUjauXJRI4AT6mv9xnniMGJcjgrO2qkgixK34mpHB3OxzhxliJA3yBdM_ZkRswowlyA8SXiIPQnssBmsoJBktXXuClkCteFeU%3D) or donate at [**give.ryanforpa.com.**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=b1ef013b91114d7396c4ff5825cf2a31&_e=Ozd5SEyxPYxaNYnz-x6jMOy6w0BBPxymhftXnQ2G6QSdIFWwZpH519kmvM3_J4QCZ9OQq5HtZSuBbPX7BcpiIgZ_nej1RxilQDGlMb2R9yiLY9nSyxHBEtLmjAcRqC_iwsubeT3NkLBeQyc0baTNnBmjjjpYVERrE34HGXkpgGswnoTwPLPG-EyhJu8E2QQgFIjjBraH4yVjuk24DmiVT8eaK7Llo2kTvqt7b6aHn0oicDMsDtry7Esl71dnbbnUlI7Oi9RwqRIoE7-H-nu-_4XsMFDww7YI585-73qWBHReMY26XBOwTbuulcSIcFMl7KkCadxHiAaltwQDPhZHLVvhzs0L0THGwejJJMpMXKhGuAop96yY7A58tHLKdw6FWaI673qq-ozebDZ-ISH85Ga6a00qiiix34T7yHMxr7I%3D)

[ **DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=b1ef013b91114d7396c4ff5825cf2a31&_e=Ozd5SEyxPYxaNYnz-x6jMOy6w0BBPxymhftXnQ2G6QSdIFWwZpH519kmvM3_J4QCZ9OQq5HtZSuBbPX7BcpiIgZ_nej1RxilQDGlMb2R9yiLY9nSyxHBEtLmjAcRqC_iwsubeT3NkLBeQyc0baTNnBmjjjpYVERrE34HGXkpgGswnoTwPLPG-EyhJu8E2QQgFIjjBraH4yVjuk24DmiVT8eaK7Llo2kTvqt7b6aHn0oicDMsDtry7Esl71dnbbnUlI7Oi9RwqRIoE7-H-nu-_7SOtgqlf4K-XSqzW9x5IlrLdPP_tAYCp5AR3nQ1feiydhffI-qMWMIQpP4tV2TpydTrXiZQc8R-3awFm6JErWnGs5gtpUMtx-f-20cztYQkeJBPDAG0Fhgglt8j2D8ydWI4PuhxGGN2r_xrBiUAewg%3D)

body:
You ever seen four malamutes in suits?
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72632372/435898931/-2024045026?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2ZlYzc1MC0wNDc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i9WoAo6n3lwb8vY0-rail0y9YQpJz9w54H0I6V-J2qc=&emci=7ccc1ce3-fc78-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=ccfec750-0479-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=29359352)

| | **Thank you for your support during our end-of-month fundraising drive****Peter!** Because of your enthusiasm for Lynn and this movement, we were able to hit our October fundraising goal, setting us on a good track to finish this year strong! **As a thank you, we want to share something you may have not ever seen: four malamutes in suits. ** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72632373/435898932/974409837?refcode=2023-11-01-malamutes&recurring=&amount=12&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ccfec750-0479-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2ZlYzc1MC0wNDc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i9WoAo6n3lwb8vY0-rail0y9YQpJz9w54H0I6V-J2qc=) _Trying to get four dogs in costume is hard enough, let alone a good photo of them all together!_ Last night, the Peterson Pups greeted trick or treaters as a (fuzzy) angel, a (soft and cuddly) devil, a (brown, fluffy) dragon, and a (not very scary) shark. **** **It's silly, but this holiday is one of our favorites because it brings everyone out into the community and gets neighbors talking.** As you can imagine, Lynn and the Peterson Pups are _all about_ that! We hope you had a safe, fun, and festive Halloween. 🎃 More soon, _Team Peterson_ P.S. 🗳️ Did you know there's another opportunity to support your community coming up — Election Day is November 7! clean_body: You ever seen four malamutes in suits? | | | | Thank you for your support during our end-of-month fundraising drivePeter! Because of your enthusiasm for Lynn and this movement, we were able to hit our October fundraising goal, setting us on a good track to finish this year strong! As a thank you, we want to share something you may have not ever seen: four malamutes in suits. = Trying to get four dogs in costume is hard enough, let alone a good photo of them all together! Last night, the Peterson Pups greeted trick or treaters as a (fuzzy) angel, a (soft and cuddly) devil, a (brown, fluffy) dragon, and a (not very scary) shark. ** It's silly, but this holiday is one of our favorites because it brings everyone out into the community and gets neighbors talking. As you can imagine, Lynn and the Peterson Pups are all about that! We hope you had a safe, fun, and festive Halloween. 🎃 More soon, Team Peterson P.S. 🗳️ Did you know there's another opportunity to support your community coming up — Election Day is November 7! | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Lynn Peterson for Congress |

I wanted to reach out to say **thank you** for your overwhelming support of our campaign for Congress.

Thank you again, and let’s flip our district blue,

Laura Gillen

body:
| |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Nixon?=
subject: Support for Israel’s Defense Bill!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Nixon for Congress 2024
body:
Funding Israel’s Defense is Paramount to Defending Democracy and Liberty. | | | | | |
---
[](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e112c23e10549839640d4155d&id=bc57c891ba&e=cc1921084c)
|
---
Friend,
In a testament to the decisiveness of conservative leadership, Speaker Johnson and House Republicans have been quick to create a bill funding our continued support of Israel’s defense. Israel has been a key regional ally throughout our 75 year relationship, fighting side-by-side with us against terrorist groups and supporting burgeoning democracy movements in the region. This bill is a continuation of our nation’s commitment to Israel, and safeguarding democracy against authoritarianism and extremist terror groups.
I agree with Speaker Johnson that it’s more important for us to stand with Israel and support them financially than it is to spend millions and millions of dollars to hire IRS agents. But the Democrats have consistently done everything in their power, even before Johnson was elected as speaker, to hinder American support for Israel’s defense. The Democrat’s shortsightedness on defending Israel will not end with a regional collapse of a trusted, strategic ally. It will inevitably lead to a deterioration of international peace as more state-sponsored terror groups, like Hamas, will be emboldened to commit similar atrocities around the world.
**Supporting Israel’s Fight Against Terrorism Will Create a Better, Brighter Future**
We must stand with Israel and support them in this war and be stalwart in our defense of any people who are actively fighting to preserve their democratically elected governments from repressive terror groups.

| [SUPPORT ISRAEL’S DEFENSE](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e112c23e10549839640d4155d&id=57b04a89e9&e=cc1921084c)

# Exciting Announcement!
---
| | We are thrilled to share some exciting news with you. Dom Jones, a dedicated and passionate advocate for our community, has been officially endorsed by California State Controller Malia M. Cohen. This endorsement is a testament to Dom's commitment to serving the people and her strong record of working towards positive change in our district of Orange County, AD72.
---
| | | [**Learn More**](https://www.domjones.org/so/7fOkD1J36/c?w=eMeu3tw6yzBL74HslrNXC6jTclbYu9AFU4Yvr7x2eWk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG9tam9uZXMub3JnLyIsInIiOiI0OTYwYWM3Ny0wNWNlLTQ1NzMtYjNlNC1kOWU3OGEyOTY1ZWMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI1MWJiMTc0NC0yYTkzLTQzMGMtOGM0Ny0wODA2ODA2ZGQxYzIifQ)
---
| | Why is this endorsement important?
---
| |
## 1\. Recognition of Commitment
---
| | The endorsement from California State Controller Malia M. Cohen recognizes Dom's unwavering commitment to representing the interests of our community. It highlights her dedication and hard work in fighting for the issues that matter most to us.
---
| |
## 2\. Expertise and Experience
---
| | As a seasoned politician and prominent figure in California politics, Controller Cohen's endorsement speaks volumes about Dom's expertise and experience. It signifies that she has the knowledge and skills necessary to be an effective and impactful leader in the California State Legislature.
---
| |
## 3\. Strengthened Campaign
---
| | This endorsement not only boosts Dom's campaign but also strengthens our collective voice. It shows that we have a candidate who is trusted and respected by influential leaders, which will help us garner more support and resources for the upcoming election.

name: Team Bell
subject: Wesley’s decision to run
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Peter,

Wesley’s decision to run for office was one that began more than three decades ago when his father, a 25-year veteran police officer, taught Wesley the responsibility one has to their community.

_That lesson_ drove Wesley into public service. Wesley served his community working as a public defender and continues that service as St. Louis County's leading Prosecuting Attorney.

Now, that same lesson is telling him he’s not done fighting for St. Louis. Wesley’s community needs him, and that’s why he’s running to challenge Cori Bush for the Democratic nomination to the U.S. House of Representatives for Missouri's 1st Congressional District.

**[If you're fired up and ready to join this fight, then please make an immediate donation to Wesley’s House campaign today, and together, we'll take back the House majority in Fellow American,

I write this having just been elected by my colleagues as the 56th Speaker of the United States House of Representatives.

The task of leading our House majority is a great one, and to say that I’m humbled by the faith my colleagues have bestowed on me is an understatement.

My message to you today is this: When Republicans come together, there is no measure of what we can achieve.

In the near term, my team and I will work to make sure that we’re passing responsible, fiscally conservative legislation to fund our government and support our military. **And with an election a little more than twelve months away, we’ll work around the clock to grow our House majority and help EVERY Republican incumbent in their reelection campaign.**

body:
The best gift you ever given me

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72633038/435901449/1072501871?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWE5ZTdkNjEtMGE3OS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-lUUdfBVzCORP8fMNYuaAmknh4EjO_VJIE0NKLbIK60=)
---
Team — I can’t thank you enough for your support.

Our campaign relies on grassroots donors like you chipping in a few bucks at a time, **so your support last month truly made a difference.

Thanks to you, I was able to go trick or treating with my kids and be fully present from the first house, to the last – without worrying about fundraising.

I can’t thank you enough for that gift.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72633040/435901450/417269932?amount=10&refcode=RRFC_20231101_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWE5ZTdkNjEtMGE3OS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-lUUdfBVzCORP8fMNYuaAmknh4EjO_VJIE0NKLbIK60=) [**But team, I’ll be honest: we finished the month of October just barely past our break-even point. If we want to keep up with MAGA in the weeks and months ahead, then I’m counting on top supporters like you to be with me right now. name: Eric Swalwell
subject: If you only read one email today, please make it this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2023-FR-November?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2023-FR-November?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
This team has my back like no other, and our end-of-month fundraising numbers are a testament to the strength of this movement. Thank you for stepping up, friend.

But now, I’ve got a big fight ahead — and I need to know you’re ready to support me through it.

On Monday, I testified in the Colorado trial that will determine whether Trump is eligible to be on the state’s 2024 ballot under the 14th Amendment’s “insurrection” clause. If found guilty, he would be ineligible to run for president in the state.

Look, I’ve spent every day since January 6 holding Donald Trump and his MAGA minions accountable for the attack on our nation’s capitol, and you’d better believe I’m going to see this fight through.

But this pursuit of justice puts a giant target on my back. We’ve already seen Republicans retaliate against me by ousting me from the Intelligence Committee earlier this year, so I’m not exaggerating when I say I need to be ready for anything they throw my way.

I know I’ve asked a lot of you, but this is a critical fight that we cannot afford to lose. Friend, will you make a $5 donation to help me build my line of defense against Republicans’ attacks so we can win this fight and keep Trump out of office for good?

DONATE » https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2023-FR-November?&refcode=E4788-20231101-EOMThankYou-SB-Other&amount=5

This fight isn’t about political power. It’s about keeping bad actors trying to destroy our democracy out of our nation’s highest offices.

Thank you for standing with me, friend.

— Eric
DONATE TO ERIC >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2023-FR-November?refcode=headerfooter-footer&amount=25]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/km-meow?refcode=email-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/km-meow?refcode=email-footer]
Text ERIC to 43033 to get text updates! On your phone? Press here to sign up in just two clicks >> [http://go.txting.io/e8bRZP] Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. He needs your support in order to keep protecting what's important: our healthcare, our paychecks, our future, and our democracy.
DONATE TO ERIC >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2023-FR-November?refcode=headerfooter-footer&amount=25]
Eric runs a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots supporters like you, and if he's going to win re-election, he's going to need your help. If you'd still like to stop receiving emails, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/sSRynqGvEUuAD1QP3hBpsA2?unsubscribedata=LYuLqCaAM5I1uCpWIwOncPy7iVftgQGNPbh7T8MvY4N7RAopSnK0yxPhyjAxtZsrKcFVjtftmmpIXq2B02FOm8S2GgRx1ls64yUgWDuUNYoxsdKnuJM6fP5Allhagb7%2B3B%2FsUuRzdnCHFo%2FWXPEh0CHIRlzzXNNqTRQIH3xOG%2B3JkCP%2Fa7tspX8B24IeklJqgGaX589LVbASMsheh%2FA8ZEF%2B8CqrkmqP8jB6N4MUH8pLTdDwK9GfiMlZheSg8m5qFuniaS9%2Bs52kPnZ%2F5Ba2lpYO6yJ%2FAsWGRnfKvNh%2BDnBtr6PQDluQ4S8nCW5tzAPa8mimuOFTwpsHrObMDi4OwSGBxlvEErTVGMKrOWs2GLKtuLHJ%2B78UOEA15dC76ktY1d5%2FWJp44MbOHQGe8hFfn%2BHePOD1HU68eH%2FElqUu0Vc%3D

subject: Fellow Conservative, your response is vital!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=59a5829f1acd4e22a6499763f26eb1c0&_t=ug4EoXTAQ0QxY1HtYUdfB93LsMWxX6vJHeYO8QoTdoAhS68hvGl7NTBHhFgDeC-GrRTZz68xT_pZ76yHnmX2wiBT1yqgUT9lxMI3xbNqRNg%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=59a5829f1acd4e22a6499763f26eb1c0&_t=ug4EoXTAQ0QxY1HtYUdfB93LsMWxX6vJHeYO8QoTdoAhS68hvGl7NTBHhFgDeC-GrRTZz68xT_pZ76yHnmX2wiBT1yqgUT9lxMI3xbNqRNg%3D)

|
Hi there Friend,

It's Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.

_**I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. **_

I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and sacrifice.

I attended Louisiana State University, where I received a degree in business and later my law degree.

As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values.

---

clean_body: I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. | | | | | Hi there Friend, It's Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson. I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and sacrifice. I attended Louisiana State University, where I received a degree in business and later my law degree. As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values. | | | | "Generic Button" But most importantly, I am husband to my wife Kelly and father to our four amazing children. | | | | "Generic Button" I'm honored to serve as Speaker of the House and to work with you to expand our conservative Majority in 2024. We have so much work to accomplish, and I can't wait to get started. But I need to ask you one favor. I set a goal of activating 5,000 grassroots donors so I can hit the ground running. "Will you join my team today and help me fight for our conservative values by expanding our Majority in 2024? " | | | "Generic Button" Thank you for your unwavering commitment to our conservative movement. God Bless, Speaker Mike Johnson | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
