name: Biz, NDRC President
subject: I wanted to reach out personally to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team, I wanted to reach out personally to explain why [**_your grassroots support for the NDRC_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72633511/435903345/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20231101_FR_11B_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyYjQ2MDdlLTBjNzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hPesJTZLOBgsKPgrqZ77AH2CxwsqVpmBovnBeHop1A4=) has never been more important.

There are many reasons, but I’ll just give you three: **1\. CNN recently reported that “high-stakes battles over new congressional lines . . . could influence which party controls the US House of Representatives after the 2024 election.”**

Ultimately, _more than a dozen district lines could shift_ before next November’s election. Considering that Republicans currently control the House by just 5 votes, that’s more than enough to swing the House majority.

**2\. The NDRC is the _only_ nationwide, Democratic organization 100% committed to fighting for fair maps across the country.**

Last decade, Republicans used gerrymandering and voter disenfranchisement to seize an unearned political advantage. To fight these antidemocratic tactics and hand power back to the people, A.G. Eric Holder, with support from leaders like President Barack Obama, established the NDRC in 2017 as the first-ever centralized hub to fight for fair maps.

**3\. The NDRC has a proven track record of winning fair maps victories across the country.**

Ahead of the 2022 election, our proven grassroots strategy helped secure what the _New York Times_ called “the fairest map of the last 40 years.” After Election Day, President Barack Obama said, **“Our democracy is stronger because of what we have accomplished . . . But the movement doesn’t stop here.”**

By making a [**_donation of any amount to the NDRC_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72633512/435903346/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20231101_FR_11B_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyYjQ2MDdlLTBjNzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hPesJTZLOBgsKPgrqZ77AH2CxwsqVpmBovnBeHop1A4=), you’ll help power our work to secure even fairer maps ahead of 2024. **Team, the work we do over the next few months will determine whether we (A) build on our victories by securing more fair maps or (B) allow Republicans to roll back our progress through unchecked gerrymandering.**

[**_Will you rush an urgent donation to help the NDRC continue fighting for fairness?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72633513/435903347/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20231101_FR_11B_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyYjQ2MDdlLTBjNzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hPesJTZLOBgsKPgrqZ77AH2CxwsqVpmBovnBeHop1A4=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | Team, I wanted to reach out personally to explain why = has never been more important. There are many reasons, but I’ll just give you three: 1\. CNN recently reported that “high-stakes battles over new congressional lines . . . could influence which party controls the US House of Representatives after the 2024 election.” Ultimately, more than a dozen district lines could shift before next November’s election. Considering that Republicans currently control the House by just 5 votes, that’s more than enough to swing the House majority. 2\. The NDRC is the only nationwide, Democratic organization 100% committed to fighting for fair maps across the country. Last decade, Republicans used gerrymandering and voter disenfranchisement to seize an unearned political advantage. To fight these antidemocratic tactics and hand power back to the people, A.G. Eric Holder, with support from leaders like President Barack Obama, established the NDRC in 2017 as the first-ever centralized hub to fight for fair maps. 3\. The NDRC has a proven track record of winning fair maps victories across the country. Ahead of the 2022 election, our proven grassroots strategy helped secure what the New York Times called “the fairest map of the last 40 years.” After Election Day, President Barack Obama said, “Our democracy is stronger because of what we have accomplished . . . But the movement doesn’t stop here.” By making a =, you’ll help power our work to secure even fairer maps ahead of 2024. Team, the work we do over the next few months will determine whether we (A) build on our victories by securing more fair maps or (B) allow Republicans to roll back our progress through unchecked gerrymandering. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = I hope you’ll stick with us, team – we’re counting on you. Biz John Bisognano President, NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: We're in for a tough race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Peter -- **in a moment, I'm going to ask you to chip in $5 to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue.** But first, let me explain why this moment is so important.
Together, we're building a powerful grassroots movement to protect the Dignity of Work for all Americans. This movement is made up of thousands of folks just like you, giving $5, $25, or whatever they can because they know this fight matters.
But I'll be honest: We're in for a tough race. Right now, polls show me neck and neck with the GOP field, and Republicans are already launching attack ads to defeat me. With our entire Senate majority on the line, I'm counting on supporters like you to power this campaign to victory.
So please, will you split $5 between my campaign and Bob Casey’s so we can win this race? Here's a personalized link for you: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231101-2](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231101-2?refcode=em20231101-2)**
I truly appreciate your support. Thanks for being on my team.
Sherrod

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1039%2E552475%2EqMZHSg)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: If you only read one email today, please make it this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2023-FR-November?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2023-FR-November?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
This team has my back like no other, and our end-of-month fundraising numbers are a testament to the strength of this movement. Thank you for stepping up, friend.

But now, I’ve got a big fight ahead — and I need to know you’re ready to support me through it.

On Monday, I testified in the Colorado trial that will determine whether Trump is eligible to be on the state’s 2024 ballot under the 14th Amendment’s “insurrection” clause. If found guilty, he would be ineligible to run for president in the state.

Look, I’ve spent every day since January 6 holding Donald Trump and his MAGA minions accountable for the attack on our nation’s capitol, and you’d better believe I’m going to see this fight through.

But this pursuit of justice puts a giant target on my back. We’ve already seen Republicans retaliate against me by ousting me from the Intelligence Committee earlier this year, so I’m not exaggerating when I say I need to be ready for anything they throw my way.

I know I’ve asked a lot of you, but this is a critical fight that we cannot afford to lose. Friend, will you make a $5 donation to help me build my line of defense against Republicans’ attacks so we can win this fight and keep Trump out of office for good?

DONATE » https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2023-FR-November?&refcode=E4788-20231101-EOMThankYou-SB-Other&amount=5

This fight isn’t about political power. It’s about keeping bad actors trying to destroy our democracy out of our nation’s highest offices.

Thank you for standing with me, friend.

— Eric

name: Andy Beshear for Governor
subject: Andy's been everywhere, Peter.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
We're not going to slow until the polls close. Peter,

This campaign has touched every corner of our Commonwealth. On the road, Andy has met and spoken with thousands of Kentuckians and connected with voters in countless communities.

In the last few days, Andy has been on the road with stops across the Commonwealth, including **Lexington, Covington, Maysville, Ashland, Morehead, Louisville, Richmond, London, and Hazard.**

Kentuckians are energized and ready to help power us through these final days of the race and re-elect Andy on November 7! We're going to continue pushing hard until the polls close, but Andy needs your support.

[**With just days left, will you help us down the final stretch by donating any amount right away? Your donations will help us reach as many voters as possible before Election Day and ensure Andy wins this close race clean_body: We're not going to slow until the polls close. Peter, This campaign has touched every corner of our Commonwealth. On the road, Andy has met and spoken with thousands of Kentuckians and connected with voters in countless communities. In the last few days, Andy has been on the road with stops across the Commonwealth, including Lexington, Covington, Maysville, Ashland, Morehead, Louisville, Richmond, London, and Hazard. Kentuckians are energized and ready to help power us through these final days of the race and re-elect Andy on November 7!
